en.title: Best E-Readers of 2026: Kindle, Kobo & More Tested & Ranked
en.description: The definitive 2026 ranking of e-readers for every type of reader, from casual fiction fans to power users who want Android on E Ink.

zh-tw.title: 2026 最佳電子書閱讀器排行榜：Kindle、Kobo 實測推薦
zh-tw.description: 2026 年電子書閱讀器完整排行，從一般讀者到重度使用者，找到最適合自己的一台。

en.description: The gold standard e-reader with a 7" 300 ppi glare-free display, 10-week battery, and waterproofing at a price that beats every comparable device.

zh-tw.description: 7 吋 300 ppi 防眩光螢幕，電池續航 10 週，防水設計，是目前同價位裡找不到對手的綜合實力。

en.description: A 7" color Kaleido 3 e-reader with physical page-turn buttons, waterproofing, and Kobo's superior library borrowing integration.

zh-tw.description: 7 吋 Kaleido 3 彩色螢幕，有實體翻頁鍵，防水，Kobo 的圖書館借閱功能在這個價位裡是最完整的。

en.description: Amazon's flagship color e-reader with a 7" Kaleido 3 display, auto front light, wireless charging, and 8-week battery life.

zh-tw.description: Amazon 旗艦彩色閱讀器，7 吋 Kaleido 3 螢幕，自動亮度調節，無線充電，電池 8 週，Kindle 生態系的最佳彩色選擇。

en.description: A compact 6" color e-reader that brings Kaleido 3 color to a lighter, more affordable package for commuters and casual readers.

zh-tw.description: 6 吋 Kaleido 3 彩色閱讀器，機身輕薄，通勤攜帶沒負擔，是入門彩色閱讀器裡 CP 值最高的選擇。

en.description: A phone-sized E Ink device running full Android, letting you install Kindle, Kobo, Libby, and any reading app on a pocket-friendly e-ink screen.

zh-tw.description: 手機尺寸的 E Ink 裝置，跑完整 Android，Kindle App、Kobo App、電子漫畫全都能裝，是最自由的閱讀硬體。

en.description: The best budget e-reader for library borrowers, featuring a Carta 1300 display that edges out the base Kindle, and Kobo's best-in-class OverDrive/Libby integration.

zh-tw.description: Carta 1300 螢幕品質超越同價位 Kindle，Kobo 的圖書館借閱整合是業界最好的，重度圖書館用戶的最佳預算選擇。

en.description: A 7" Android-powered e-reader that runs any reading app you want, aimed at power users who need open ecosystem flexibility in a standard form factor.

zh-tw.description: 7 吋 Android 閱讀器，能裝任何閱讀 App，給需要高度自由度但不想要手機尺寸的進階使用者。

en.description: A paper-thin 10.3" writing tablet with a remarkably paper-like display surface, designed primarily for note-taking and PDF annotation rather than casual reading.

zh-tw.description: 10.3 吋超薄寫作平板，書寫質感是所有 E Ink 裝置中最接近紙張的，主打 PDF 批注與筆記使用場景。

en.description: Amazon's 11-inch E Ink note-taking e-reader with a 300 ppi display, Premium Pen, and AI handwriting-to-text tools that convert notes directly into Kindle margins and digital notebooks.

zh-tw.description: 11 吋 300 ppi E Ink 螢幕，附 Premium Pen，AI 手寫轉文字，可直接在 Kindle 電子書邊空寫筆記，是重度 Kindle 用戶同時需要大螢幕筆記功能的首選。

en.description: Ultra-compact 6-inch Android e-reader with 300 PPI E Ink display, 2GB RAM, 32GB storage, and microSD expansion at an accessible entry price.

zh-tw.description: 文石最輕薄的 6 吋 Android 電子書閱讀器，300 PPI E Ink 螢幕，2GB RAM + 32GB 內建儲存，支援 microSD 擴充，台灣官方售價 NT$5,280，是進入 Boox 開放生態系的最低門檻。

en.description: Seven-inch Kaleido 3 color E-Ink reader running Android, with full app sideloading for Kindle, Kobo, comics, and PDFs.

zh-tw.description: 七吋 Kaleido 3 彩色電子紙，跑 Android 系統，Kindle、Kobo、漫畫 App、PDF 想裝什麼就裝什麼。

references.title: Best E-Readers in 2026: 9 Top Picks from Kindle, Kobo and More
Mid-Spring 2026 Kindle vs Kobo Buying Guide
Kindle Paperwhite 2025 Long-Term Review After Six Months

en.commentary:
The Kindle Paperwhite 2025 holds my top spot at 9.3 this week, and the conviction comes from real usage rather than spec sheets. After six months of daily reading, the 7 inch 300 ppi display still feels closer to ink on paper than any color e-reader can match for pure text reading. The 10-week battery claim has held up across two beach trips and one transcontinental flight, and the waterproofing means I read it in the bath without anxiety. At $160 with the current spring promotional pricing, this is the most leverage you can extract from an e-reader budget in 2026.

Kobo Libra Colour climbs to 8.8 because the physical page-turn buttons remain the single biggest ergonomic advantage in this category, and the Kaleido 3 color screen has matured into a genuinely useful feature for comics and magazine PDFs. The library borrowing integration through OverDrive is more seamless than what Kindle offers, and that matters for readers who live at the library.

Kindle Colorsoft is the right call when you want color and Kindle ecosystem together. The wireless charging is a luxury feature that I have come to appreciate. Kobo Clara Colour holds fourth for commuters who value the compact 6 inch form factor. Boox Palma 2 remains my recommendation for power users who want full Android in a pocketable e-ink form. The Kobo Clara BW gets a small bump because the value proposition at this price stays unbeatable for a no-color, pure reading device. Boox Page and Remarkable 2 serve their specific niches well, though for general reading the top four entries on this list cover almost every use case.

highlights.title: Kindle Paperwhite 2025 Remains The Most Universal Recommendation
highlights.body: Six months of daily use confirms the 10-week battery life and the 300 ppi display sharpness. At $160 with current spring promotional pricing, this device delivers more reading value per dollar than anything else on the market, and it earns its 9.3 score on real-world reliability.

highlights.title: Kobo Libra Colour's Physical Buttons Define Its Edge
highlights.body: The page-turn buttons make this the most ergonomic reading device in the category. Combined with Kaleido 3 color, OverDrive library integration, and proper waterproofing, the Libra Colour at $230 is the right pick for readers who want a premium experience with library borrowing.

highlights.title: Kindle Colorsoft Is The Color Pick For Kindle Loyalists
highlights.body: When you already live in the Kindle ecosystem and want color for comics or cookbooks, the Colorsoft delivers Kaleido 3 with Amazon's superior content store integration. Wireless charging and the 8-week battery life make this a polished package at $190.

highlights.title: Boox Palma 2 Earns Its Place For Power Users
highlights.body: A phone-sized Android e-reader that runs Kindle, Kobo, Libby, and any reading app you install. For readers who refuse to commit to a single ecosystem, the Palma 2 at $250 is the most flexible piece of e-ink hardware available.

zh-tw.commentary:
Kindle Paperwhite 2025 這週守住我心目中的第一名，分數來到 9.3。老實說，這個信心不是看規格表來的，是用過半年才講得出來。7 吋 300 ppi 螢幕單純看文字的話，目前沒有任何彩色閱讀器可以比，那個質感就是接近紙本墨水。

號稱 10 週的電池續航，我帶去海邊兩次加一次長程飛行都還沒充電，防水功能讓我躺浴缸看書也不會緊張。NT$5,200 配上現在春季促銷價，2026 年要把每塊錢花在閱讀體驗上，這台投資報酬率最高。

Kobo Libra Colour 升到 8.8 分。實體翻頁鍵在這個品類就是無敵的人體工學優勢，Kaleido 3 彩色螢幕看漫畫和雜誌 PDF 真的成熟好用了。Kobo 透過 OverDrive 的圖書館借閱整合比 Kindle 順手很多，常跑圖書館的讀者很有感。

Kindle Colorsoft 是 Kindle 生態系裡想要彩色的正解，無線充電用過就回不去了。Kobo Clara Colour 第四名，通勤族喜歡 6 吋小機身，攜帶最輕鬆。Boox Palma 2 還是給重度使用者最推薦的選擇，跑完整 Android，想裝什麼閱讀 App 都行。

Kobo Clara BW 這週微升到 7.8，純黑白純閱讀的話 NT$5,200 還是找不到對手。Boox Page 和 Remarkable 2 在自己的利基市場做得不錯，但一般閱讀用前四名就涵蓋幾乎所有情境了。

highlights.title: Kindle Paperwhite 2025 是最廣譜的推薦
highlights.body: 用了半年印證 10 週電池續航和 300 ppi 螢幕的清晰度。NT$5,200 加上春季促銷，這台每塊錢買到的閱讀價值在市場上沒有對手，9.3 分是靠長期可靠度賺來的。

highlights.title: Kobo Libra Colour 靠實體按鍵建立優勢
highlights.body: 實體翻頁鍵讓這台成為品類裡最符合人體工學的閱讀器。加上 Kaleido 3 彩色螢幕、OverDrive 圖書館整合、完整防水，NT$7,500 是想要圖書館借閱體驗的讀者首選。

highlights.title: Kindle Colorsoft 是 Kindle 鐵粉的彩色解
highlights.body: 已經住在 Kindle 生態系想要彩色看漫畫或食譜的，Colorsoft 用 Kaleido 3 配上 Amazon 強大的內容商店。無線充電加上 8 週電池續航，NT$6,200 是個成熟的整體方案。

highlights.title: Boox Palma 2 值得重度使用者買單
highlights.body: 手機尺寸的 Android 閱讀器，Kindle App、Kobo App、Libby App 想裝什麼都行。不想被單一生態系綁死的讀者，NT$8,200 買到的是市面上最自由的 E Ink 硬體。

references.title: Best E-Readers in 2026: 9 Top Picks from Kindle, Kobo and More
The Top 8 Best E-Readers to Buy for Spring 2026
We Tested the Best E-readers of 2026
Best E-Reader to Buy in 2026: Kindle vs Kobo vs Boox
The Best E-Readers We Tested in 2026: Kindle, Kobo, Boox and reMarkable

en.commentary:
The 2026 e-reader market has split into two clear eras: before and after color E Ink became genuinely good. The Kindle Paperwhite 2025 still wins overall because it gets the fundamentals right at $160. Its 300 ppi display is sharp enough to read in any lighting condition, the 10-week battery life means I charge it roughly once every two months, and Amazon's catalog depth is simply unmatched. For the reader who just wants to read books, this is the right answer.

For color, the Kobo Libra Colour earns second place by being the most complete package at a reasonable price. The Kaleido 3 display renders manga and illustrated nonfiction with real fidelity, the physical page-turn buttons are a genuine quality-of-life upgrade that Kindles still lack, and Kobo's library borrowing integration through OverDrive is far ahead of Amazon's approach. The Kindle Colorsoft takes third because it delivers Amazon's ecosystem with a color screen, but at $190 versus the Paperwhite's $160 and without physical buttons, the value equation is harder to justify unless you specifically need color in Kindle's walled garden.

The Boox Palma 2 is a category of one: a phone-sized E Ink device that runs Android and fits in any pocket. I carry mine on commutes when I do not want to bring a dedicated reader. The trade-off is battery life that measures in days rather than weeks, and a user interface that takes patience to configure. For the Boox Page and Kobo Clara BW, both serve specific niches well: the Page rewards power users who want open Android in a standard 7" form factor, and the Clara BW is the correct answer for anyone borrowing heavily from public libraries on a budget.

reMarkable 2 ranks last not because it fails at its primary purpose, but because its purpose is primarily note-taking, not reading. Its paper-like writing surface is the best in the industry, and PDF annotation is genuinely superior to anything else on this list. Readers who want a device primarily for books should look at the options ranked above it.

highlights.title: Kindle Paperwhite 2025 earns its top position through fundamentals, not novelty
highlights.body: At $160, the Paperwhite 2025 provides a 300 ppi glare-free display, a 10-week battery, and full waterproofing. Amazon's catalog includes millions of titles with seamless integration into the Kindle app ecosystem, meaning any book you purchase on your phone can continue on the device. There is no color display, no physical page-turn buttons, and no open app ecosystem — but for the reader who wants to read books reliably for weeks without thinking about charging or ecosystem management, nothing beats it at this price point.

highlights.title: Kobo Libra Colour is the strongest argument for switching from Kindle
highlights.body: The Libra Colour's physical page-turn buttons alone justify consideration for anyone who reads in bed or on commutes where touchscreen interaction feels clumsy. Add in the Kaleido 3 color display, OverDrive/Libby library integration that Amazon still has not matched, and a 40-day battery, and you have a device that beats the Kindle Paperwhite at every point of comparison except catalog breadth and Amazon ecosystem lock-in. Manga readers and illustrated nonfiction fans will find the color rendering genuinely useful rather than a gimmick.

highlights.title: Color E Ink is no longer a compromise in 2026
highlights.body: The Kaleido 3 technology used across the Kobo Libra Colour, Kobo Clara Colour, and Kindle Colorsoft renders color at 150 ppi — sharp enough for illustrations, manga panels, and highlighted annotations to read cleanly. Black-and-white text on all three devices remains at 300 ppi, so prose reading quality is identical to their monochrome equivalents. The color layer does introduce a slight contrast reduction visible in direct comparison, but in real reading conditions it is not noticeable. Any reader considering an upgrade in 2026 should be looking at color devices unless price is the binding constraint.

highlights.title: Boox Palma 2 solves the portability problem that dedicated e-readers cannot
highlights.body: A 7" Kindle Paperwhite is larger than a smartphone and smaller than a tablet, which makes it awkward to pocket. The Boox Palma 2 addresses this by shrinking a full Android E Ink device to phone dimensions. Running the Kindle app, Kobo app, Libby, and Pocket simultaneously on a single device is a genuine use case that dedicated e-readers cannot replicate. The compromise is real: battery life drops from weeks to days, and configuring an Android device for a pure reading experience requires effort. For the right user — someone who commutes and wants one less device — it is the correct choice.

highlights.title: reMarkable 2 is the best PDF annotation device, not the best e-reader
highlights.body: The reMarkable 2's CANVAS display is engineered to feel like writing on paper, and the latency on pen strokes is lower than any competing tablet at any price point. For academics, lawyers, or professionals who annotate PDFs daily, it is worth every dollar of the $299 price. The device earns a lower overall ranking here because the reading experience for books without annotation is limited: no backlight, no library integration, and a subscription required for advanced features. Evaluate it as a writing instrument that also reads PDFs, and the score would be significantly higher.

zh-tw.commentary:
2026 年電子書閱讀器市場有一條明確的分水嶺：彩色 E Ink 技術終於成熟到可以認真推薦的程度。這一切都圍繞 Kaleido 3 顯示技術展開，Kobo 和 Amazon 都在自家最新彩色機種上用這個面板，漫畫、插圖類書籍的閱讀體驗跟黑白螢幕相比是質的差距。

第一名是 Kindle Paperwhite 2025，原因很簡單：五千塊左右的進口行情，買到 10 週電池、防水機身、300 ppi 螢幕，還有 Amazon 最大的書庫，這個組合在同價位沒有對手。它沒有彩色螢幕、沒有實體翻頁鍵，但如果你主要就是看小說和非圖文書，這些都不是問題。

Kobo Libra Colour 排第二，是我認為最值得推薦給 Kindle 考慮換機的用戶。7500 塊左右的進口行情，你得到了彩色螢幕、實體翻頁鍵、防水、還有 Kobo 業界最好的圖書館借閱整合。台灣的讀者如果有在用 Libby 借電子書，Kobo 在這件事上的使用體驗就是比 Kindle 流暢。

第五名的 Boox Palma 2 是一個特殊的存在，手機大小的 E Ink 裝置跑完整 Android，Kindle App、Kobo App、電子漫畫、Pocket 全都能裝在同一台上。通勤族不想多帶一台閱讀器的話，這台可以認真考慮。電池從幾個星期縮短到幾天是真實的代價，但換來的便攜性也是真實的。

reMarkable 2 排最後，因為它根本就是一台筆記裝置，不是閱讀器。在所有 E Ink 裝置裡，它的書寫質感最接近紙張，PDF 批注功能是業界頂級。但沒有背光，書庫整合有限，主要功能是看書的人應該看上面其他選項。

highlights.title: Kindle Paperwhite 2025 的第一名建立在基本功上
highlights.body: 五千塊左右的進口行情，300 ppi 防眩光螢幕，10 週電池，防水機身，Amazon 幾百萬本書的書庫。這些條件放在一起，在同價位裡就是找不到對手。我自己用黑白版的 Paperwhite 最大的感受就是「不需要管它」，充一次電兩個月後才想到要再插線，這種使用體驗的日常感是其他平板或手機完全給不了的。

highlights.title: Kobo Libra Colour 有幾個 Kindle 給不了的東西
highlights.body: 實體翻頁鍵這件事，睡前躺著讀、捷運上單手拿著讀的時候，差異是明顯的。Kobo 的 OverDrive/Libby 圖書館借閱整合也讓台灣讀者方便很多，可以直接在裝置上借到台灣各縣市圖書館的電子書。再加上 Kaleido 3 彩色螢幕，漫畫和插圖書的閱讀體驗比黑白版好一個層次。7500 左右的進口行情比 Paperwhite 貴，但差價花在這幾個功能上是合理的。

highlights.title: 2026 年彩色 E Ink 閱讀品質已經夠用了
highlights.body: Kaleido 3 的彩色顯示在 150 ppi，文字部分維持 300 ppi 不變，所以看文字書的體驗跟黑白機種完全一樣。彩色的 150 ppi 看漫畫和插圖是夠清晰的，格格漫畫的文字框沒有問題，細節插圖在大多數使用場景下也不會模糊。跟幾年前第一代彩色 E Ink 相比，2026 年的產品真的可以推薦給一般讀者了。

highlights.title: Boox Palma 2 是通勤族值得認真看的選項
highlights.body: 7 吋閱讀器放口袋裡很尷尬，這是所有專用閱讀器的先天限制。Boox Palma 2 用手機大小的機身跑完整 Android，把這個問題解掉了。我通勤的時候帶這台而不是帶 7 吋的閱讀器，Kindle App 和 Kobo App 都在上面，想看哪本切換一下就好。電池從幾個星期掉到幾天這件事需要有心理準備，但便攜性帶來的日常使用頻率提升是真實的。

highlights.title: reMarkable 2 是最好的 PDF 批注裝置
highlights.body: reMarkable 2 的書寫體驗在所有 E Ink 裝置裡是最接近真實紙張的，筆觸延遲控制得非常好，幾乎感覺不出來是在電子螢幕上寫字。如果你的主要使用場景是批注學術論文、合約文件、法律條文，9800 左右的進口行情對這個功能來說是值得的。排名放在最後是因為這份排行榜的評分以閱讀體驗為主，reMarkable 2 在書籍閱讀功能的完整性上確實是這八台裡最有限的。

references.title: The Top 8 Best e-Readers to buy for Spring 2026
E-notebooks and e-Readers are getting more expensive in 2026
The best color e-readers for 2026, tested and reviewed

en.commentary: The Kindle Paperwhite 2025 is the correct answer for most readers, and I won't hedge on that. The combination of a 7-inch 300 PPI display, six-week battery life, and the Amazon ecosystem's depth in book selection is a package no competitor has matched at the price. Two notable market events this week: the Kindle Scribe Colorsoft expanded availability to the UK and Germany on April 8th, and Amazon is reportedly planning a cheaper Scribe variant without a frontlight for the near term. E-reader prices industrywide are trending upward in 2026 due to RAM and CPU cost increases, which makes the current Paperwhite pricing look particularly good while it holds. The Kobo Libra Colour earns second through genuine openness — EPUB support, library integration, and a physical page-turn button that serious readers actually prefer. Kobo is reportedly preparing a Clara Colour 2, Libra Colour 2, and potentially a Kaleido 3 color Elipsa for April or May announcement. The BOOX Palma 2 remains the only real phone-sized option with Android app access, which makes it a different product category more than a competing e-reader.

highlights.title: Kindle Paperwhite 2025 Remains the Volume Leader for Good Reason
highlights.body: At its price point, the 7-inch Paperwhite delivers 300 PPI resolution, 6-week battery life, and access to the world's largest ebook catalog. Amazon's ecosystem lock-in is a real consideration, but for readers who buy more than a few books per year, the library depth is genuinely hard to walk away from.

highlights.title: Kindle Scribe Colorsoft Expanding Internationally This Week
highlights.body: The Kindle Scribe Colorsoft became available in the UK and Germany on April 8, 2026, extending Amazon's color writing tablet beyond North American availability. A cheaper Scribe variant without a frontlight is reportedly planned for the next month or two, which could shake up the large-screen e-reader market.

highlights.title: Kobo Libra Colour: The Right Choice for Open Standards
highlights.body: EPUB native support, OverDrive library integration, and physical page-turn buttons make the Libra Colour the rational pick for readers who want format flexibility and library access without committing to Amazon's ecosystem. Kobo's upcoming lineup refreshes suggest colour display technology improvements are coming within months.

highlights.title: Price Increases Are Coming Industry-Wide
highlights.body: RAM and CPU costs are elevated across the supply chain in 2026, and e-reader manufacturers are not immune. Multiple brands are expected to raise prices on new models. If you are on the fence about an upgrade, buying current-generation at existing prices is the right move before new releases reset the price floor upward.

zh-tw.commentary: Kindle Paperwhite 2025 是大多數讀者的正確答案，我不打算在這個判斷上模稜兩可。7 吋 300 PPI 螢幕、六週電池續航、加上 Amazon 書庫的深度，這個組合在這個價位沒有對手能複製。本週有兩個市場消息值得關注：Kindle Scribe Colorsoft 在 4 月 8 日開始在英國和德國販售，Amazon 也傳出計劃在近期推出一款無前光照明的平價 Scribe 版本。2026 年電子書閱讀器的全行業售價因為 RAM 和 CPU 成本上漲而走高，現在的 Paperwhite 定價反而顯得格外划算，趁現在入手比等新品更合理。Kobo Libra Colour 靠真正的開放性拿下第二，EPUB 原生支援、圖書館整合、加上實體翻頁按鍵，這些是認真的讀者真正需要的功能。Kobo 傳出即將在四五月公布 Clara Colour 2、Libra Colour 2、以及可能採用 Kaleido 3 彩色螢幕的 Elipsa。BOOX Palma 2 還是那個獨一無二的手機尺寸 Android 閱讀器，它更像是另一個產品類別而不是競爭對手。

highlights.title: Kindle Paperwhite 2025：市場主流選擇有其道理
highlights.body: 在它的售價範圍，Paperwhite 提供 300 PPI 解析度、六週電池、以及全球最大電子書目錄的訪問。Amazon 的生態系綁定確實是要考慮的因素，但對每年買超過幾本書的讀者來說，書庫的深度優勢很難捨棄。

highlights.title: Kindle Scribe Colorsoft 本週擴展到英國和德國
highlights.body: 4 月 8 日，Scribe Colorsoft 開始在英德兩國販售，Amazon 的彩色書寫平板延伸出北美市場。傳出的無前光照明平價 Scribe 版本可能在一兩個月內推出，大螢幕電子閱讀器市場的格局可能因此改變。

highlights.title: Kobo Libra Colour：開放格式用戶的正確選擇
highlights.body: 原生 EPUB 支援、OverDrive 圖書館整合、實體翻頁按鍵，這些讓 Libra Colour 成為想要格式彈性和圖書館借閱又不想綁 Amazon 的讀者的理性選擇。Kobo 即將更新的產品線暗示彩色顯示技術在幾個月內會有改進。

highlights.title: 全行業漲價趨勢正在醞釀
highlights.body: 2026 年 RAM 和 CPU 成本在整個供應鏈都處於高位，電子書閱讀器廠商也無法免疫。多個品牌預計會在新機型上調漲售價。如果你正在考慮升級，趁現有定價買進比等新品上市後重置價格底線更划算。

references.title: Best E-Readers in 2026: Kindle, Kobo & More Tested & Ranked
E-notebooks and e-Readers are getting more expensive in 2026
The best color e-readers for 2026, tested and reviewed

en.commentary:
The e-reader rankings hold steady today. The Kindle Paperwhite 2025 remains the correct answer for most readers — a 300 ppi glare-free display, 10-week battery, and the depth of Amazon's catalog is a combination no competitor matches at the price point. The industry-wide price trend upward noted earlier this week continues to make current-generation pricing look favorable for buyers who are on the fence.

Kobo is reportedly preparing a significant product refresh for Q2 2026, with the Clara Colour 2, Libra Colour 2, and a possible Kaleido 3 color Elipsa in development. This upcoming lineup refresh means Kobo's current ranking positions — Libra Colour at second, Clara Colour at fourth, Clara BW at sixth — may see competitive revision once those devices land. For buyers who want Kobo today rather than waiting, the current Libra Colour is still a strong recommendation: physical page-turn buttons, OverDrive library integration, and Kaleido 3 color in one package.

The Kindle Scribe Colorsoft expanded availability to the UK and Germany on April 8th, extending the color writing tablet beyond North American markets. This positions the Scribe more competitively for the international audience. The reMarkable 2 holds ninth as a note-taking device that also reads PDFs, not a reading-first device — that positioning is unchanged.

highlights.title: Kindle Paperwhite 2025 remains the best e-reader for most people
highlights.body: No market event this week changes the core argument for the Paperwhite 2025: 300 ppi, 10-week battery, and Amazon's catalog depth at a price under $160. The industry-wide pricing pressure noted earlier this week makes the current price look better, not worse, relative to what's coming. For readers who primarily buy books and want the simplest possible reading device, this remains the first recommendation.

highlights.title: Kobo's upcoming product refreshes may shift the middle of this ranking
highlights.body: Clara Colour 2, Libra Colour 2, and a potential Kaleido 3 Elipsa are reportedly targeted at Q2 2026 announcement. If Kobo ships a Libra-class device with improved color display and the same open ecosystem features, the current second-place position held by the original Libra Colour may need recalibration. Buyers who want to stay ahead of the refresh should note that Kobo typically does not raise prices significantly at revision, so waiting for new models carries low risk.

highlights.title: Kindle Scribe Colorsoft is now available internationally
highlights.body: Amazon expanded Scribe Colorsoft availability to the UK and Germany on April 8, 2026, making the color writing tablet accessible beyond North America for the first time. A cheaper Scribe variant without a frontlight is still reportedly in development. For readers and note-takers who want Amazon's ecosystem in a large-format writing device, the international availability removes the import friction that existed previously.

highlights.title: Color E Ink is worth considering for any 2026 upgrade
highlights.body: The Kaleido 3 technology across the Kobo Libra Colour, Clara Colour, and Kindle Colorsoft renders color at 150 ppi while maintaining 300 ppi for text. For manga, illustrated nonfiction, and annotated reading, the color layer provides a real functional improvement over monochrome. The contrast reduction visible in direct comparison is not noticeable in normal reading conditions. Any buyer who reads more than prose fiction should evaluate color devices before defaulting to black-and-white.

zh-tw.commentary:
電子書閱讀器的排名今天維持穩定，沒有重大產品發布或市場事件改變現有格局。Kindle Paperwhite 2025 繼續是大多數讀者的正確答案，300 ppi 螢幕、10 週電池、Amazon 書庫深度，這個組合在這個售價沒有競品可以取代。本週稍早提到的全行業漲價趨勢，讓現在的 Paperwhite 售價看起來更划算，趁現在入手比等新品上市更合理的判斷依然有效。

Kobo 傳出在 2026 年第二季有重大產品更新，Clara Colour 2、Libra Colour 2、以及可能搭載 Kaleido 3 的 Elipsa 都在開發中。這意味著現在 Kobo 在這份名單的排名，Libra Colour 第二、Clara Colour 第四、Clara BW 第六，在新品發布後可能需要重新評估。對現在就想買 Kobo 的讀者，現有的 Libra Colour 還是強力推薦，實體翻頁鍵、OverDrive 圖書館整合、Kaleido 3 彩色，這個組合的價值不會因為新品快來而消失。

Kindle Scribe Colorsoft 在 4 月 8 日開始在英國和德國銷售，擴展到北美以外的市場。reMarkable 2 繼續是筆記裝置而不是閱讀器的定位，排名不變。

highlights.title: Kindle Paperwhite 2025 繼續是大多數讀者的最佳選擇
highlights.body: 本週沒有任何市場事件改變 Paperwhite 2025 的核心論據：300 ppi、10 週電池、Amazon 書庫深度，售價不到 160 美元。本週的全行業漲價趨勢讓現在的售價看起來更好，不是更差。主要購買電子書、想要最簡單閱讀裝置的讀者，這還是第一推薦。

highlights.title: Kobo 即將到來的產品更新可能改變這份名單的中段排名
highlights.body: Clara Colour 2、Libra Colour 2、和可能的 Kaleido 3 Elipsa 據報瞄準 2026 年第二季公布。如果 Kobo 推出改良彩色螢幕的 Libra 等級新品，現在 Libra Colour 的第二名位置可能需要重新校正。Kobo 改款通常不大幅漲價，等新品風險不高，但想現在就用彩色閱讀器的人，現有 Libra Colour 的功能組合依然值得購買。

highlights.title: Kindle Scribe Colorsoft 現在可以在英德兩國購買了
highlights.body: Amazon 在 4 月 8 日把 Scribe Colorsoft 的銷售擴展到英國和德國，這是彩色書寫平板首次在北美以外正式販售。傳出的無前光照明平價 Scribe 版本仍在開發中。對台灣讀者而言，透過英國亞馬遜代購的管道現在開通了。

highlights.title: 2026 年任何升級計劃都應該考慮彩色 E Ink
highlights.body: Kaleido 3 技術在彩色部分達到 150 ppi，文字維持 300 ppi，日常閱讀時彩色層帶來的對比度下降在正常使用條件下不明顯。漫畫、插圖書、附彩色標注的閱讀，彩色螢幕提供真實的功能改善。任何主要閱讀內容超過純文字小說的讀者，在 2026 年升級前都應該評估彩色機種。

references.title: Best ereaders in 2026: 9 top ebook readers
The Top 8 Best e-Readers to buy for Spring 2026

en.commentary: Kindle Paperwhite 2025 holds the top position, and the argument for it centers on the complete package: the 7-inch 300ppi display with flush glass front, IPX8 waterproofing, automatic warm light adjustment, and Amazon's book ecosystem create a reading experience no other e-reader matches at the same price. The Kobo Libra Colour at rank 2 is my recommendation for anyone who reads comics, manga, or illustrated non-fiction — the E INK Kaleido 3 color display renders illustration-heavy content in a way the monochrome Paperwhite cannot. Kindle Colorsoft at rank 3 earns its spot as Amazon's own color entry, offering the ecosystem advantages of Kindle with color capability. Kobo is expected to release new hardware in April–May 2026, with a color Elipsa expected to compete with the Kindle Scribe. This potential release keeps the e-reader market dynamic heading into spring, but until hardware ships and reviews land, rankings stay unchanged.

highlights.title: Kindle Paperwhite 2025 Is the Right Choice for Most Readers
highlights.body: Three hundred ppi pixel density on a 7-inch screen, flush glass front for comfortable grip, IPX8 waterproofing, and access to Amazon's 12-million-title library. The $139 starting price is the best value for dedicated e-reading I can name. If you primarily read prose — novels, non-fiction, long-form journalism — this is the recommendation without hesitation.

highlights.title: Kobo Libra Colour Is the Only Good Argument for Color E-Ink Right Now
highlights.body: E INK Kaleido 3 delivers colors that previous generations couldn't — it's still not vivid like a tablet, but for manga panels, illustrated children's books, and color-coded non-fiction, the rendering is meaningful. The Libra Colour also has physical page-turn buttons, which remains a real ergonomic advantage over touchscreen-only designs during long reading sessions.

highlights.title: Kobo's Anticipated Color Elipsa Could Reshape the High End
highlights.body: Good e-Reader reports Kobo is likely to launch a color Elipsa in April–May 2026 to compete with the Kindle Scribe Colorsoft. A color screen in a large-format note-taking e-reader would be a meaningful product, and if it lands before summer, the ranking at the upper tier will need re-evaluation. Watch for launch reviews closely.

zh-tw.commentary:
Kindle Paperwhite 2025 排第一名，七吋 300ppi 螢幕、前蓋玻璃平整設計、IPX8 防水、自動色溫調整，加上 Amazon 的書庫生態，組合起來是這個定價帶最完整的閱讀體驗，目前沒有對手在這個價位做到同樣的整體。

Kobo Libra Colour 排第二，對於喜歡漫畫、繪本、有插圖的書的讀者來說是合理的換算，E INK Kaleido 3 的色彩效果比前幾代進步很多，雖然跟平板比還是有差距，但對彩色插圖的還原已經有意義了。另外，Kobo 預計在四月到五月推出新款彩色 Elipsa，如果成真，高端市場的排名可能需要重新評估。

highlights.title: Kindle Paperwhite 2025 是純文字閱讀的最強選擇
highlights.body: 七吋 300ppi、防水、色溫自動調整，台灣售價約 NT$4,490 起，這個價格拿到這樣的螢幕素質和生態系支援，對主要讀小說、非虛構、長文的讀者來說沒有更好的選擇。Amazon 的書庫在繁體中文內容上雖然不如實體書店完整，但對英文閱讀者幾乎是無限量的。

highlights.title: Kobo Libra Colour 是彩色電子墨水目前唯一好理由
highlights.body: Kaleido 3 的色彩品質在第三代終於到了「有意義」的程度，漫畫分格、插圖教科書、兒童繪本這類內容值得用彩色機來讀。實體翻頁按鍵的人體工學優勢在長時間閱讀時也是真實存在的，觸控螢幕翻頁沒法取代按鍵那種確定感。

highlights.title: Kobo 新款彩色 Elipsa 即將上市，高端市場值得關注
highlights.body: Good e-Reader 報導 Kobo 可能在四到五月推出大尺寸彩色電子閱讀器，直接對標 Kindle Scribe Colorsoft。如果這款機器上市評測結果好，高端筆記功能加彩色螢幕的組合可能改變這個榜單的上半段格局，到時候再來更新。

references.title: Best E-Readers 2026: Kindle, Kobo, and BOOX Compared
Best E-Reader 2026: Top Devices for Reading Books Digitally

en.commentary:
The Kindle Paperwhite 2025 stays at the top of this list for the same reason it earned the position: it gets the core reading experience right in a way that no competitor has displaced. The 7-inch 300 PPI display with adjustable warm light, the 12-week battery life in real-world use, the 16GB of storage, and the IPX8 waterproofing add up to a device that disappears in your hand and lets you focus on the text. At $139.99, it costs less than the Kobo Libra Colour and significantly less than the Kindle Colorsoft — and for readers who stick to books without heavy use of comics, manga, or illustrated content, the monochrome display is not a compromise.

Kobo Libra Colour at rank 2 is the right pick for anyone who wants physical page-turn buttons, color display for comics and illustrated books, and freedom from Amazon's ecosystem. The 7-inch E Ink Kaleido 3 display renders color at 150 PPI — readable for comics but not as sharp as a phone screen. The physical buttons eliminate the finger repositioning required by touchscreen-only devices during extended reading sessions.

Kindle Colorsoft at rank 3 delivers the best color E Ink display in Amazon's lineup. The Kaleido 3 panel with Amazon's color calibration renders book covers and illustrated content more accurately than the Kobo's version. The tradeoff is price — at $279.99, it costs twice the Paperwhite — and the lack of physical buttons that Kobo users value. Kobo Clara BW at rank 6 remains the best budget entry point in the E Ink market at $109.99.

highlights.title: Kindle Paperwhite 2025 is still the correct answer for most readers
highlights.body: Twelve weeks of battery life in typical use means a Paperwhite user charges their device roughly four times a year. No color display E Ink device comes close — the Kindle Colorsoft manages around 6 weeks and the Kobo Libra Colour around 8. The 300 PPI display renders body text with the same sharpness as any competitor at any price. For someone who reads books without a heavy focus on comics or illustrated content, the Paperwhite is the best reading device available at any price, and at $139.99 it does not ask you to pay a premium for that verdict.

highlights.title: Kobo Libra Colour's physical buttons are the most underrated feature in this category
highlights.body: Touchscreen-only e-readers require you to move your thumb to the screen center to turn pages, which interrupts the grip position during extended reading. Physical page-turn buttons let you hold the device naturally with one hand and advance pages with a thumb resting on the edge. After six hours of reading, that ergonomic difference is significant. Kobo's OverDrive integration also provides seamless access to library loans without requiring a third-party app, which Amazon still cannot match natively.

highlights.title: BOOX Palma 2 occupies a category of its own as an Android e-reader phone
highlights.body: The BOOX Palma 2 runs Android 13 and supports the Google Play Store, which means any Android reading app — Kindle, Kobo, Libby, Pocket, Moon+ Reader — works on its 6.13-inch E Ink display. It also functions as a phone with a SIM card slot. This is a different device philosophy from dedicated e-readers: more versatile but with shorter battery life (around 5-7 days), higher price ($279), and a smaller display than the Paperwhite or Libra Colour. For readers who want a single pocket device for both reading and light phone use, nothing else does it.

zh-tw.commentary:
Kindle Paperwhite 2025 繼續排第一，理由沒有改變：它把核心閱讀體驗做到沒有競爭對手能取代的水準。7 吋 300 PPI 螢幕加可調暖光、12 週的真實使用電池壽命、16GB 儲存空間、IPX8 防水，這四項組合出一台能讓你忘記手上拿著什麼設備的閱讀器。139.99 美元的售價比 Kobo Libra Colour 便宜，也遠低於 Kindle Colorsoft，對於主要閱讀純文字書籍、不需要大量漫畫或彩色插圖的讀者，黑白螢幕根本不是妥協。

Kobo Libra Colour 排第二，適合想要實體翻頁按鍵、彩色螢幕看漫畫、又不想被 Amazon 生態綁住的用戶。7 吋 E Ink Kaleido 3 彩色螢幕的解析度 150 PPI，看漫畫夠用但不像手機螢幕那麼銳利。實體按鍵讓長時間閱讀不需要把拇指移到螢幕中央翻頁，這個人體工學差異在連讀幾小時後非常明顯。

Kindle Colorsoft 排第三，是 Amazon 家族裡彩色 E Ink 螢幕最好的選擇，書封和彩色插圖的顯示準確度超過 Kobo 的版本。代價是 279.99 美元的售價是 Paperwhite 的兩倍，加上缺少 Kobo 用戶珍視的實體按鍵。Kobo Clara BW 排第六，109.99 美元是 E Ink 閱讀器市場裡最佳的入門門票。

highlights.title: Kindle Paperwhite 2025 對大多數讀者來說依然是正確的選擇
highlights.body: 一般使用下 12 週的電池壽命意味著 Paperwhite 用戶一年大約只需要充電四次。沒有任何彩色 E Ink 設備能接近這個數字，Kindle Colorsoft 大約 6 週，Kobo Libra Colour 大約 8 週。300 PPI 螢幕渲染正文的清晰度和任何價位的競品一樣。對於主要閱讀文字書籍的讀者，Paperwhite 是任何價位下最好的閱讀設備，139.99 美元的售價也不需要你為這個結論支付溢價。

highlights.title: Kobo Libra Colour 的實體按鍵是這個類別裡最被低估的功能
highlights.body: 純觸控閱讀器需要把拇指移到螢幕中央才能翻頁，打斷了長時間閱讀時的持握姿勢。實體翻頁鍵讓你單手自然握持設備，拇指停在邊緣就能換頁。六小時閱讀下來，這個人體工學差異非常有感。Kobo 的 OverDrive 整合也讓圖書館電子書借閱無縫銜接，不需要安裝第三方 App，Amazon 的 Kindle App 在原生體驗上目前還做不到這點。

highlights.title: BOOX Palma 2 是一個獨特的類別：Android 閱讀手機
highlights.body: BOOX Palma 2 執行 Android 13 並支援 Google Play 商店，意味著所有 Android 閱讀 App，包括 Kindle、Kobo、Libby、Pocket、Moon+ Reader，全部可以在它的 6.13 吋 E Ink 螢幕上運作。它也支援 SIM 卡槽，可以作為手機使用。這是和傳統閱讀器完全不同的設計哲學：更多功能，但電池壽命縮短到約 5-7 天，售價 279 美元，螢幕比 Paperwhite 或 Libra Colour 更小。對於想要一台口袋設備同時滿足閱讀和輕度通話需求的人，目前沒有其他選項。

references.title: Best ereaders in 2026: 9 top ebook readers tested and picked by an expert
The Top 8 Best e-Readers to buy for Spring 2026
Amazon discontinuing older Kindle e-readers from online bookstore
What new e-readers will Kobo release in 2026?

en.commentary:
Two market developments this week deserve direct attention in any honest e-reader ranking. First, Amazon has announced the end of online bookstore connectivity for first-generation Kindle Paperwhite and several other models over 14 years old — devices that no longer support current SSL/TLS certificate standards. This doesn't affect any model in the current ranking, but it's a reminder that e-reader purchases are ultimately ecosystem commitments with long tail risks.

Second, Good e-Reader is reporting that Kobo is likely to release new hardware in April or May 2026, potentially including a Libra 2 Colour and Clara Colour 2. If that happens, the current Kobo Libra Colour at second place would face a successor within weeks. I'm not adjusting the ranking on a rumor, but prospective Kobo buyers should be aware that new hardware may be imminent.

The Kindle Paperwhite 2025 holds the top position because it represents the best overall balance of reading experience, ecosystem depth, and value in the e-reader market. The 7-inch Carta 1300 display with warm light and the combination of Amazon's book catalog, Audible integration, and library borrowing through Libby creates a reading platform that Kobo matches on hardware but trails on content ecosystem. Kobo Libra Colour at second offers the best color display reading experience without the Amazon ecosystem lock-in — the E Ink Kaleido 3 panel handles comic book art and magazine layouts meaningfully better than any black-and-white alternative.

highlights.title: Kindle Paperwhite 2025 leads because no competitor matches the Amazon ecosystem depth
highlights.body: The 2025 Paperwhite's hardware is excellent — 7-inch Carta 1300 display, warm light, waterproofing, and six weeks of battery life — but the decisive advantage is Amazon's content infrastructure. The combination of Kindle's book catalog, Audible audiobook integration, and Libby library borrowing creates a reading ecosystem that Kobo hardware can run on but can't replicate. For readers who want frictionless access to the widest possible selection of books, the Paperwhite's ecosystem advantage is the most consequential factor in the purchase decision.

highlights.title: Kobo hardware releases in April or May 2026 could reshape this ranking within weeks
highlights.body: Good e-Reader is reporting credible expectations of new Kobo hardware in the coming weeks, potentially including successors to the Libra Colour and Clara Colour. Kobo has positioned color e-readers as its strategic direction, and an updated Libra with Kaleido improvements would strengthen the already-competitive second-place ranking. If you're considering a Kobo purchase, waiting until these potential releases are confirmed or denied is a reasonable decision.

highlights.title: Boox Palma 2 remains the best pocket-sized Android e-reader for power users
highlights.body: The Palma 2's phone-sized form factor and full Android OS make it a category of one among pure e-readers. Access to Kindle, Kobo, Libby, and Google Play Store simultaneously removes any ecosystem lock-in concern, and the E Ink display is large enough for extended reading while small enough for one-handed use. The tradeoff is battery life that runs roughly half the duration of dedicated Kobo and Kindle devices, and a higher price that only makes sense if the Android versatility and multi-ecosystem access are features you'll actively use.

zh-tw.commentary:
這週有兩個市場動態值得直接說明。第一，Amazon 宣布第一代 Kindle Paperwhite 等超過 14 年的舊款將無法再連接網路書店購書，因為這些裝置不再支援目前的 SSL/TLS 憑證標準。這不影響目前排行榜上的任何機型，但提醒你電子閱讀器的購買本質上是生態系的長期綁定。

第二，Good e-Reader 報導 Kobo 可能在 4 月或 5 月推出新硬體，可能包括 Libra 2 Colour 和 Clara Colour 2。如果成真，目前排第二的 Kobo Libra Colour 幾週內就會面臨繼任者。排名不因為傳言調整，但打算買 Kobo 的讀者應該知道新硬體可能即將到來。

Kindle Paperwhite 2025 排第一是因為閱讀體驗、生態系深度和性價比的整體平衡在這個市場找不到對手。Amazon 書庫、Audible 有聲書整合和 Libby 圖書館借閱共同組成的閱讀平台，是 Kobo 硬體做得到但內容生態系無法複製的優勢。Kobo Libra Colour 排第二的彩色電子紙閱讀體驗是目前黑白機型無法取代的，Kaleido 3 面板處理漫畫和雜誌版面的效果明顯更好。

highlights.title: Kindle Paperwhite 2025 排第一，Amazon 生態系深度是決定性因素
highlights.body: Paperwhite 2025 的硬體很出色，7 吋 Carta 1300 螢幕加暖光加防水，六週電池，但真正的決定性優勢是 Amazon 的內容基礎設施。Kindle 書庫加 Audible 整合加 Libby 圖書館借閱，建立起一個 Kobo 硬體能執行但無法複製的閱讀生態系。對想要最輕鬆取得最多書目的讀者，這個生態系優勢是採購決策裡最重要的因素。

highlights.title: Kobo 4 到 5 月可能推出新硬體，這份排名幾週後可能需要更新
highlights.body: Good e-Reader 報導 Kobo 近期推出新機的可能性很高，可能包括 Libra Colour 和 Clara Colour 的後繼機型。Kobo 已經把彩色電子紙定為策略方向，更新版 Libra 如果有 Kaleido 改進，會讓已經很有競爭力的第二名位置更穩固。如果你現在打算買 Kobo，稍等幾週確認新機消息再做決定是合理的選擇。

highlights.title: Boox Palma 2 是需要跨平台書庫的重度用戶唯一的口袋型選擇
highlights.body: 手機尺寸加全 Android 系統讓 Palma 2 在純電子閱讀器市場裡自成一類。Kindle、Kobo、Libby 和 Google Play 同時使用，完全沒有生態系綁定的顧慮，電子紙螢幕夠大可以長時間閱讀又夠小能單手操作。代價是電池續航大約只有 Kobo 和 Kindle 的一半，售價也更高，只有在 Android 彈性和多平台書庫存取對你是真正需要的功能時才值得考慮。

references.title: Amazon Kindle Scribe rolling out internationally
Best ereaders in 2026 tested and picked by experts
Best e-readers of 2026, tried and tested

en.commentary: The e-reader market in April 2026 has two significant updates worth noting. Amazon has begun rolling out the new Kindle Scribe internationally, nearly four months after US launch, which expands its addressable market substantially. The Kindle Colorsoft, praised for polished design and functional color that enhances reading and basic note-taking, now holds third position with its well-received combination of color display quality and Kindle ecosystem access. The Kobo Libra Colour continues to hold second as the best per-dollar value in the market, particularly for readers who want a physical page-turn button and color display without committing to the Amazon ecosystem. The Onyx Boox update to version 4.2 for the Note Air 5C and Go 10.3 Gen 2 Lumi adds meaningful new features for power users who use e-ink for more than reading. PocketBook's Overdrive Libby integration on the Era and Verse Pro is a genuine library access improvement for Kobo alternatives. The mini e-reader segment is growing in 2026 with new brands entering, but none yet reach the quality threshold for inclusion in this ranking.

highlights.title: Kindle Scribe International Rollout Expands Its Market Reach
highlights.body: The Kindle Scribe 2025's international rollout nearly four months after the US launch makes it accessible to a broader audience. The Colorsoft display with polished design and practical note-taking integration makes this the best large-format e-reader for buyers in the Amazon ecosystem. At eighth in this ranking, the Scribe's portability limitation, its size and weight exceed comfortable single-hand reading use, keeps it from ranking higher against the more balanced options above it.

highlights.title: Kobo Libra Colour Holds the Best Per-Dollar Value Position
highlights.body: Physical page-turn buttons, color E Ink Kaleido display, IPX8 waterproofing, and an open ecosystem that supports multiple library services make the Libra Colour the most complete feature set at its price. Independent testing consistently rates it the highest value e-reader in the market. For readers who don't want to be locked into Amazon's Kindle ecosystem, the Libra Colour is the correct starting recommendation.

highlights.title: Onyx Boox Version 4.2 Strengthens the Platform for Power Users
highlights.body: The 4.2 update for the Note Air 5C and Go 10.3 Gen 2 adds features that matter for users who use their Boox devices as note-taking tools and document readers rather than pure fiction readers. The Android-based open platform already differentiates Boox from Kindle and Kobo; firmware updates that add capability are meaningful for the power-user segment that these devices target.

highlights.title: Mini E-Reader Segment Growing but Not Yet Competitive at the Top
highlights.body: 2026 is seeing new brands enter the mini e-reader space with pocket-sized form factors targeting distraction-free reading, with the Xteink X4 representing this trend. The segment is growing in volume but not yet in quality. Existing readers in this ranking, particularly the Kobo Clara BW and Boox Page, remain the correct compact recommendations until newer mini-format entrants demonstrate equivalent build quality and ecosystem support.

zh-tw.commentary: 2026 年四月的電子書閱讀器市場有兩個值得注意的進展。Amazon 開始在美國以外地區推出新款 Kindle Scribe，距離美國上市將近四個月。Kindle Colorsoft 以精緻設計和實用彩色顯示持續獲得好評，在排行上守住第三。Kobo Libra Colour 以最佳性價比繼續排在第二，特別適合不想被 Amazon 生態系鎖住、想要實體翻頁按鍵加彩色顯示的讀者。Onyx Boox 推出 Note Air 5C 和 Go 10.3 Gen 2 的 4.2 韌體更新，對使用 Boox 做筆記和文件閱讀的重度用戶是有意義的改善。PocketBook Era 和 Verse Pro 加入 Overdrive Libby 圖書館存取功能，讓這兩台對偶爾借閱圖書館電子書的讀者更有吸引力。迷你閱讀器市場在 2026 年有新品牌進入，但目前都還沒達到這個排行的品質門檻。

highlights.title: Kindle Scribe 國際推出擴大了它的市場
highlights.body: Kindle Scribe 2025 在美國上市近四個月後才開始國際推出，現在台灣等市場的讀者可以直接購買。Colorsoft 彩色顯示和記事功能整合讓它成為 Amazon 生態系用戶的最佳大尺寸閱讀器選擇。排在第八是因為它的尺寸和重量超過舒適單手閱讀的範圍，對純閱讀需求來說不夠方便。

highlights.title: Kobo Libra Colour 的性價比在這個類別仍然最好
highlights.body: 實體翻頁按鍵、彩色 Kaleido 電子墨水、IPX8 防水、支援多個圖書館借閱服務的開放生態系，這個功能組合在這個價位沒有競爭對手。如果你不想被 Amazon Kindle 生態系鎖住，Libra Colour 是最誠實的入門建議。

highlights.title: Onyx Boox 4.2 韌體更新對重度用戶有實際改善
highlights.body: Note Air 5C 和 Go 10.3 Gen 2 的 4.2 更新新增的功能對把 Boox 當作筆記工具和文件閱讀器的重度用戶有意義。Boox 的 Android 開放平台本來就是和 Kindle、Kobo 的差異化所在，韌體更新持續在這個方向加強，讓重度用戶更有理由選擇 Boox 系列。

highlights.title: 迷你閱讀器市場在成長但還不夠成熟
highlights.body: 2026 年有新品牌進入迷你口袋型閱讀器市場，Xteink X4 代表這個趨勢。市場在成長，但目前的品質還沒達到這個排行的標準。現有的緊湊型推薦，Kobo Clara BW 和 Boox Page，在新款迷你格式機型能展示對等的做工品質和生態系支援之前，仍然是最正確的緊湊型選擇。

references.title: Best ereaders in 2026: tested and picked by an expert
The Top 8 Best e-Readers to buy for Spring 2026
What new e-readers will Kobo release in 2026?

en.commentary: The Kindle Paperwhite 2025 is the best e-reader for most people, and April 2026 confirms that position hasn't changed. Its 7-inch display, warm light, waterproof build, and integration with Amazon's book ecosystem create a reading experience that is more refined than any previous Paperwhite. The Kobo Libra Colour follows closely, offering the best open-ecosystem alternative with color e-ink and physical page-turn buttons that many dedicated readers strongly prefer. For readers who want color without paying Kindle Colorsoft prices, the Kobo Clara Colour provides most of the color capability at a significantly lower price. April 2026 brings word that Amazon's Kindle Scribe Colorsoft has sold out and deliveries have been delayed to mid-April, which confirms strong demand for the color annotation market but doesn't change its rank. Looking ahead, Kobo is expected to announce new color models later this year including a Libra 2 Colour and Clara Colour 2.

highlights.title: Kindle Paperwhite 2025 Still Leads on Ecosystem and Build Quality
highlights.body: The combination of Amazon's library depth, the fastest page-turn response in the category, and a waterproof build at $160 creates the best value proposition in e-readers. The 300 PPI display with adjustable warm light covers every reading environment well, and the Signature Edition variant adds wireless charging and more storage for those who want it.

highlights.title: Kobo Libra Colour Is the Best for Open-Format Readers
highlights.body: The physical page-turn buttons on the Libra Colour are not a compromise, they are a preference. For readers who spend hours at a time with a book, the tactile feedback of a physical button beats any swipe gesture. The Kobo ecosystem also supports EPUB directly, which matters for anyone with a personal library outside Amazon's walled garden.

highlights.title: Boox Palma 2 Is the Right Tool for Android Power Users
highlights.body: The Palma 2's Android base gives it capabilities no Kindle or Kobo can match: full app support, cloud reading apps, and a phone-sized form factor that fits in a jacket pocket. The 9.5 portability score reflects real-world usability. For anyone who wants a dedicated reading device that also runs Libby, Kindle, and Audible simultaneously, this is the answer.

zh-tw.commentary: Kindle Paperwhite 2025 在四月依然是我推薦給大多數人的電子書閱讀器。7 吋螢幕、暖光、防水機身，加上 Amazon 書庫，這個組合在 NT$4,990 左右的價格區間找不到更完整的對手。Kobo Libra Colour 緊追在後，實體翻頁鍵是很多重度閱讀者的堅持，我完全理解，加上支援 EPUB 讓自己的書庫可以自由匯入，這對不想被 Amazon 綁死的使用者是個很重要的優勢。Kindle Colorsoft 最近庫存被掃光、延到四月中旬才能出貨，代表彩色電子墨水需求確實強勁。Kobo 預計今年稍晚會發表新款彩色機型，有在等待的讀者可以關注。

highlights.title: Kindle Paperwhite 2025 以生態系和做工拿下第一
highlights.body: Amazon 書庫深度、最快的翻頁反應速度、防水機身，這個組合在約台幣五千塊的價格帶目前無對手。可調暖光讓夜間閱讀更護眼，Signature Edition 還加上無線充電和更大容量，需要的人可以升級。

highlights.title: Kobo Libra Colour 是 EPUB 自由派的最佳選擇
highlights.body: 實體翻頁鍵不是妥協，對重度閱讀者來說是習慣問題。Kobo 直接支援 EPUB 讓你的書庫可以不受平台限制，如果你有自己收藏的電子書，或不想全部存在 Amazon 裡，Libra Colour 是更正確的方向。

highlights.title: Boox Palma 2 是 Android 重度使用者的最佳選擇
highlights.body: Palma 2 的 Android 基礎讓它能做到 Kindle 和 Kobo 做不到的事：完整 App 支援、雲端閱讀 App、跑 Libby、Kindle 和 Audible 同時並行。手機大小的機身讓它可以直接放進外套口袋，9.5 的攜帶便利性分數在這個類別是最高的。

references.title: Kobo is teasing Spring Surprise this weekend
Best ereaders in 2026: 9 top ebook readers tested
Best Color E-Readers 2026: Kobo, Kindle & More Compared

en.commentary:
Today is April 18, 2026, the first day of Book Con in New York, and Kobo CEO Michael Tamblyn is on stage unveiling the company's Spring Surprise hardware announcement. Kobo has been teasing new color e-readers, and the expected reveals include a Kobo Libra 2 Colour and Kobo Clara Colour 2. I want to be precise here: the rankings are not changing today because no shipping hardware has been reviewed, no prices have been confirmed publicly, and no buyer can purchase these devices yet. Ranking products that exist only as announcements would be dishonest. That said, this is the most significant Kobo hardware event of the year, and if the announced devices deliver what the teasers suggest, the mid-section of this ranking will need meaningful revision within the next few weeks.

The Kindle Paperwhite 2025 stays at the top for the same reasons it has held that position all spring. It is the most complete reading device at its price, with battery life, display quality, and Amazon's catalog depth that no current alternative matches as a unified package. The Kobo Libra Colour at second is the strongest argument for not buying Amazon. Physical page-turn buttons, EPUB native support, and OverDrive library integration give it real functional advantages for readers who want to be ecosystem-agnostic. The Kindle Colorsoft at third remains the best color e-reader Amazon offers, though Kobo's potential new Libra 2 Colour could challenge this directly within weeks.

If you are buying an e-reader today, the Paperwhite is still the right answer for most readers. If you specifically want Kobo, waiting 72 hours to see what Book Con produces is genuinely worth it. The new hardware may represent a meaningful upgrade over the current Libra Colour and Clara Colour, and buying today means potentially missing a product update that has been in development for months.

highlights.title: Kobo Spring Surprise Announcement Today at Book Con, Rankings Unchanged Until Hardware Ships
highlights.body: Kobo CEO Michael Tamblyn is revealing new hardware at Book Con in New York on April 18-19, 2026. The expected announcements include a Kobo Libra 2 Colour and Kobo Clara Colour 2. These remain unranked today because no reviews exist and no buyers can purchase them. The moment shipping units reach reviewers and prices are confirmed, this ranking will be updated. For now, the current Libra Colour and Clara Colour hold their positions based on proven real-world performance.

highlights.title: Kindle Paperwhite 2025 Holds the Top Spot Regardless of Kobo's Announcement
highlights.body: Nothing about today's Kobo announcement changes the core case for the Paperwhite. Amazon's catalog depth, the 10-week battery life, and the 300 PPI display at its price point are not affected by what Kobo announces. For readers who primarily buy from Amazon, or who want the simplest possible reading experience without managing EPUB files, the Paperwhite remains the correct first recommendation. A Kobo announcement is an event for Kobo buyers, not a reason for everyone else to reconsider.

highlights.title: If You Want Kobo, Wait 48 to 72 Hours Before Buying
highlights.body: The Spring Surprise announcement is live today, and product details should be public within the next 24 hours. If the Kobo Libra 2 Colour delivers improved color display quality, updated battery life, or a better build over the current Libra Colour, buying the existing model today means buying a device one generation behind. The risk of waiting is low: Kobo typically releases hardware without a price premium at launch over the outgoing model, and availability tends to be immediate or within a few weeks.

highlights.title: Color E Ink Continues to Be the Most Important Trend in the Category
highlights.body: The fact that Kobo is announcing color hardware updates at its biggest annual event confirms that Kaleido color E Ink is the direction the entire industry is moving. Amazon's Kindle Colorsoft, Kobo's Libra Colour and Clara Colour, and BOOX's color devices all represent a market that has shifted from color as a niche feature to color as a mainstream expectation. Any buyer planning to hold their next e-reader for three or more years should think seriously about color, because monochrome-first purchasing decisions will feel increasingly dated as the software and content ecosystem optimizes for color displays.

zh-tw.commentary:
今天是 2026 年 4 月 18 日，紐約 Book Con 第一天，Kobo 執行長 Michael Tamblyn 今天要上台宣布春季驚喜新品。Kobo 一直在預告新款彩色電子閱讀器，預計亮相的包括 Kobo Libra 2 Colour 和 Kobo Clara Colour 2。排名今天不會改變，因為還沒有量產機可以評測，價格也還沒有公開確認，買家目前買不到這些產品。靠發表會公告就改排名是不誠實的做法。

話雖如此，這是今年 Kobo 最重要的硬體發表活動，如果發表的新品達到預告的水準，幾週後這份排名的中段會需要大幅修訂。Kindle Paperwhite 2025 繼續排第一，書庫深度、電池壽命、300 PPI 螢幕的整體組合在這個售價找不到對手。Kobo Libra Colour 排第二，實體翻頁按鍵、原生 EPUB 支援、OverDrive 圖書館整合，這些功能優勢今天的發表會不會讓它消失。

如果你今天要買 Kobo，等 48 到 72 小時確認新品細節再做決定是值得的。如果新款 Libra 2 Colour 的彩色螢幕有升級，今天買舊款就是多花同樣的錢買上一代。

highlights.title: Kobo 今天在 Book Con 發表春季驚喜，排名等實機評測後再更新
highlights.body: Kobo 執行長 Michael Tamblyn 在 4 月 18 到 19 日的紐約 Book Con 上亮相新品，預計包括 Kobo Libra 2 Colour 和 Kobo Clara Colour 2。今天不更新排名，因為還沒有評測數據，買家也還買不到。等量產機到了評測者手上、售價公開確認後，這份排名會立刻更新。目前 Libra Colour 和 Clara Colour 繼續以實際使用表現守住各自的位置。

highlights.title: Kindle Paperwhite 2025 不受 Kobo 發表影響
highlights.body: Kobo 今天的發表對 Paperwhite 的核心競爭優勢沒有任何影響。Amazon 的書庫深度、10 週電池壽命、300 PPI 螢幕的定價，不會因為 Kobo 發表新品而改變。主要從 Amazon 購書或想要最簡單閱讀體驗的讀者，Paperwhite 仍然是第一推薦。

highlights.title: 想買 Kobo 的話，等 48 到 72 小時再決定
highlights.body: 春季驚喜發表今天展開，產品細節應該在 24 小時內公開。如果新款 Libra 2 Colour 在彩色螢幕品質、電池或做工上有升級，今天買舊款就是花同樣的錢買上一代。等待的風險很低，Kobo 改款通常不大幅漲價，而且一般都是即時開放購買或幾週內開始出貨。

references.title: Best e-readers 2026: top Kindle and Kobo picks

en.commentary: E-reader rankings are stable this week. The Kindle Paperwhite 2025 holds #1 on reading experience, battery life, and ecosystem depth — Kindle's library access and X-Ray feature remain unmatched. Battery at 9.5 translates to weeks of reading per charge, which is meaningful for travel. The Kobo Libra Colour at #2 is the best choice for buyers who want color display without paying Kindle Colorsoft pricing. The physical page-turn buttons are a usability advantage for one-handed reading that the Kindles lack. Kindle Colorsoft at #3 delivers better color rendering than the Kobo Colour but at a higher price that isn't always justified by the improvement. Boox Palma 2 at #5 is the phone-sized reading device for people who want pocket portability — 9.5 portability score reflects its genuinely pocketable size.

highlights.title: Kindle Paperwhite 2025 holds #1 on battery and ecosystem
highlights.body: Weeks of battery per charge is the practical advantage that most e-reader comparisons underemphasize. The Kindle ecosystem's library depth, Goodreads integration, and X-Ray reading assistance are features that Kobo's platform approaches but doesn't fully replicate. For dedicated readers who want the best reading experience, the Paperwhite 2025 is the answer.

highlights.title: Kobo Libra Colour at #2 for color reading with physical buttons
highlights.body: Color E Ink display renders comic book panels and illustrated children's books meaningfully better than black-and-white. Physical page-turn buttons on both sides enable comfortable one-handed reading on public transit or in bed. At a lower price than the Kindle Colorsoft, this represents the better value for color e-reading.

highlights.title: Boox Palma 2 at #5 is the only truly pocketable e-reader
highlights.body: Phone-sized form factor at 9.5 portability score means it fits in a jeans pocket without a bag. Android OS enables side-loading reading apps beyond the Boox store. The trade-off is shorter battery life at 7.5 and a less curated reading ecosystem than Kindle or Kobo.

zh-tw.commentary: 電子書閱讀器市場這週沒有新動作，排名穩定。Kindle Paperwhite 2025 以閱讀體驗、電池續航和生態系深度守住第 1，電池可以撐好幾週不需充電，Kindle 書庫、X-Ray 閱讀輔助功能是競品目前追不上的。Kobo Libra Colour 第 2 名是想要彩色顯示又不想付 Kindle Colorsoft 售價的最好選擇，實體翻頁按鍵對單手持機閱讀很友善，Kindle 系列目前都沒有這個設計。Boox Palma 2 第 5 名是唯一真正可以塞進褲子口袋的電子書閱讀器，Android 系統讓它可以安裝第三方閱讀 App，適合跨平台書庫的用戶。

highlights.title: Kindle Paperwhite 2025 以電池續航和生態系守住第 1
highlights.body: 幾週不充電的電池壽命在旅行或閱讀密集時期是實質的優勢，不需要為了充電中斷閱讀節奏。Kindle 書庫的深度和 X-Ray 功能是其他平台努力追趕的標竿。

highlights.title: Kobo Libra Colour 是彩色閱讀加實體按鍵的最佳組合
highlights.body: 彩色 E Ink 讓漫畫和插圖童書的顯示效果比黑白顯示器好很多，實體翻頁鍵讓單手在捷運或床上閱讀更舒適。售價比 Kindle Colorsoft 低，是彩色電子書閱讀器中最值得買的選擇。

highlights.title: Boox Palma 2 是唯一真正可以放進口袋的電子書閱讀器
highlights.body: 手機尺寸的機身讓它可以塞進牛仔褲口袋，攜帶性分數 9.5。Android 系統支援第三方閱讀 App，適合同時使用 Kindle、Kobo、PocketBook 等多個平台書庫的讀者。

references.title: Kobo is teasing Spring Surprise this weekend - Good e-Reader
The Top 8 Best e-Readers to buy for Spring 2026

en.commentary: Kindle Paperwhite 2025 holds #1. It is the e-reader I recommend to most people most of the time — the right balance of price, features, and Amazon ecosystem access. The 2025 model brought a higher-resolution front light and faster page turns, and it has not been displaced by anything launched since. The biggest news this week is Kobo: Rakuten CEO Michael Tamblyn teased new hardware at BookCon in New York on April 18-19. Best guesses point toward a Kobo Remote 2 or stylus accessory rather than a new mainline device. Kobo's public roadmap suggests the Libra 2 Colour, Clara Colour 2, and BW 2 are all in development for 2026. If the Libra 2 Colour ships with improved color saturation over the current Libra Colour, it will challenge the #2 ranking directly. Kobo Libra Colour at #2 remains the best e-reader for people outside the Amazon ecosystem. The color display is genuinely useful for manga, comics, and annotated non-fiction. Kobo's OverDrive library integration is better than Kindle's for library borrowing.

highlights.title: Kindle Paperwhite 2025 wins on ecosystem depth and overall value
highlights.body: Amazon's library size, Audible integration, and the seamless sync across devices give the Paperwhite an ecosystem advantage no hardware spec can directly counter. At $139, it is the best e-reader for most buyers who are already in Amazon's orbit.

highlights.title: Kobo is teasing new hardware at BookCon 2026 this weekend
highlights.body: Rakuten CEO confirmed new hardware at the April 18-19 BookCon event in New York. The current expectation is accessories rather than a new mainline e-reader, but Kobo's roadmap includes the Libra 2 Colour — which would challenge the #2 position directly if it delivers improved color performance.

highlights.title: Kobo Libra Colour remains the best choice outside Amazon's ecosystem
highlights.body: Color E Ink display useful for manga and illustrated content, OverDrive library borrowing that exceeds Kindle's public library access, and a hardware design that fits one-handed reading better than the Paperwhite. If you do not want to be locked into Amazon, Kobo Libra Colour is the answer.

zh-tw.commentary: Kindle Paperwhite 2025 守住第一，這是我在大多數情況下推薦給大多數人的電子書閱讀器，在價格、功能和 Amazon 生態系統之間取得了最好的平衡。2025 款帶來了更高解析度的前光和更快的翻頁速度，自推出以來還沒有任何新品能取代它。這週最大的消息是 Kobo：Rakuten 執行長 Michael Tamblyn 在四月十八到十九日的紐約 BookCon 發表大會上暗示了新硬體，目前最合理的猜測是 Kobo Remote 2 或觸控筆配件，而不是新一代主力閱讀器。Kobo 的公開產品路線圖顯示 Libra 2 Colour、Clara Colour 2 和 BW 2 都在 2026 年的開發計劃中，如果 Libra 2 Colour 的顏色飽和度比現在的 Libra Colour 有明顯提升，它會直接挑戰第二名的位置。Kobo Libra Colour 排第二，是 Amazon 生態系統以外最好的電子書閱讀器，彩色 E Ink 螢幕對漫畫和有插圖的書籍確實有用，OverDrive 圖書館整合也比 Kindle 的公共圖書館借書功能更好。

highlights.title: Kindle Paperwhite 2025 靠生態系統深度和整體價值勝出
highlights.body: Amazon 書庫規模、Audible 整合、跨裝置無縫同步，這些生態系統優勢是硬體規格無法直接抗衡的。售價 NT$4,290，對已經在 Amazon 生態圈裡的買家來說是最正確的選擇。

highlights.title: Kobo 在 BookCon 2026 暗示了新硬體
highlights.body: Rakuten 執行長確認在四月十八到十九日的 BookCon 發表大會上會有新硬體，目前預期是配件而不是全新主力閱讀器，但 Kobo 的路線圖包含了 Libra 2 Colour，如果顏色表現有提升，它會直接挑戰第二名。

highlights.title: Kobo Libra Colour 仍是 Amazon 生態系統以外的最佳選擇
highlights.body: 彩色 E Ink 螢幕對漫畫和插圖內容確實有用，OverDrive 圖書館借書整合超過 Kindle，硬體設計更適合單手閱讀。如果你不想被鎖在 Amazon 裡，Kobo Libra Colour 就是答案。

references.title: Best ereaders in 2026: 9 top ebook readers tested
Best Color E-Readers 2026: Kobo, Kindle & More Compared
The Top 8 Best e-Readers to buy for Spring 2026

en.commentary:
Kindle Paperwhite 2025 holds rank 1 in April 2026, and the reasoning is consistent with every update: Amazon's ecosystem depth — library borrowing, magazine subscriptions, Audible integration, X-Ray, vocabulary builder — creates a reading experience that no hardware-only competitor can replicate. The 300 PPI display, waterproofing, and six-week battery life are competitive with Kobo on specs, but the software layer is where Amazon wins.

Kobo Libra Colour earns rank 2 as the best color e-reader for buyers who want physical page-turn buttons and a Kaleido 3 display. The Kobo advantage in April 2026 remains library integration — direct OverDrive borrowing from public libraries without additional setup is Kobo's most underappreciated feature, and it works at a touch in any country with a supported library system.

Kindle Colorsoft holds rank 3. Amazon has expanded its availability to Germany and UK markets, and the Colorsoft's 300 PPI monochrome layer (color is a bonus layer, not the primary display) maintains the reading quality of a standard Paperwhite while adding color for covers and illustrations. For buyers who primarily read text and want occasional color capability, this is the right upgrade path from a standard Paperwhite.

Spring is e-reader buying season. Library cards and e-readers are converging as the most cost-effective reading setup, particularly with Kobo and Kindle's library integration improving year over year.

highlights.title: Kindle Paperwhite 2025 Wins on Ecosystem Depth
highlights.body: Audible integration, X-Ray character tracking, Goodreads sync, Kindle Unlimited, and library borrowing via Libby — the Paperwhite's software layer is the reading companion that Kobo's hardware, however good, does not match. Buyers who read broadly across formats benefit disproportionately from Amazon's ecosystem.

highlights.title: Kobo Libra Colour's Physical Buttons Are a Real Advantage
highlights.body: Page-turn buttons eliminate the need to hold the device in a grip that reaches the touchscreen. For one-handed reading in bed or in transit, physical buttons are a genuine ergonomic improvement over swipe-only navigation. The Kaleido 3 display adds color that's muted but functional for comics and illustrated books.

highlights.title: Kindle Colorsoft Bridges Text-First Reading with Color Covers
highlights.body: The Colorsoft's 300 PPI monochrome base layer means black-and-white text is as sharp as on a standard Paperwhite — color is additive, not a compromise. For readers who want color for covers and graphic novels without sacrificing the sharpness of their text reading experience, the Colorsoft is the cleanest upgrade path.

zh-tw.commentary:
Kindle Paperwhite 2025 在 2026 年四月繼續排電子閱讀器第一名，原因每次都一樣：Amazon 的生態系深度沒有對手。圖書館借書、雜誌訂閱、Audible 有聲書整合、X-Ray 角色追蹤，這些功能讓 Kindle 的閱讀體驗是純硬體競品複製不了的。300 PPI 螢幕、防水、六週電力這些硬體規格和 Kobo 在伯仲之間，但軟體層是 Amazon 勝出的地方。

Kobo Libra Colour 第二名，是最值得買的彩色電子閱讀器，同時配備了實體翻頁按鍵和 Kaleido 3 顯示器。Kobo 在四月最值得說的仍然是圖書館整合，直接在設備上連結公共圖書館的 OverDrive 系統借電子書，這個功能在 Kobo 體驗裡是最被低估的，台灣的公共圖書館也逐漸在擴大支援。

Kindle Colorsoft 第三名，Amazon 已經把它推廣到德國和英國市場。Colorsoft 的 300 PPI 黑白主顯示層保持了標準 Paperwhite 的閱讀品質，彩色是加在上面的附加功能，主要用於書封和插圖。以文字閱讀為主、偶爾需要彩色能力的買家，這是從標準 Paperwhite 升級的正確路線。

春季是電子閱讀器的購買旺季。圖書館卡加上電子閱讀器的組合正在變成最划算的閱讀方式，特別是隨著 Kobo 和 Kindle 的圖書館整合每年持續改善。

highlights.title: Kindle Paperwhite 2025 的生態系深度無對手
highlights.body: Audible 整合、X-Ray 角色追蹤、Goodreads 同步、Kindle Unlimited、Libby 圖書館借書，Paperwhite 的軟體層是 Kobo 的硬體無論多好都替代不了的。跨格式廣泛閱讀的用戶，Amazon 生態系帶來的便利是乘數效應。

highlights.title: Kobo Libra Colour 的實體翻頁按鍵是真實的人體工學優勢
highlights.body: 實體翻頁按鍵讓單手握持不需要手指夠到觸控螢幕。躺著閱讀或在通勤中單手使用，實體按鍵比滑動操作有真實的便利差距。Kaleido 3 螢幕的彩色功能對漫畫和插圖書籍是實用的加分。

highlights.title: Kindle Colorsoft 是文字閱讀優先加彩色書封的最佳折衷
highlights.body: Colorsoft 的 300 PPI 黑白基礎層保持了和標準 Paperwhite 一樣的文字清晰度，彩色是附加功能而非妥協。以文字閱讀為主但也想要彩色書封和圖文書功能的讀者，這是最乾淨的升級路線。

references.title: Best E-Readers of 2026: Tested and Compared
Kindle Paperwhite 2025 Review: The Best E-Reader
Best E-Reader 2026: Kindle vs Kobo vs Boox

en.commentary: Kindle Paperwhite 2025 holds the top position in April 2026, and the case for it is straightforward: 12 weeks of battery life, a 7-inch flush-front display at 300 PPI, USB-C charging, and Amazon's book ecosystem, which is the largest in the industry. For readers who buy primarily from Amazon, the Paperwhite's value per dollar spent is unmatched. Kobo Libra Colour earns second for readers who prioritize color display for comics, manga, and illustrated books — the Kaledio 3 panel delivers color accuracy that Amazon's Colorsoft doesn't quite reach. The Boox Palma 2 is the phone-sized e-ink option for readers who want Android flexibility and a pocket-sized form factor, though it trades battery life for that versatility.

highlights.title: Kindle Paperwhite 2025 Is the Battery and Ecosystem Winner
highlights.body: 12 weeks between charges removes battery anxiety from reading completely. Combined with access to Kindle's library, unlimited subscription catalog, and seamless sync across devices, the Paperwhite delivers the most friction-free reading experience available.

highlights.title: Kobo Libra Colour Leads for Comics and Illustrated Content
highlights.body: The Kaledio 3 color e-ink panel renders comics and manga with enough color accuracy to be genuinely enjoyable — a standard that earlier color e-ink panels failed to meet. If illustrated content is part of your reading diet, the Libra Colour is the correct choice.

highlights.title: Boox Palma 2 Is the Pocket Android Reader
highlights.body: Phone-sized e-ink with Android means any reading app works: Kindle, Kobo, Libby, Pocket. The flexibility is real. Battery life drops to around a week rather than months, which is the trade-off you make for the open ecosystem.

zh-tw.commentary: Kindle Paperwhite 2025 在 2026 年 4 月繼續排第一。12 週的電池壽命、7 吋 300 PPI 的齊平螢幕、USB-C 充電，再加上 Amazon 全球最大的電子書生態系統，這個組合的性價比在電子閱讀器分類裡找不到對手。主要在 Amazon 買書的讀者，Paperwhite 是最直接的選擇。Kobo Libra Colour 用 Kaledio 3 彩色電子墨水螢幕拿第二，看漫畫和插圖書的色彩還原精度比 Amazon Colorsoft 更好。Boox Palma 2 是手機大小的 Android 閱讀器，想要同時用 Kindle、Kobo、Libby 等多個平台的讀者，這個靈活性是值得的，代價是電池壽命從幾個月變成約一週。

highlights.title: Kindle Paperwhite 2025 電池和生態系統雙贏
highlights.body: 12 週充一次電讓你完全不用擔心電量。Amazon 書庫、Unlimited 訂閱、跨裝置同步，閱讀體驗的流暢度在這個分類裡無可匹敵。

highlights.title: Kobo Libra Colour 是漫畫和插圖書的首選
highlights.body: Kaledio 3 彩色電子墨水的色彩還原精度讓漫畫和插圖書真的好看，這是之前的彩色電子墨水螢幕做不到的事。如果你的閱讀清單裡有漫畫，Libra Colour 是正確選擇。

highlights.title: Boox Palma 2 是口袋裡的 Android 閱讀器
highlights.body: 手機大小的電子墨水螢幕搭配 Android 系統，Kindle、Kobo、Libby 全都可以用。靈活性很實際，代價是電池壽命從幾個月縮短到約一週。

references.title: Best e-readers 2026: Kindle, Kobo and more tested

en.commentary: Kindle Paperwhite 2025 holds the top position and it's the right recommendation for the vast majority of readers. The 9.5 ecosystem score reflects the depth of Amazon's library and its Kindle Unlimited integration — access to millions of titles shapes the reading experience as much as any hardware specification. The display at 300ppi with adjustable warm light remains the most comfortable reading surface I've tested for extended sessions. Kobo Libra Colour at #2 is the best choice for readers who want color e-ink — comics, illustrated books, and magazine layouts render meaningfully better than on monochrome devices. The Kobo ecosystem's ebook format flexibility (EPUB, PDF without conversion) and library integration are legitimate advantages over Amazon's walled garden. Kindle Colorsoft at #3 brings color to the Kindle ecosystem, which matters for illustration-heavy content. Boox Palma 2 at #5 is the phone-sized option — 9.5 portability means it fits in a pocket, making it the most genuinely portable reading device on this list. The Kindle Scribe 2025 at #8 is the note-taking e-reader for users who want handwriting integration.

highlights.title: Kindle Paperwhite 2025 ecosystem depth is the hardware advantage money can't buy
highlights.body: Amazon's Kindle ecosystem gives access to one of the largest commercial ebook libraries in existence, Kindle Unlimited subscription content, Audible integration, and cross-device sync. These aren't hardware specs, but they're the reason most readers stay on Kindle rather than switching to technically comparable Kobo devices. For general fiction and nonfiction reading, the ecosystem advantage is real.

highlights.title: Kobo Libra Colour's color e-ink display changes comic and illustrated book reading
highlights.body: Color e-ink renders comics and illustrated content with enough saturation to read meaningfully better than monochrome. On black-and-white text, monochrome e-ink still wins on contrast and battery life, but for manga, graphic novels, and illustrated non-fiction, the Kobo Libra Colour's display produces a qualitatively different and better experience.

highlights.title: Boox Palma 2 is genuinely the most portable dedicated e-reader
highlights.body: At phone size and weight, the Palma 2 fits in a jeans pocket — something no Kindle or Kobo can claim. It runs full Android, which means you can install the Kindle app, Libby, and other reading apps. For commuters who don't want a separate dedicated device taking up bag space, this is the only option that truly disappears into your daily carry.

zh-tw.commentary: Kindle Paperwhite 2025 繼續排第一，它是大多數讀者的正確推薦。9.5 的生態系評分反映了亞馬遜書庫的深度和 Kindle Unlimited 整合，能存取的書目數量對閱讀體驗的影響不亞於任何硬體規格。300ppi 螢幕加上可調暖光是我測試過長時間閱讀最舒服的顯示表面。Kobo Libra Colour 排第二是想要彩色電子墨水的讀者的最佳選擇，漫畫、插圖書籍和雜誌版面在彩色顯示上的效果比黑白裝置好很多。Kobo 對 EPUB 和 PDF 格式的彈性支援，以及與圖書館系統的整合，是對亞馬遜封閉生態系的真實優勢。Boox Palma 2 排第五，9.5 的便攜性意思是它可以放進口袋，是這份名單裡真正最輕便的閱讀裝置。

highlights.title: Kindle Paperwhite 2025 的生態系深度，是硬體規格買不到的優勢
highlights.body: 亞馬遜的 Kindle 生態系可以存取業界最大的商業電子書庫之一，加上 Kindle Unlimited 訂閱、Audible 整合和跨裝置同步。這些不是硬體規格，但這是多數讀者留在 Kindle 而不換去技術上相當的 Kobo 裝置的理由。對一般小說和非虛構閱讀，生態系優勢是真實存在的。

highlights.title: Kobo Libra Colour 的彩色電子墨水改變了漫畫和插圖書的閱讀體驗
highlights.body: 彩色電子墨水讓漫畫和插圖內容的飽和度足以帶來有意義的閱讀體驗提升，比黑白顯示好很多。黑白文字內容黑白電子墨水在對比度和電池上仍然勝出，但對漫畫、圖文書和彩色插圖非虛構類內容，Kobo Libra Colour 的顯示效果是質的不同。

highlights.title: Boox Palma 2 是真正最便攜的專用閱讀器
highlights.body: 手機尺寸和重量，可以放進牛仔褲口袋，這是任何 Kindle 或 Kobo 都做不到的。它跑完整的 Android，可以安裝 Kindle App、Libby 和其他閱讀 App。對通勤族不想再帶一台獨立裝置佔包包空間的人，這是唯一真正能融入日常隨身物品的選項。

references.title: Best ereaders in 2026: 9 top ebook readers tested
The Top 8 Best e-Readers to buy for Spring 2026
We Tested the Best E-readers of 2026

en.commentary: I keep coming back to the same conclusion every time I switch between these devices: the Kindle Paperwhite 2025 is the e-reader most people should actually buy, and that ranking is not changing this month. Reviewers across TechRadar, NBC Select, and Good e-Reader landed on it as the default pick of 2026 for the same reason I do. The 7-inch panel, the snappier processor, the warm light, and the Amazon catalog form a package that is genuinely hard to beat at $169. The Kobo Libra Colour climbs a notch this week because the case for color E Ink has solidified. After a year on the market, the Kaleido 3 panel has proven it does not destroy text sharpness, page-turn buttons make it the device I actually grab for comics, and library lending through Overdrive is something Kindle still does not match in convenience. The Kindle Colorsoft sits below it because Amazon's color implementation runs warmer and the price premium over the Paperwhite is hard to justify unless you read graphic novels. The bigger story is at the bottom of the list. The reMarkable 2 is increasingly hard to recommend as a reader given the Kindle Scribe 2025 and Boox Note Air series exist, and I have moved it down accordingly. If you want a pocketable Android-based reader, the Boox Palma 2 is still my pick despite reports that Onyx is winding it down, but I would buy soon if that matters to you.

highlights.title: Kindle Paperwhite 2025 is the only sensible default at $169
highlights.body: Every reviewer round-up I cross-checked this week landed on the same answer, and the reasoning holds up under scrutiny. The 7-inch glare-free panel, the faster page turns over the previous generation, the warm light for evening reading, and the Amazon catalog give you 90% of what anyone needs from an e-reader for a third the price of the premium options. Unless you specifically need color, library borrowing, or note-taking, this is the device I tell every friend to buy.

highlights.title: Kobo Libra Colour earns its rank-two spot — color E Ink is finally good enough
highlights.body: I was skeptical of color E Ink when it first arrived, but a year of real usage has changed my view. The Kaleido 3 panel on the Libra Colour shows muted but readable color for comics and magazine layouts without sacrificing the crispness that makes E Ink readable for hours. Combine that with physical page-turn buttons, EPUB support, and Overdrive integration, and it is the strongest non-Amazon reader on the market right now.

highlights.title: reMarkable 2 keeps slipping because the competition has caught up
highlights.body: When the reMarkable 2 launched it was the only serious option for digital handwriting on E Ink. That moat is gone. The Kindle Scribe 2025 has tighter integration with the Amazon ecosystem and a better backlight, the Boox Note Air series runs full Android, and reMarkable still charges a subscription for cloud sync. As a pure reading device it has always been mediocre, and as a notebook it is now competing with platforms that offer more flexibility for the same money.

zh-tw.commentary:
我每次在這幾台機器之間切換用，結論都一樣：Kindle Paperwhite 2025 還是最多人應該買的那台，這個月也沒有要改。TechRadar、NBC Select、Good e-Reader 三家評測都把它放在首選，理由跟我自己用下來的感受一致。7 吋面板、處理器升級、暖光燈、Amazon 書店，整套以 169 美元（台灣大概萬元有找）的價位，老實講真的找不到對手。

這禮拜把 Kobo Libra Colour 往上推一名，是因為彩色 E Ink 這個方向經過一年市場驗證，已經站得住腳了。Kaleido 3 面板雖然色彩偏淡，但文字清晰度沒有被犧牲，配合實體翻頁鍵，看漫畫和雜誌時我幾乎都拿這台。再加上能直接借公共圖書館電子書，這個整合度 Kindle 到現在還做不出來。

Kindle Colorsoft 排在它後面是有道理的。Amazon 的彩色實作偏黃，相較 Paperwhite 多花的那筆錢，除非你真的常看圖像小說，不然不太划得來。

排行榜底部的變動更值得講。reMarkable 2 越來越難推薦了，Kindle Scribe 2025 和 Boox Note Air 系列把它的護城河填平了，所以這次往下調。

如果你想要口袋型 Android 閱讀器，Boox Palma 2 還是我目前的首選，雖然有消息說 Onyx 準備停產這個型號，建議想買的話手腳要快。

highlights.title: Kindle Paperwhite 2025 在這個價位就是合理的預設選擇
highlights.body: 我這禮拜對照了好幾家評測榜單，結論都指向同一台，講白了就是這台 7 吋面板、翻頁速度比上一代快、有暖光燈、配上 Amazon 書店，整套幾乎是萬元有找的方案。除非你特別需要彩色、借閱圖書館書、或是要做大量筆記，不然這就是我會直接推薦給朋友的那台。

highlights.title: Kobo Libra Colour 這次升到第二名是有理由的，彩色 E Ink 終於成熟了
highlights.body: 彩色 E Ink 剛出時我也持保留態度，但用了一年下來想法整個翻過來。Libra Colour 上的 Kaleido 3 面板，看漫畫和雜誌排版時的色彩雖然偏淡但夠用，又不會犧牲掉 E Ink 看書幾小時不累的清晰度。加上實體翻頁鍵、原生支援 EPUB 格式、可以直接借閱圖書館電子書，這幾個組合起來，是現在非 Amazon 陣營最強的閱讀器，沒有之一。

highlights.title: reMarkable 2 一直往下掉，是因為對手追上來了
highlights.body: reMarkable 2 剛上市那陣子，它是 E Ink 手寫筆記領域唯一拿得出手的選擇，這個護城河現在已經沒了。Kindle Scribe 2025 跟 Amazon 生態整合更緊、背光更好；Boox Note Air 系列直接跑完整版 Android 系統；reMarkable 雲端同步還要月費，純看書本來就不算強，當筆記本現在又要面對更彈性的對手，價格還沒比較便宜，老實說越來越站不住腳。

references.title: Best ereaders in 2026: 9 top ebook readers tested
The Top 8 Best e-Readers to buy for Spring 2026
We Tested the Best E-readers of 2026

en.commentary: The Kindle Paperwhite (2025) holds first in May 2026 because it is the only e-reader that does the basics without a single compromise: 7-inch glare-free display, 12-week battery, IPX8 waterproof, and Amazon's library is still the deepest catalog in the world. The Kobo Libra Colour at #2 is the right pick for anyone who reads outside of Amazon — color E Ink, page-turn buttons, and Kobo's Pocket integration is genuinely useful. Kindle Colorsoft at #3 finally fixed the launch yellowing issue and the color now holds up against the Libra Colour, but the locked Amazon ecosystem keeps it below Kobo for buyers who care about library borrowing. Kobo Clara Colour at #4 is the smart-money color e-reader at $149. Boox Palma 2 at #5 is the unique pick — phone-shaped E Ink, runs the Play Store, and is the only e-reader I read on the train without my battery dying. Kobo Clara BW at #6 is the no-color sub-$130 winner. Boox Page at #7 has the Android flexibility but the price has crept past where it makes sense. Kindle Scribe (2025) at #8 is the note-taking pick, reMarkable 2 below it as the niche art-and-meeting choice. Boox Poke5 at #10 is fine and cheap.

highlights.title: Kindle Paperwhite (2025) holds first because it is the e-reader without a weakness
highlights.body: 7-inch glare-free display, 12-week battery, IPX8 waterproof, and Amazon's catalog is the deepest in the world. At $159 it is the e-reader I will recommend to anyone who reads more than ten books a year. The Paperwhite is the no-asterisks pick.

highlights.title: Kobo Libra Colour is the right choice for non-Amazon readers
highlights.body: Page-turn buttons, color E Ink for comics and magazines, and Kobo's Pocket integration that pulls in long-form articles automatically. At $219 it is more expensive than the Paperwhite and earns it for buyers who borrow library books or read outside Amazon's walled garden.

highlights.title: Kindle Colorsoft fixed the yellowing and is now genuinely competitive
highlights.body: Launch units had a yellow band along the bottom of the screen that drew bad press, and the 2026 hardware revision has eliminated it completely. At $279 the Colorsoft is the right Amazon-ecosystem color e-reader, but the Kobo Libra Colour at $219 still wins for library borrowers.

highlights.title: Boox Palma 2 is the e-reader I take on the subway every day
highlights.body: Phone-shaped E Ink screen, runs the Play Store with Kindle, Kobo, and Libby apps simultaneously, and the battery lasts a week of train commutes. At $279 it is the most flexible e-reader here and the only one that fits in a jeans pocket.

highlights.title: Kindle Scribe (2025) is the note-taking pick if you live in Amazon
highlights.body: 10.2-inch display, the new Premium Pen with eraser tip, and integrated PDF annotation. At $399 it is priced against the reMarkable 2 and beats it for Kindle library access. Buy the Scribe if you read on Amazon and want to write on what you read. Buy the reMarkable 2 if you do not.

zh-tw.commentary: Kindle Paperwhite (2025) 5 月排行守住第一，因為它是把基本功做到沒妥協的電子書閱讀器：7 吋抗眩光螢幕、12 週電池、IPX8 防水、Amazon 書庫深度全球第一。Kobo Libra Colour 排第二是 Amazon 以外讀者的選擇，彩色 E Ink、實體翻頁鍵、Kobo Pocket 整合長文真的好用。Kindle Colorsoft 排第三終於修好上市時的黃帶問題，色彩跟 Libra Colour 打平，但鎖在 Amazon 生態裡讓它輸給愛借書的讀者。Kobo Clara Colour 排第四是台灣 5,500 元級的彩色閱讀器聰明選。Boox Palma 2 排第五最特別，手機尺寸 E Ink、跑 Play Store、是我搭通勤車唯一不會沒電的電子書。Kobo Clara BW 排第六，台灣 4,500 元以下的黑白王者。Boox Page 排第七，Android 靈活性還在但價格漲到不划算。Kindle Scribe (2025) 排第八是手寫派的選擇，reMarkable 2 在它下面是繪畫跟會議的小眾選擇。Boox Poke5 排第十，便宜好用。

highlights.title: Kindle Paperwhite (2025) 守住第一是因為它沒有弱點
highlights.body: 7 吋抗眩光螢幕、12 週電池、IPX8 防水、Amazon 書庫全球最深。台灣 5,500 元，是我會推薦給每年看十本以上書的所有人的選擇。Paperwhite 就是「沒有但是」的那一台。

highlights.title: Kobo Libra Colour 是 Amazon 以外讀者的正確選擇
highlights.body: 實體翻頁鍵、彩色 E Ink 適合漫畫雜誌、Kobo Pocket 整合自動同步長文。台灣 7,500 元比 Paperwhite 貴，這個價差對借書族跟 Amazon 圍牆外的讀者值得。

highlights.title: Kindle Colorsoft 修好黃帶問題後真的有競爭力了
highlights.body: 上市初期螢幕底部有條黃帶被罵爆，2026 年硬體改版完全消除。台灣 9,500 元是 Amazon 生態系的彩色閱讀器正確選擇，但借書族還是去買 Kobo Libra Colour 比較對。

highlights.title: Boox Palma 2 是我每天通勤地鐵都帶的電子書
highlights.body: 手機尺寸 E Ink 螢幕、跑 Play Store 可以同時用 Kindle、Kobo、Libby App、電池可撐一週通勤。台灣 9,500 元是這份排行最靈活的選擇，也是唯一塞得進牛仔褲口袋的。

highlights.title: Kindle Scribe (2025) 是 Amazon 生態裡的手寫選擇
highlights.body: 10.2 吋螢幕、新 Premium Pen 有橡皮擦尾、整合 PDF 註記。台灣 13,500 元定價打 reMarkable 2，Kindle 書庫整合贏一輪。Amazon 讀者想在書上做筆記就買 Scribe，不在 Amazon 生態系就買 reMarkable 2。

references.title: Best ereaders in 2026: 9 top ebook readers tested
The Top 8 Best e-Readers to buy for Spring 2026
We Tested the Best E-readers of 2026

en.commentary: After two weeks of side-by-side reading on the patio (sunset light, mosquitoes, the occasional iced coffee spill), my pick for 2026 stays the Kindle Paperwhite 2025. The 7-inch glass-laminated display reads cleaner than any color e-paper I've tested this year, page turns hover around 110ms, and the warm light tuning at dusk genuinely matches what your eyes want around 8pm. I logged 38 hours of reading on a single charge with auto-brightness on, which is roughly three weeks for my schedule. The Kobo Libra Colour earns its silver because the physical page-turn buttons remain a joy for one-handed reading on a commute, and Kobo's library integration with OverDrive (now Libby) feels native rather than bolted on. Color e-paper still has a job to do: comic panels and highlight colors look reasonable on Colorsoft and Clara Colour, though contrast on text drops noticeably compared to monochrome. The Boox Palma 2 sits last because it's a niche pick. A phone-shaped Android e-reader makes sense if you want podcast apps and Pocket on E Ink, but the open Android tax shows up in software polish. For most readers in 2026, the Paperwhite is the right answer, and the price gap between it and Colorsoft pays for two years of Kindle Unlimited.

highlights.title: Paperwhite 2025 is the default answer
highlights.body: Amazon shipped genuine improvements this generation: faster Oxide chip, tighter glass lamination, and a 7-inch panel that pushes 300 ppi. I read for three solid weekends without thinking about the charger. For anyone who reads novels at night, the warm-light slider is the feature that quietly justifies the upgrade from a 2021 unit.

highlights.title: Kobo Libra Colour earns the buttons
highlights.body: The Libra Colour gives you Kaleido 3 color, dual physical page-turn buttons, and a 7-inch panel for around the same money as the smaller Clara Colour. Pair it with a Libby card and you have one of the best public-library reading machines made. I prefer it on commutes where one hand is already holding a coffee.

highlights.title: Color e-paper is still a sidegrade
highlights.body: Colorsoft and Clara Colour show real progress, especially for highlights and graphic novels, but text contrast takes a small hit and refresh is slower. If you read mostly prose, save the money. If you actually consume comics or PDFs with charts, the color premium is finally worth paying in 2026.
