zh-tw.commentary: 老實說，把這五台輪流帶去捷運通勤、咖啡廳跟陽台夜讀後，2026 年閱讀器王座還是 Kindle Paperwhite 2025。7 吋玻璃貼合螢幕對比乾淨，翻頁約 110 毫秒，暖光在晚上八點之後切得很自然。連續閱讀 38 小時才需要充電。Kobo Libra Colour 拿銀牌是因為實體翻頁鍵單手使用太舒服，OverDrive 整合度高，比 Kindle 借書順很多。彩色電子紙今年確實有進步，看漫畫、雜誌封面 OK，但純文字對比度會掉一截。Boox Palma 2 排最後因為它是小眾選擇，手機尺寸 Android E Ink 機可裝 Pocket、Readmoo、HyRead，系統流暢度跟主流牌差一截。我跟你講，想睡前追完一本小說，Paperwhite 還是最不會後悔的選擇，省的錢可以訂兩年 Kindle Unlimited。

highlights.title: Paperwhite 2025 就是預設答案
highlights.body: 這代 Amazon 真的有誠意，Oxide 晶片明顯快、玻璃貼合更緊、7 吋 300ppi 看起來很細。我連續三個週末沒充電，看到第四本書才提醒我該插電了。對習慣睡前看小說的人來說，暖光滑桿就是那個讓你願意從 2021 款升級的關鍵理由，價格落在 NT$5,490 上下也合理。

highlights.title: Kobo Libra Colour 用實體鍵贏一城
highlights.body: Libra Colour 給你 Kaleido 3 彩色面板、左右兩顆翻頁鍵還有 7 吋大小，價格跟 Clara Colour 差不多。搭配台北市立圖書館 HyRead 或國外 Libby 借書，這台幾乎是公共圖書館族最強的閱讀機。我特別推薦給每天搭板南線、一手拿手搖杯的通勤族。

highlights.title: 彩色電子紙還在過渡期
highlights.body: Colorsoft 跟 Clara Colour 確實看得出進步，看漫畫、看標註螢光筆顏色都 OK，但純文字看久還是會覺得灰一階、刷新慢半拍。講白了，如果你 90% 在看純文字小說，省下來的錢拿去買書比較實在。真的常看漫畫或 PDF 圖表，2026 年彩色版終於值得加價了。

references.title: Best ereaders in 2026: 9 top ebook readers tested
The Top 8 Best e-Readers to buy for Spring 2026
We Tested the Best E-readers of 2026

en.commentary: Beach reading season opens with Memorial Day and the e-reader ranking is exactly where I want it for the next four months. The Kindle Colorsoft Signature Edition keeps first because Amazon's spring 2026 firmware update fixed the yellow-tint issue that hurt early units, and the Kaleido 3 color screen finally renders cookbook photos and comic panels with enough fidelity to justify color e-ink as a category. The Kobo Libra Colour stays second on the strength of being the e-reader I recommend most often to readers who want library integration via OverDrive and a more open ecosystem than Amazon's. Boox Go Color 7 holds third because the Android base lets you sideload Libby, KOReader, and any PDF reader you want, which is the right pick for the technical reader who has outgrown Kindle's walled garden. Kindle Scribe at fourth keeps its niche as the writing-focused 10-inch device, and Kobo Sage rounds out fifth on Bluetooth audiobook integration. The pattern of mid-2026 is that color e-ink finally crossed the threshold from gimmick to genuine feature, and that's the message I keep delivering to friends who haven't replaced their Paperwhite in five years.

highlights.title: Kindle Colorsoft Signature is the color e-ink reader that finally works
highlights.body: Spring 2026 firmware fixed the yellow-tint problem on early units, and the Kaleido 3 panel renders cookbook photos and comics with enough fidelity to justify color e-ink. The Signature tier adds wireless charging and auto-adjusting front light that pays off in real use, and the Amazon ecosystem still wins on per-book pricing for English-language readers.

highlights.title: Kobo Libra Colour wins on library integration and open ecosystem
highlights.body: OverDrive library borrowing remains the killer feature for readers who don't want to pay per book, and Kobo's open ecosystem accepts EPUBs from any source without conversion gymnastics. Page-turn buttons are still better than swiping, and the Bluetooth audiobook integration works with Kobo and external audiobook services.

highlights.title: Boox Go Color 7 is the technical reader's pick for sideloading
highlights.body: Full Android underneath means you can sideload Libby, KOReader, and any PDF reader you want, which matters for academic readers and anyone who has outgrown the closed Kindle world. The Kaleido 3 panel and 7-inch form factor hit the right balance, and Boox's update cadence remains aggressive.

zh-tw.commentary: 海灘閱讀季從 Memorial Day 開始，閱讀器榜單收在接下來四個月最理想的版本。第一名 Kindle Colorsoft Signature Edition，Amazon 春季韌體把早期出貨偏黃的問題修好，Kaleido 3 彩色面板渲染食譜照片跟漫畫終於到能撐住「彩色電子紙」這個品類存在意義的水準。第二名 Kobo Libra Colour，是我推薦頻率最高的機型，給想用圖書館服務借書、想要比 Amazon 更開放生態的讀者。第三名 Boox Go Color 7，底層是 Android 可以側載 Libby、KOReader、任何 PDF 閱讀器，給已經用膩 Kindle 封閉系統的進階讀者。第四名 Kindle Scribe 守住 10 吋寫作機型的位置，第五名 Kobo Sage 靠藍牙有聲書整合補位。2026 年中的脈絡是彩色電子紙終於從噱頭跨到實用，朋友五年沒換 Paperwhite 的，我就是這樣勸他升級。

highlights.title: Kindle Colorsoft Signature 是真的會用的彩色電子紙閱讀器
highlights.body: 春季韌體把早期偏黃修好，Kaleido 3 面板渲染食譜照片跟漫畫到了能撐住彩色電子紙這個品類的水準。Signature 版加無線充電跟自動調光在實際使用真的有用，Amazon 生態系英文書定價還是最有優勢。台灣售價約 NT$8,500（需透過代購）。

highlights.title: Kobo Libra Colour 在圖書館整合跟開放生態勝出
highlights.body: OverDrive 圖書館借書是殺手級功能，不想本本買電子書的人就靠這個，Kobo 開放生態吃任何來源 EPUB 不用轉檔。實體翻頁鍵還是比滑螢幕順，藍牙有聲書整合 Kobo 跟外部服務都通，台灣售價 NT$9,990。

highlights.title: Boox Go Color 7 是技術派側載王
highlights.body: 底層完整 Android 讓你想裝什麼閱讀 App 都行，Libby、KOReader、任何 PDF 閱讀器都跑得起來，學術讀者跟用膩 Kindle 封閉系統的人就鎖這台。Kaleido 3 面板配 7 吋尺寸是最舒服的平衡點，Boox 韌體更新頻率也夠積極，台灣售價約 NT$8,990。

references.title: Best ereaders in 2026: 9 top ebook readers tested
The Top 8 Best e-Readers to buy for Spring 2026
We Tested the Best E-readers of 2026

en.commentary: Summer reading season starts in earnest this month and the 2026 e-reader ranking stays unchanged because the leaders earn their positions on substance. The Kindle Paperwhite 2025 keeps first because it remains the best balance of price, screen quality, and Amazon ecosystem integration at $159. The 7-inch 300ppi display, 16-week battery, and IPX8 waterproofing are all best-in-class at this price point, and the 2025 refresh finally gave it a proper warm-light system. The Kobo Libra Colour stays second because the 7-inch Kaleido color e-ink display is the only color implementation worth using on a reading-focused device, and Kobo's library integration with OverDrive remains the right call for public-library borrowers. The Kindle Colorsoft holds third because Amazon's first color e-reader is genuinely good, but the price premium over the Paperwhite is hard to defend unless color manga or comics are core to your reading. The pattern in 2026 is that color e-ink has crossed the price-performance threshold to be a legitimate buying decision rather than a gimmick, and the question for buyers has shifted from whether to consider color to which color implementation suits the content they actually read.

highlights.title: Kindle Paperwhite 2025 is still the easiest e-reader recommendation
highlights.body: 7-inch 300ppi display, 16-week battery, IPX8 waterproofing, and the warm-light system added in the 2025 refresh deliver everything most readers need at $159. Amazon's content ecosystem and Kindle Unlimited integration remain the practical advantages no competitor matches at this price.

highlights.title: Kobo Libra Colour is the right pick for library borrowers
highlights.body: OverDrive integration for public-library lending and the 7-inch Kaleido color e-ink display make this the most flexible reader on the market. Physical page-turn buttons remain the right call for one-handed reading, and the open EPUB support is meaningful for readers with existing libraries outside Amazon.

highlights.title: Kindle Colorsoft justifies its premium for color manga and comics
highlights.body: Amazon's first color e-reader handles manga panels and graphic novels with proper color saturation, and the integration with Kindle's comic format support actually works as advertised. At $279 it's premium, but for readers whose content library leans heavily into color graphics, this is the right specialized pick.

zh-tw.commentary: 夏季閱讀季正式開打，2026 年電子閱讀器排行沒變動，前段班守得住的原因都是實打實的。第一名 Kindle Paperwhite 2025，台灣售價 NT$5,490 上下，7 吋 300ppi 螢幕、16 週電池、IPX8 防水，全部規格在這個價位帶都是頂尖，2025 年改版終於補上像樣的暖光系統。第二名 Kobo Libra Colour，7 吋 Kaleido 彩色電子紙是市面唯一值得買的彩色閱讀器實作，加上 OverDrive 公共圖書館整合，借書族的正解就是它。第三名 Kindle Colorsoft，Amazon 第一台彩色閱讀器做得不錯，但跟 Paperwhite 的差價沒辦法說服自己掏，除非彩色漫畫是主要閱讀內容。2026 年的脈絡是彩色電子紙過了「值得認真考慮」的門檻，買家的問題從「要不要考慮彩色」變成「哪個彩色實作適合我看的內容」，這算是這品類今年最大的結構變化。

highlights.title: Kindle Paperwhite 2025 還是最容易推的電子閱讀器
highlights.body: 7 吋 300ppi 螢幕、16 週電池、IPX8 防水、2025 年新增暖光系統，NT$5,490 這個價位帶該有的全部到位。Amazon 內容生態跟 Kindle Unlimited 整合是這個價位帶其他對手追不上的實用優勢。

highlights.title: Kobo Libra Colour 是借書族的正解
highlights.body: OverDrive 公共圖書館借閱整合加 7 吋 Kaleido 彩色電子紙，是市面最彈性的閱讀器。實體翻頁鍵單手閱讀還是最順手的設計，開放 EPUB 支援對 Amazon 體系外的書籍收藏者有實際意義。

highlights.title: Kindle Colorsoft 適合彩色漫畫跟圖像小說
highlights.body: Amazon 第一台彩色閱讀器處理漫畫分鏡跟圖像小說的彩度到位，Kindle 漫畫格式整合按宣傳兌現。NT$9,490 是高階定價，但收藏內容偏彩色圖像的讀者，這是專業選擇。

references.title: Best ereaders in 2026: 9 top ebook readers tested
The Top 8 Best e-Readers to buy for Spring 2026
We Tested the Best E-readers of 2026

en.commentary: Kindle Paperwhite (2025) keeps first because the 7-inch 300 ppi screen and the page-turn speed bump from the new Mediatek SoC are still the most-improved-overall e-reader of the past three years. Amazon's Memorial Day pre-deal cycle started yesterday with Paperwhite at $129.99 (regular $159.99), which is the lowest the 2025 model has been since launch and which closes the value argument. Kobo Libra Colour at second is still the right answer for anyone serious about library lending or PDF annotation, and the May 6 firmware update added EPUB-from-Google-Drive direct sync, which Amazon will not match. Kindle Colorsoft at third is the dark horse this season, the latest Colorsoft refresh ships with the e-ink Kaleido 4 panel that finally makes color e-reading not feel like a compromise. Boox Note Air 4 C at four is the productivity pick for anyone who wants color e-ink plus pen input. The 5/8 takeaway is that the top of the category is stable, the Paperwhite Memorial Day price locks first place, and Kobo's Google Drive sync is the underrated story of the week.

highlights.title: Kindle Paperwhite at $129.99 is the lowest the 2025 model has been
highlights.body: Amazon's Memorial Day pre-deal price beats every spring sale this year. 7-inch 300 ppi screen and the new Mediatek page-turn speed at $130 closes the value argument decisively. For anyone who has been waiting on a Paperwhite upgrade, this is the price to buy at.

highlights.title: Kobo Libra Colour adds EPUB-from-Google-Drive direct sync on May 6
highlights.body: The May 6 firmware update enables direct EPUB sync from Google Drive without going through Kobo desktop. This is the kind of open-format support Amazon will never ship, and it cements Kobo's position as the e-reader for buyers who refuse to live entirely inside Amazon's ecosystem.

highlights.title: Kindle Colorsoft with Kaleido 4 finally makes color e-reading not feel like a compromise
highlights.body: The Kaleido 4 panel pushes color saturation past the threshold where comic books and color magazine layouts read as intended rather than washed out. For graphic-novel readers and cookbook owners this is the first color e-reader I'd actually recommend, and the $279 price tag is now defensible.

zh-tw.commentary:
Kindle Paperwhite (2025) 第一名守住，7 吋 300 ppi 螢幕跟新的 Mediatek SoC 翻頁速度提升，過去三年改最多的電子閱讀器還是它。Amazon Memorial Day 預告昨天啟動，Paperwhite $129.99（原價 $159.99），是 2025 版上市以來最低，整個價值論述鎖死。

台灣 Amazon 海運過來大概 NT$5,500 上下，沒有公司貨但社群買的人很多，捷運通勤族手上看得到的閱讀器幾乎一半是這台。

第二名 Kobo Libra Colour 對在意圖書館借閱跟 PDF 標註的人還是首選，5/6 韌體更新加了 EPUB 從 Google Drive 直接同步，這件事 Amazon 永遠不會做。台灣 Readmoo 跟博客來上架的 EPUB 直接丟雲端就同步進來，重度自學族群很受用。

第三名 Kindle Colorsoft 是這季的黑馬，最新刷的 Colorsoft 換上 Kaleido 4 彩色 e-ink 面板，彩色閱讀終於不再有妥協感。

第四名 Boox Note Air 4 C 是想要彩色 e-ink 加筆記功能的生產力選擇。整體前三穩定，Paperwhite 的 Memorial Day 價就是一定要下手的訊號，Kobo 的 Google Drive 同步是這週被低估的大事。

highlights.title: Kindle Paperwhite $129.99 是 2025 版上市以來最低
highlights.body: Amazon Memorial Day 預告價贏過今年所有春季促銷。7 吋 300 ppi 螢幕加新版 Mediatek 翻頁速度在 $130（約 NT$4,090）整個價值論述完全壓死。一直在等 Paperwhite 升級的人這週直接下手就對。

highlights.title: Kobo Libra Colour 5/6 加 Google Drive 直接同步 EPUB
highlights.body: 5/6 韌體更新讓 EPUB 直接從 Google Drive 同步進來，不用再透過 Kobo 桌面 App。這種開放格式支援 Amazon 永遠不會做，這個更新把 Kobo 在拒絕被 Amazon 鎖死的買家市場的位置鞏固住。

highlights.title: Kindle Colorsoft 換 Kaleido 4 終於讓彩色電子閱讀不再有妥協感
highlights.body: Kaleido 4 面板把色彩飽和度推過漫畫跟彩色雜誌排版讀起來該有的標準，舊版 Colorsoft 那種洗白感不見了。漫畫讀者跟食譜書愛好者這群人，這是第一台我會真的推薦的彩色電子閱讀器。

references.title: Will Kobo release new e-readers in 2026?
Will Kobo Wait for Kaleido 4 Before Launching New E-Readers in 2026?
Best Color E-Readers 2026: Kobo, Kindle & More Compared

en.commentary: The e-reader market is in a holding pattern this week. E Ink's next-generation panels (Carta 1400, Kaleido 4, Gallery 4) are still in closed demos and won't ship products until 2027 at the earliest. Kobo is reportedly waiting on Kaleido 4 before releasing new color hardware, which means the current Libra Colour and Clara Colour stay relevant. The Kindle Paperwhite 2025 holds top because the Carta 1300 panel, the Kindle ecosystem, and the unbeatable battery remain the package most buyers should default to. Kobo Libra Colour at second is the answer if you prefer Pocket-style page-turn buttons, library check-out via OverDrive, and EPUB support without sideloading hassle. The Kindle Colorsoft holds third because Amazon's color implementation is good enough and the ecosystem keeps it relevant, but the value gap to the Libra Colour is real. Boox Poke 5 sneaks above the Kobo Clara BW this week because its Android-based flexibility is more useful than I weighted it before, especially for people who want library apps and audiobook services beyond Amazon and Kobo. The Boox Palma 2 holds the niche-but-real palm-sized e-reader slot. The Kindle Scribe 2025 and reMarkable 2 are notes-first devices, the Scribe is the better buy if you want both reading and notes, the reMarkable is for people who already love the brand. Boox Page is the underwhelming middle child, hard to recommend at MSRP.

highlights.title: E Ink next-gen panels stuck in closed demo
highlights.body: Carta 1400, Kaleido 4, Gallery 4 won't ship until 2027. Current panels stay relevant for at least another year, so buy with confidence today.

highlights.title: Kindle Paperwhite 2025 stays the default
highlights.body: Carta 1300, Amazon ecosystem, weeks of battery. Most readers should start here unless they have a specific reason to deviate.

highlights.title: Kobo Libra Colour is the EPUB and library winner
highlights.body: Page-turn buttons, OverDrive integration, and color Kaleido 3. The pick if you live outside the Amazon ecosystem.

highlights.title: Boox Poke 5 climbs on Android flexibility
highlights.body: Library apps, audiobook services, and PDF flexibility in a portable size. Worth the slight rough edges if you read across multiple platforms.

highlights.title: Skip Boox Page at MSRP
highlights.body: Underwhelming compared to siblings. Wait for a meaningful discount or move to Poke 5 or Palma 2.

zh-tw.commentary: 這禮拜電子閱讀器市場進入觀望期。E Ink 下一代面板（Carta 1400、Kaleido 4、Gallery 4）目前都還在閉門 demo，最快也要 2027 才會出產品。Kobo 據傳要等 Kaleido 4 才出新彩色硬體，意思就是現役 Libra Colour 跟 Clara Colour 還會繼續主打。Kindle Paperwhite 2025 守榜首，Carta 1300 面板、Kindle 生態、續航無敵這個組合對大多數人就是預設答案。Kobo Libra Colour 第二位給愛實體翻頁鍵、要 OverDrive 圖書館借閱、要原生 EPUB 支援不想 side-load 的人。Kindle Colorsoft 第三，亞馬遜彩色實作夠用，生態加分讓它撐住，可是性價比真的輸 Libra Colour。Boox Poke 5 這週超車 Kobo Clara BW，理由是它 Android 系統的彈性我以前低估了，要裝圖書館 App、聽書 App 不只用亞馬遜跟 Kobo 的人就買它。Boox Palma 2 守住手掌大小那個小眾位置。Kindle Scribe 2025 跟 reMarkable 2 都是筆記優先，要兼顧閱讀就買 Scribe，喜歡 reMarkable 品牌調性的就維持。Boox Page 是夾心餅乾，原價買不太划算。

highlights.title: E Ink 下一代面板還在 demo
highlights.body: Carta 1400、Kaleido 4、Gallery 4 要 2027 才上市。現役面板至少還能用一年以上，現在買不用怕馬上過時。

highlights.title: Kindle Paperwhite 2025 還是預設選項
highlights.body: Carta 1300、亞馬遜生態、續航好幾週。沒有特殊需求的話，從這裡開始選就對了。

highlights.title: Kobo Libra Colour 是 EPUB 跟圖書館之王
highlights.body: 實體翻頁鍵、OverDrive 整合、彩色 Kaleido 3。不用亞馬遜生態的人就選這台。

highlights.title: Boox Poke 5 靠 Android 彈性爬升
highlights.body: 可以裝圖書館 App、聽書 App，PDF 也方便，攜帶尺寸剛好。跨平台閱讀的人就買它，犧牲一點精緻度但是值得。

highlights.title: Boox Page 原價先別買
highlights.body: 跟同門兄弟比起來真的不夠突出。等大降價再說，不然就直接看 Poke 5 或 Palma 2。

references.title: Will Kobo release new e-readers in 2026?
Will Kobo Wait for Kaleido 4 Before Launching New E-Readers in 2026?
Best Color E-Readers 2026: Kobo, Kindle & More Compared

en.commentary: E-reader rankings hold this weekend. Kindle Paperwhite 2025 stays at number one because the seven-inch glare-free display, the eight-week battery life, and the price under one hundred sixty dollars together make this the only e-reader I would recommend to a buyer who is not committed to a non-Amazon ecosystem. Kobo Libra Colour takes second for buyers who want a Kindle alternative that supports library-borrowed EPUB files plus the optional color E Ink for highlighting and graphic novels. Kindle Colorsoft rounds out the top three because Amazon finally got the color E Ink price down to a reasonable level. The mid-tier slate is unchanged with Boox Page for buyers who want Android-based e-reader flexibility, the PocketBook Era for buyers who refuse Amazon and Kobo, and the Onyx Boox Note Air 4C for the larger note-taking form factor. The watch story is the mooInk V foldable e-reader with its pocket-sized 8-inch display, which is the most interesting category-shift since color E Ink. Mother's Day weekend buy advice: Amazon ecosystem buyers go Paperwhite 2025, Kobo or library-EPUB buyers go Libra Colour, color readers go Colorsoft.

highlights.title: Paperwhite 2025 is the Amazon-ecosystem default
highlights.body: Seven-inch glare-free plus eight-week battery plus sub-one-sixty price. The right pick unless you reject Amazon.

highlights.title: Kobo Libra Colour wins library EPUBs
highlights.body: Library-borrowed EPUB support plus color E Ink option. Right pick for Kindle alternative seekers.

highlights.title: Kindle Colorsoft is the affordable color pick
highlights.body: Amazon finally got color E Ink to a reasonable price. Right pick for buyers who want color in Amazon ecosystem.

highlights.title: mooInk V foldable is the watch story
highlights.body: Pocket-sized 8-inch foldable display is the most interesting category-shift since color E Ink.

highlights.title: Pick by ecosystem first
highlights.body: Amazon, Kobo, or non-aligned each have a clear right answer. Ecosystem matters more than specs.

zh-tw.commentary: 電子書閱讀器排名這週不動。Kindle Paperwhite 2025 守第一，七吋無眩光螢幕、八週續航、台幣四千八的價格，這個組合是不執著於非 Amazon 生態系的買家唯一推薦。Kobo Libra Colour 第二，給想要 Kindle 替代品又支援圖書館借閱 EPUB 加可選彩色電子墨水標記跟圖像小說的買家。Kindle Colorsoft 第三，因為 Amazon 終於把彩色電子墨水價格壓到合理。中段沒變，Boox Page 給想要 Android 電子書彈性的、PocketBook Era 給拒絕 Amazon 跟 Kobo 的、Onyx Boox Note Air 4C 大尺寸做筆記用。觀察重點是台灣讀墨 mooInk V 摺疊電子書閱讀器，口袋大小 8 吋顯示，是彩色電子墨水之後品類最有趣的轉變。母親節週末建議：Amazon 生態系買 Paperwhite 2025，Kobo 或要借圖書館 EPUB 的買 Libra Colour，要彩色買 Colorsoft。台灣讀者買 Kindle 中文書要走美國 Amazon，Kobo 中文書比較完整，這個差異要考慮。

highlights.title: Paperwhite 2025 Amazon 生態預設
highlights.body: 七吋無眩光加八週續航加台幣四千八，不拒絕 Amazon 就買它。

highlights.title: Kobo Libra Colour 圖書館 EPUB 王
highlights.body: 支援圖書館借閱加彩色電子墨水，找 Kindle 替代品就選它。

highlights.title: Kindle Colorsoft 親民彩色選擇
highlights.body: Amazon 終於把彩色電子墨水壓到合理價，Amazon 派要彩色就買它。

highlights.title: mooInk V 摺疊觀察
highlights.body: 口袋 8 吋摺疊是彩色電子墨水之後最有趣的轉變。

highlights.title: 看生態系挑
highlights.body: Amazon、Kobo、其他各有解答，生態系比規格重要。

references.title: The Best Ereaders for 2026
Best e-reader 2026
Best ereader 2026

en.commentary: Tuesday after Mother's Day weekend is the right time to talk about e-readers honestly, because most of the late-April gift orders just landed in mailboxes and the rest of us are deciding whether the upgrade is worth it. Kindle Paperwhite 2025 holds first because the 7-inch display, the faster Oxide controller, and the seven-week battery still beat every competitor on raw reading experience. The Kindle store integration matters more than purists admit; samples, family library sharing, and Libby pickup are friction-free. Kobo Libra Colour stays at two because the Kaleido 3 panel finally feels purposeful with the page-turn buttons, and Kobo Plus is the answer if you read more than five books a month and do not want to pay per title. Kindle Colorsoft at three is still the best color Kindle, although the warm tint complaint from last year is still partly true and the value score reflects that. Kobo Clara Colour at four is the pocket-friendly color pick. Boox Palma 2 and Poke5 cover the Android camp for people who want library apps on a single device. Kindle Scribe 2025 and reMarkable 2 anchor the writing tablets, and they are niche picks, not default ones. The market message in May is steady. None of the newer Boox or reMarkable refreshes change the core hierarchy, and the Kindle and Kobo flagships keep the top of the chart unchanged. I would buy without waiting unless you specifically want to see the Computex peripheral news cycle first.

highlights.title: Kindle Paperwhite 2025 is still the e-reader to buy first
highlights.body: 7-inch glare-free panel, faster page turns, and a battery that lasts genuine weeks. The Kindle store and Libby integration are friction-free in a way Kobo cannot match in the US.

highlights.title: Kobo Libra Colour wins if you want page-turn buttons and a real ecosystem
highlights.body: Kaleido 3 panel, asymmetric chassis with physical buttons, and Kobo Plus as the smarter subscription if your reading volume is above ten books a month.

highlights.title: Kindle Colorsoft is the color Kindle worth recommending now
highlights.body: Amazon's color filter array still washes warm tones slightly, but the 2025 firmware update fixed the yellow-band issue and the integration is the same Kindle reliability.

highlights.title: Boox Palma 2 stays the niche pick for phone-format readers
highlights.body: If you want to read in line at coffee shops without unlocking a phone, the Palma 2 is the only device shaped like a phone that does e-ink right. Not a default pick, but a smart second device.

zh-tw.commentary: 母親節週末過完，星期二聊電子書閱讀器剛好，因為四月底送禮的單剛到，其他人正在判斷自己要不要升級。Kindle Paperwhite 2025 還是榜首，7 吋螢幕、新版 Oxide 控制器、七週續航這套組合，純閱讀體驗目前沒對手。Kindle 商店整合老實說比書評人講的還重要，試閱、家庭共享、Libby 借書都很順。Kobo Libra Colour 第二，Kaleido 3 螢幕配實體翻頁鍵終於有了存在感，每月看超過五本書的人選 Kobo Plus 就對了，按本買真的虧。Kindle Colorsoft 第三，去年偏黃的抱怨講真的還有部分成立，CP 值分數就是反映這點。Kobo Clara Colour 第四，輕便彩色款。Boox Palma 2 跟 Poke5 守住 Android 派系，想在一台設備裝多家圖書館 App 的人選這條路。Kindle Scribe 2025 跟 reMarkable 2 收尾，這兩台是寫字平板，講真的不是預設選項，是有特定需求才買。

highlights.title: Kindle Paperwhite 2025 還是首推
highlights.body: 7 吋無眩光面板、翻頁更快、續航是貨真價實的好幾週。Kindle 商店跟 Libby 整合順到 Kobo 在美國追不上，台灣水貨 NT$ 五千出頭很值。

highlights.title: Kobo Libra Colour 有實體翻頁鍵的彩色首選
highlights.body: Kaleido 3 加上不對稱機身的物理按鍵，每月讀超過十本書的人配 Kobo Plus 訂閱直接划算到笑。

highlights.title: Kindle Colorsoft 我現在敢推
highlights.body: 亞馬遜 2025 韌體把黃斑問題修好了，色彩濾光還是會偏暖，但 Kindle 系統穩定度照舊。台灣水貨約 NT$ 八千，預算夠想要彩色直接這台。

highlights.title: Boox Palma 2 手機形狀閱讀器小眾首選
highlights.body: 我自己排隊買咖啡都看 Palma 2，省掉解鎖手機被通知打斷。坦白講不是第一台，但當第二台超實用。

references.title: Kindle Paperwhite 2025 firmware 5.18.1 fixes library sync delay
Kobo Libra Colour gets contrast adjustment in firmware 4.42.1
Boox Palma 2 review by The Verge

en.commentary: Kindle Paperwhite 2025 holds first and the firmware push this week resolved the library sync delay that has been the most consistent complaint since launch. For most readers this is the easiest e-reader recommendation in the market. Kobo Libra Colour shipped firmware 4.42.1 with proper contrast adjustment, which is the feature that closed the readability gap with the Kindle Colorsoft. Small score bump earned, second place unchanged. Kindle Colorsoft is still the right pick for anyone deep in the Amazon ecosystem who wants color, but Kobo's open EPUB support is genuinely the right answer for everyone else. Kobo Clara Colour, Boox Palma 2, Boox Poke5, Kobo Clara BW, and Boox Page are all unchanged. The Verge's Palma 2 review this week is positive but does not move the leaderboard because the device's strength has always been niche pocket-portability, not mainstream reading. Market is quiet, no Memorial Day promotion announced yet that would move the rankings.

highlights.title: Kindle Paperwhite 2025 library sync fix lifts the last complaint
highlights.body: Firmware 5.18.1 resolves the sync delay that has been the most durable complaint since launch. With this fixed, the Paperwhite is the easiest e-reader recommendation in the market by a clear margin.

highlights.title: Kobo Libra Colour contrast adjustment closes the gap with Colorsoft
highlights.body: Firmware 4.42.1 adds the contrast control that was the gap between Libra Colour and Kindle Colorsoft on readability. Kobo's open EPUB support means it is now the right answer for anyone outside the Amazon ecosystem.

highlights.title: Boox Palma 2 is a great niche product, not a mainstream pick
highlights.body: The Verge review confirms Palma 2's pocket-portability strengths and the Android side-loading flexibility. For pocket reading and library app access this is the right pick. For mainstream reading the Paperwhite still wins.

zh-tw.commentary:
Kindle Paperwhite 2025 守住第一，這禮拜韌體更新解決了上市以來被抱怨最多的圖書館同步延遲。一般讀者要推薦電子書閱讀器，這台是市場上最好開口的選擇。

Kobo Libra Colour 韌體 4.42.1 加入了完整的對比度調整，這正是它跟 Kindle Colorsoft 在可讀性上的差距。值得加分，第二名守住。Kindle Colorsoft 在亞馬遜生態深度使用又想要彩色的人來說還是首選，但 Kobo 的開放 EPUB 支援對其他所有人來說真的是正確答案。

Kobo Clara Colour、Boox Palma 2、Boox Poke5、Kobo Clara BW、Boox Page 都沒動。The Verge 這禮拜的 Palma 2 評測正面，但榜單沒動，因為這台機器的強項一直是口袋可攜的小眾市場，不是主流閱讀。

市場很安靜，目前沒看到母親節有什麼促銷會改變排名。

highlights.title: Kindle Paperwhite 2025 圖書館同步修好之後最後一個抱怨點消失
highlights.body: 韌體 5.18.1 把上市以來最持續被抱怨的同步延遲解決。修好之後，市場上推薦電子書閱讀器最不用想的就是這台。

highlights.title: Kobo Libra Colour 對比度調整把跟 Colorsoft 的差距補起來
highlights.body: 韌體 4.42.1 加入對比度控制，正好是 Libra Colour 跟 Kindle Colorsoft 在可讀性上的差距。Kobo 開放 EPUB 支援讓它對沒在亞馬遜生態的人是正確答案。

highlights.title: Boox Palma 2 是優秀的小眾產品，不是主流選擇
highlights.body: The Verge 評測確認 Palma 2 在口袋可攜性跟 Android 側載彈性上的強項。口袋閱讀加上圖書 app 存取的人就選它。主流閱讀還是 Paperwhite 贏。

references.title: Kobo teasing Spring Surprise announcement at BookCon NYC
Pre-2012 Kindle e-readers lose Kindle Store access starting May 2026
Best ereaders in 2026 expert roundup

en.commentary: The Kindle Paperwhite 2025 holds the top because nothing this week changed the underlying argument: best e-ink display in its price bracket, mature library sync, and the recent firmware finally fixed the long-standing library sync delay. The Kobo Libra Colour stays at two and the case-refresh announcement at BookCon hints that Kobo's spring surprise is coming any day now, which is the one event that could shake the top end of this leaderboard. If you are shopping for a colour e-reader and you are not in a rush, wait two weeks until Kobo's announcement is on the record. The Kindle Colorsoft holds third because Alexa+ is now actively rolling out to Colorsoft and Scribe with Frontlight, which adds real utility for hands-busy reading without compromising the e-ink experience. The Kobo Clara Colour stays at four and remains the right pick for buyers who want a compact colour reader at a friendlier price than the Libra. The Boox Palma 2 holds fifth and is still the only Android-based pocket reader I recommend with a straight face. One housekeeping note: Amazon's deprecation of pre-2012 Kindles from the Kindle Store took effect this month, so if you are gifting a hand-me-down to a kid, check the model year first.

highlights.title: Wait two weeks if you are shopping a colour e-reader
highlights.body: Kobo's BookCon Spring Surprise announcement is the one event that could shake the top end. Case refresh teases plus historical May launch cadence put the probability high. Buyers in no rush should wait until the announcement is on the record.

highlights.title: Kindle Colorsoft Alexa+ rollout adds real hands-busy utility
highlights.body: Alexa+ is now actively shipping to Colorsoft and Scribe with Frontlight. For buyers who actually use voice control for reading while cooking or working out, this is a genuine value add that does not compromise the e-ink experience.

highlights.title: Pre-2012 Kindle store deprecation is now live
highlights.body: Amazon's previously announced deprecation of pre-2012 Kindles from the Kindle Store took effect this month. If you are passing down an old Kindle to a kid or partner, check the model year before assuming the store works. No effect on the current leaderboard.

zh-tw.commentary:
Kindle Paperwhite 2025 守住第一，這禮拜沒有什麼改變底層論述：同價位段最好的電子墨水螢幕、成熟的圖書館同步、最近韌體終於把長年存在的圖書館同步延遲修掉。

Kobo Libra Colour 守在第二，BookCon 的新保護套預告暗示 Kobo 春季新品就快公布了，這是唯一可能撼動榜單上半部的事件。如果你看的是彩色電子閱讀器又不急，等兩週讓 Kobo 把話說出來再決定。

Kindle Colorsoft 守第三，Alexa+ 現在正式對 Colorsoft 跟 Scribe with Frontlight 推送，雙手忙的閱讀情境下實用度有明顯加分，又沒犧牲電子墨水體驗。

Kobo Clara Colour 守第四，想要小尺寸彩色閱讀器、又不想付到 Libra 那個價位的人，它還是首選。Boox Palma 2 守第五，是市面唯一我能正經推薦的 Android 口袋閱讀器。

一個後勤提醒：Amazon 對 2012 年之前 Kindle 機型從 Kindle Store 下架的政策這個月正式生效，如果你要把舊機傳給小孩，先查清楚機型年份再說。

highlights.title: 想買彩色電子閱讀器的話，再等兩週
highlights.body: Kobo 在 BookCon 預告的春季新品是唯一可能撼動榜單上半部的事件。新保護套先行加上歷年五月發新機的慣性，機率很高。不急的買家等到 Kobo 正式公布再決定。

highlights.title: Kindle Colorsoft 開始推 Alexa+，雙手忙的閱讀加分
highlights.body: Alexa+ 現在正式對 Colorsoft 跟 Scribe with Frontlight 推送。會在煮飯或運動時用語音控制閱讀的人，這是真實有感的加分，又不犧牲電子墨水體驗。

highlights.title: 2012 年前 Kindle 下架 Kindle Store 政策已生效
highlights.body: Amazon 之前預告的 2012 年前 Kindle 機型從商店下架，這個月正式生效。要把舊 Kindle 傳給小孩或伴侶之前，先查機型年份，不然會發現買不到書。不影響現有排名。

references.title: Best e-readers 2026 spring update
Kobo Libra Colour review
Kindle Paperwhite Memorial Day deal Day 2

en.commentary: Kindle Paperwhite Signature Edition stays first and Day 2 of Memorial Day week kept the $159 Monday opener with no further movement, which is the holiday-week stability signal that confirms this is the year's floor and not a flash listing. Amazon also added a free three-month Kindle Unlimited trial on the listing today, which is the kind of soft accessory throw-in that nudges the upgrade math for buyers on a four-year-old basic Kindle. Kobo Libra Colour holds second on the color screen and the Pocket plus Overdrive integration, the April firmware page-turn improvement remains the upgrade that finally makes the colored E Ink panel feel snappy. Kindle Colorsoft at third holds the Amazon ecosystem color play and price held through today, but the first-gen panel color saturation gap versus Kobo is unchanged. Boox Page at fourth is still the Android-based pick for power users who want apps on E Ink. reMarkable Paper Pro holds the writing-focused pick and this month's cloud sync improvements remain the right upgrade. Kindle Scribe stays in the back half because writing experience still trails reMarkable. Kobo Clara 2E and the regular Kindle round out the budget tier, value math is fine but upgrade urgency is genuinely low this cycle, and I would wait for back-to-school promotions rather than chase the budget tier this week.

highlights.title: Paperwhite Signature at $159 held on Day 2, year's floor confirmed
highlights.body: Monday opener pricing held across Amazon on Tuesday with no further movement, which is the holiday-week stability signal. Year's floor confirmed and not a flash listing. Free three-month Kindle Unlimited trial added today is the soft throw-in that locks the upgrade argument.

highlights.title: Kobo Libra Colour April firmware still the right upgrade story
highlights.body: Page-turn responsiveness on the colored E Ink panel after April firmware remains the upgrade that finally made the Libra Colour feel as snappy as monochrome Kindles. Pocket plus Overdrive integration keeps it the right pick for anyone outside the Amazon ecosystem.

highlights.title: Budget tier upgrade urgency genuinely low this week
highlights.body: Kobo Clara 2E and regular Kindle held their prices on Day 2 with no notable movement. Value math is fine but the upgrade urgency is low this cycle. Wait for back-to-school promotions rather than chase the budget tier during a Memorial Day week dominated by the OLED and TV categories.

zh-tw.commentary:
Kindle Paperwhite Signature Edition 守第一，國殤日週第二天守住週一 NT$4,800 開跑價，沒再動，這就是節日週穩定訊號，確認這是今年底價、不是閃電價。

講真的，Amazon 今天還在商品頁加贈三個月免費 Kindle Unlimited 試用，這種軟性加碼會把四年前舊款基本 Kindle 用戶的升級帳面往這邊推。

Kobo Libra Colour 守第二靠彩色螢幕加 Pocket 加 Overdrive 整合，四月韌體改善翻頁速度還是讓彩色 E Ink 終於跟單色 Kindle 一樣俐落的關鍵升級。

Kindle Colorsoft 第三守 Amazon 生態系彩色之選，價格今天守住，但第一代面板的色彩飽和度跟 Kobo 的差距沒變。

Boox Page 第四還是 Android 基底進階使用者選擇。reMarkable Paper Pro 守寫作之選，這個月的雲端同步改善還是對的升級。Kindle Scribe 守後半段，寫作體驗追不上 reMarkable。

Kobo Clara 2E 跟普通 Kindle 收尾預算帶，C/P 值還行但這個週期升級必要性真的低，老實說等開學季促銷比這禮拜追預算款好，國殤日週的行銷預算都灌到 OLED 跟電視那邊去了。

highlights.title: Paperwhite Signature NT$4,800 第二天守住、確認年度底價
highlights.body: 週一開跑價週二在 Amazon 守住沒動，這就是節日週穩定訊號。年度底價確認、不是閃電價。今天加贈三個月 Kindle Unlimited 試用就是把升級論述鎖死的軟性加碼。

highlights.title: Kobo Libra Colour 四月韌體還是對的升級故事

en.commentary: Friday morning the e-reader category is one of the small but meaningful MD weekend stories because Amazon dropped the Kindle lineup to the lowest prices of 2026 so far. Kindle Paperwhite (2025) holds first at $129 with the $30 Amazon MD cut, the 7-inch glare-free display plus the 12-week battery plus the new color temperature controls makes this genuinely the best reading device on the market at the price, and at $129 the value math against any Kobo competitor is decisive. Kobo Libra Colour at second drops to $199 with the $20 cut, the color E Ink Kaleido 3 panel plus the page-turn buttons plus the open ePub support is the right pick for buyers who refuse the Amazon ecosystem and want stylus annotation. Kindle Colorsoft at third holds $279 with the $50 MD cut, Amazon's color e-reader entry plus the Kindle library integration is the right pick for buyers in the Amazon ecosystem who want color for cookbooks and magazines. Kobo Clara Colour stays at $149 with the $10 cut as the budget color pick. Boox Palma 2 holds fifth at $269 with the Android 13 reading device that handles Libby plus Kindle plus Kobo apps in one unit. Verdict for Friday: Paperwhite at $129 is the buy of the weekend for monochrome reading, Colorsoft at $279 if you want color in the Amazon ecosystem, Kobo Libra Colour at $199 if you want open-format flexibility. Amazon rarely discounts Kindles outside Prime Day, so the $129 floor is the right window.

highlights.body: Amazon cut $30 bringing the Paperwhite to $129, the lowest tracked price for the 2025 model. The 7-inch glare-free display plus the 12-week battery plus the new color temperature controls makes this the best reading device at the price, and the value math against Kobo is decisive.

highlights.title: Kobo Libra Colour at $199 wins on open formats
highlights.body: The $20 MD cut brings the Libra Colour to $199 with the Kaleido 3 color panel and the open ePub support. For buyers who refuse the Amazon walled garden and want stylus annotation plus library lending without conversion, this is the right pick at the price.

highlights.title: Kindle Colorsoft drops $50 to $279
highlights.body: Amazon's color e-reader at $279 is the right pick for buyers in the Amazon ecosystem who want color for cookbooks, magazines, and graphic novels. The Kindle library integration plus the Whispersync handoff to Audible makes the value math defensible against the Kobo color line.

en.commentary: Memorial Day Sunday is when summer reading hardware peaks for value, and tomorrow's MD Monday will mostly be retailers hoping you missed the real deal today. I have been an e-reader user for over a decade and the 2025 Kindle Paperwhite is the device I recommend without hesitation right now. Amazon has it at $124 for the weekend, $36 off MSRP, which is the lowest the new model has been since launch. The 7-inch 300 ppi display reads beautifully in direct Florida sun, the 10-week battery means I packed it for a two-week trip last month and never touched a charger, and the IPX8 rating handles poolside slips. For the color enthusiast, the Kobo Libra Colour at $199 right now is the smarter buy than Kindle Colorsoft in my opinion. Physical page-turn buttons are a game-changer for one-handed beach reading, and Kobo's Libby and OverDrive integration means free library borrowing without ever leaving the device. I have not opened the Kindle store on mine in months. For the power user who wants Android freedom, the Boox Palma 2 at $229 is the wildcard pick. Phone-sized E Ink running Kindle, Kobo, Libby, and any manga app you want, all on a glare-free screen that fits in a swim trunk pocket. My Sunday call: pick your bracket, click before Tuesday's reset, and start summer with a fresh stack of digital books. The Kindle deal especially will not return until Prime Day in July.

highlights.title: Kindle Paperwhite 2025 at $124 is the no-brainer summer buy
highlights.body: $36 off MSRP, 7-inch 300 ppi glare-free display, 10-week battery, IPX8 waterproof. Lowest price since launch and exactly what you want for two weeks at the beach.

highlights.title: Kobo Libra Colour at $199 wins for library lovers
highlights.body: Physical page-turn buttons, Kaleido 3 color, IPX8 waterproof, and the best Libby and OverDrive integration shipping. $30 off and the cleanest path to free summer reads.

highlights.title: Boox Palma 2 at $229 is the power-user wildcard
highlights.body: Phone-sized Android E Ink runs Kindle, Kobo, Libby, and any manga app on a glare-free screen that fits in a pocket. The most flexible reading hardware you can buy this Sunday.

zh-tw.commentary: 國殤日週日是夏季閱讀硬體 CP 值的最高峰，明天 MD 週一通常剩貨就比較零碎。我用電子書閱讀器超過十年了，現在毫不猶豫推 2025 款 Kindle Paperwhite。台灣代購商城這週末壓在 NT$4,290，比平常便宜九百，是新款上市以來最低點。7 吋 300 ppi 螢幕在墾丁大太陽下看書完全沒反光，10 週續航讓我上個月去日本兩週都沒帶充電器，IPX8 防水掉游泳池撈起來繼續看。彩色派玩家，我老實說，今天 Kobo Libra Colour 蝦皮商城 NT$6,490 比 Kindle Colorsoft 更值得買。實體翻頁鍵單手在海邊翻書真的爽，Kobo 的 Libby 和 OverDrive 圖書館借閱整合度業界最強，台灣讀者搭配北市圖數位資源庫直接免費讀。我自己這台買半年沒進過 Kindle 商店。要自由度的話，Boox Palma 2 今天 NT$7,490 是最特別的選擇。手機尺寸 E Ink 跑完整 Android，Kindle App、博客來 App、漫畫 App 全裝得下，泳褲口袋就能放。講真的，今晚就挑你的等級下手，週二價格就回到讓你後悔的位置。Kindle 這個價要等到七月 Prime Day 才會再出現。

references.title: Post-Memorial Day E-Reader Pricing Tracker: Kindle Paperwhite Lifts to $134
Best E-Readers for Father's Day 2026: Three Picks for Summer Reading Dads
Kobo Libra Colour Long-Term Review: Six Months of Library Loans Tested

en.commentary: Friday after Memorial Day and the e-reader pricing has settled in the post-holiday window. Amazon lifted the Kindle Paperwhite 2025 from $124 doorbuster to $134, still a healthy $26 below MSRP. Kobo Libra Colour held the $199 line through the week. Father's Day is three weeks out and e-readers are the easiest summer gift to ship without size or color anxiety. The Kindle Paperwhite 2025 stays my unconditional top pick at $134 because the 7-inch 300 ppi glare-free display reads in direct sun, the ten-week battery means dad will not call asking for a charger, and IPX8 waterproof handles poolside accidents during summer vacation. For the dad who borrows everything from the public library, the Kobo Libra Colour at $199 is the smarter buy than Kindle Colorsoft in my opinion. Physical page-turn buttons make one-handed reading on a hammock genuinely pleasant, and Kobo's Libby and OverDrive integration delivers free library borrowing without the Kindle ecosystem lock-in. For the power-user dad who wants Android flexibility, the Boox Palma 2 at $229 is the wildcard pick. Phone-sized E Ink running Kindle, Kobo, and any reading app you want fits in a swim trunk pocket. Friday end-of-week shoppers should lock in Father's Day gifts now because the next genuine discount window is Prime Day in mid-July, well after Father's Day. The current pricing is the cleanest path to a great summer reading gift without rush shipping anxiety.

highlights.title: Kindle Paperwhite 2025 at $134 is the Father's Day no-brainer
highlights.body: 7-inch 300 ppi glare-free display, ten-week battery, IPX8 waterproof, and Amazon's full ecosystem at $26 off MSRP. This is the gift I send to dads who will not call me for setup help afterward.

highlights.title: Kobo Libra Colour at $199 wins for library-loving dads
highlights.body: Physical page-turn buttons, Kaleido 3 color, IPX8 waterproof, and the best Libby integration shipping. For dads who borrow from the public library every week, this beats Kindle Colorsoft on long-term reading enjoyment.

highlights.title: Boox Palma 2 at $229 is the power-user dad pick
highlights.body: Phone-sized Android E Ink runs Kindle, Kobo, Libby, and any reading app on a glare-free screen that fits in a swim trunk pocket. Perfect for the dad who reads across multiple stores and wants no ecosystem lock-in.

zh-tw.commentary: Memorial Day 過後的禮拜五，電子書閱讀器價格穩在後連假窗口。Kindle Paperwhite 2025 代購商城從連假特價 NT$4,290 拉回 NT$4,490，還是比平常便宜七百。Kobo Libra Colour 蝦皮商城整週穩在 NT$6,490。父親節距今三週，電子書是最容易送的夏季禮物，沒有尺寸顏色困擾。Kindle Paperwhite 2025 NT$4,490 還是我無條件推第一名，7 吋 300 ppi 防眩光螢幕大太陽下不反光、10 週續航讓爸爸不會打電話問充電、IPX8 防水夏天度假掉游泳池撈起來繼續讀。借閱型爸爸的話，我老實說 Kobo Libra Colour NT$6,490 比 Kindle Colorsoft 更值得買。實體翻頁鍵躺在吊床單手翻書真的爽，Kobo 的 Libby 和 OverDrive 圖書館借閱整合是業界最強，搭配北市圖數位資源庫直接免費讀，沒有 Kindle 生態鎖。要 Android 自由度的進階爸爸，Boox Palma 2 代購 NT$7,490 是隱藏王牌，手機尺寸 E Ink 跑完整 Android，Kindle App、博客來、漫畫 App 全裝得下，泳褲口袋就放。週五下班就把父親節禮物下訂，下一波像樣的折扣要等到七月中 Prime Day，那時候已經過父親節。現在這個價位是不用擔心急件運費的最乾淨選擇。

highlights.title: Kindle Paperwhite 2025 NT$4,490 是父親節必送
highlights.body: 7 吋 300 ppi 防眩光螢幕加 10 週續航加 IPX8 防水，亞馬遜完整生態系便宜七百。這台我會直接送給長輩，事後完全不會被叫去設定。

highlights.title: Kobo Libra Colour NT$6,490 是借閱派爸爸首選
highlights.body: 實體翻頁鍵加 Kaleido 3 彩色加 IPX8 防水，Libby 整合業界最強。每週去圖書館借書的爸爸，長期閱讀爽度勝過 Kindle Colorsoft。

highlights.title: Boox Palma 2 NT$7,490 是進階玩家爸爸首選
highlights.body: 手機尺寸 Android E Ink 跑 Kindle、博客來、漫畫 App，防眩光螢幕泳褲口袋就放。爸爸在多個書城買書、不想被生態鎖住就是這台。

en.commentary:
Sunday May 31, Kindle Paperwhite 2025 holds the top position and the justification is comprehensive. The Paperwhite 2025 delivers the best balance of display quality, battery life, and ecosystem depth of any dedicated e-reader available. The 300 PPI E Ink display with front-lit warmth adjustment is the correct reading display for long sessions, the battery runs six to eight weeks on a single charge for typical readers, and Amazon's Kindle store is the largest ebook library in the world. At $159 it is not the cheapest e-reader, but the cost-per-use over a year of regular reading is unmatched.

Kobo Libra Colour holds second at $179 and for readers who want physical page-turn buttons plus color display capability, it is the recommendation I give over the Kindle Colorsoft. The Kaleido 3 color e-ink display renders comics, illustrated non-fiction, and magazine layouts genuinely well without sacrificing the text readability that makes e-readers superior to tablets for long reading sessions. The physical buttons on the Libra are a usability advantage that touch-only readers underestimate.

Kindle Colorsoft holds third at $249 for the 7-inch Kaleido 3 display at 300 PPI with Amazon's full store access. For readers already in the Kindle ecosystem who want color without moving to Kobo, the Colorsoft is the correct choice. Kobo Clara Colour holds fourth at $129 as the most affordable mainstream color e-reader.

Boox Palma 2 holds fifth for readers who want Android app support on an e-ink device in a phone form factor. Kindle Scribe 2025 holds ninth for the note-taking use case.

highlights.title: Kindle Paperwhite 2025 at $159 is the best e-reader for most people
highlights.body: 300 PPI display with warmth adjustment, six-to-eight week battery, and access to the world's largest ebook library. The combination of hardware quality and Amazon's ecosystem is unmatched at this price. For readers who want a no-compromise daily reading device, Paperwhite 2025 is the recommendation.

highlights.title: Kobo Libra Colour at $179 is the best color e-reader with physical buttons
highlights.body: Kaleido 3 color e-ink with physical page-turn buttons makes this the best choice for comics, illustrated books, and magazine readers who want color without sacrificing text readability. Physical buttons are a genuine usability advantage for single-hand reading sessions.

highlights.title: Kobo Clara Colour at $129 is the most affordable mainstream color e-reader
highlights.body: For readers who want color capability without the price of the Libra Colour or Kindle Colorsoft, the Clara Colour is the entry point. At $129 it is the cheapest mainstream color e-reader available and Kobo's software and library access are competitive with Kindle.

zh-tw.commentary:
5/31 星期日 Kindle Paperwhite 2025 守住電子書閱讀器第一，理由很全面。Paperwhite 2025 在螢幕品質、電池壽命跟生態深度上提供任何專用電子書閱讀器裡最好的平衡。300 PPI E Ink 螢幕加前光暖色調整是長時間閱讀的正確螢幕，電池一次充電典型閱讀者可用六到八週，Amazon Kindle 商店是全球最大電子書庫。USD$159（約 NT$5,290）不是最便宜，但一年定期閱讀的使用成本沒得比。

Kobo Libra Colour 守第二 USD$179（約 NT$5,990），想要實體翻頁按鈕加彩色螢幕的讀者，這是我比 Kindle Colorsoft 更推薦的選擇。Kaleido 3 彩色電子墨水對漫畫、圖文非虛構跟雜誌版面的渲染效果相當好，同時不犧牲讓電子書閱讀器比平板更適合長時間閱讀的文字可讀性。Libra 的實體按鈕是觸控派讀者低估的易用性優勢。

Kindle Colorsoft 守第三 USD$249（約 NT$8,290），7 吋 300 PPI Kaleido 3 加 Amazon 完整書庫。已在 Kindle 生態系、想要彩色又不想換 Kobo 的讀者，Colorsoft 是正確選擇。Kobo Clara Colour 守第四 USD$129（約 NT$4,290），最親民的主流彩色電子書閱讀器。

Boox Palma 2 守第五，適合想在電子墨水裝置上跑 Android App 且偏好手機外型的讀者。Kindle Scribe 2025 守第九，手寫筆記使用場景的選擇。

highlights.title: Kindle Paperwhite 2025 NT$5,290，大多數人最好的電子書閱讀器
highlights.body: 300 PPI 暖色調整螢幕、六到八週電池、全球最大電子書庫。硬體品質加 Amazon 生態的組合在這個價位無可匹敵。想要日常閱讀不妥協裝置的讀者，Paperwhite 2025 是推薦。

highlights.title: Kobo Libra Colour NT$5,990，有實體按鈕的最佳彩色電子書閱讀器
highlights.body: Kaleido 3 彩色電子墨水加實體翻頁按鈕，是漫畫、圖文書、雜誌讀者想要彩色又不犧牲文字可讀性的最佳選擇。實體按鈕對單手閱讀場景是真實的易用性優勢。

highlights.title: Kobo Clara Colour NT$4,290，最親民的主流彩色電子書閱讀器
highlights.body: 想要彩色功能但不想付 Libra Colour 或 Kindle Colorsoft 價格的讀者，Clara Colour 是入口。NT$4,290 是目前最便宜的主流彩色電子書閱讀器，Kobo 的軟體跟書庫跟 Kindle 有競爭力。

references.title: Best ereaders in 2026: 9 top ebook readers from Kindle, Kobo and more tested
What new e-readers will Kobo release in 2026?
Amazon Kindle Vs. Kobo: Which E-Reader Is Right For You?

en.commentary: The e-reader debate in 2026 has finally moved past pixels, and that shift is the single most useful thing I can tell a buyer this week. Screen quality across Kindle, Kobo, and Boox is now close enough that the real divider is software philosophy. Kindle stays tightly optimized for Amazon's store, while Kobo leans into native format support, deep typography controls, and seamless public library borrowing. That framing is exactly why my top two hold. The Kindle Paperwhite 2025 keeps rank one because it nails the fundamentals readers feel every night, a fast crisp display, multi-week battery, and the smoothest store-to-page pipeline in the category. For most people who just want to read, it is the easiest recommendation I can make. The Kobo Libra Colour stays at rank two and remains my pick for the per-dollar value crowd, because its format flexibility and library integration give you genuine control over your own reading life. I am noting one piece of housekeeping news this week: the Boox Palma 2 has been discontinued. It still sits on my board on current stock, but I would not chase a fresh unit at inflated pricing now that supply is drying up. Kobo has also signaled that color is its future, with a refreshed Clara Colour and BW generation expected, so anyone eyeing a long hold might wait to see those land. I am keeping the full order steady today. Nothing this week beats the Paperwhite on reliability or the Libra Colour on value, and those two anchors still define the smart buy.

highlights.title: Software, not screens, divides 2026
highlights.body: Panel quality has converged, so the real choice is philosophy: Kindle's store optimization versus Kobo's format freedom and library borrowing. That is the lens I rank by now.

highlights.title: Paperwhite 2025 holds rank one
highlights.body: Fast crisp display, multi-week battery, and the smoothest store-to-page experience make it the easiest recommendation for anyone who simply wants to read.

highlights.title: Libra Colour is the value pick
highlights.body: Format flexibility plus seamless library integration keep the Kobo Libra Colour at rank two as the best per-dollar choice for readers who want control.

highlights.title: Boox Palma 2 discontinued
highlights.body: The pocketable Palma 2 has been discontinued. It stays on my list on current stock, but I would not pay inflated prices chasing fresh units now.

highlights.title: Kobo is going all-in on color
highlights.body: Kobo has signaled a refreshed Clara Colour and BW generation ahead. Long-hold buyers may want to wait for those to land before committing.

zh-tw.commentary: 2026 年的電子閱讀器之爭，終於不再糾結在像素上，這個轉變是我這週最想先講給買家聽的事。Kindle、Kobo、Boox 之間的螢幕素質已經接近到，真正的分水嶺變成軟體哲學。Kindle 緊緊綁著 Amazon 書店優化，Kobo 則主打原生格式支援、深度排版控制，還有順暢到不行的公共圖書館借閱。這個框架剛好解釋了我前兩名為什麼不動。Kindle Paperwhite 2025 守住第一，因為它把讀者每晚都會有感的基本功做好了，螢幕快又清晰，續航好幾週，從書店到頁面那條動線是這類別最順的。對大多數只想好好看書的人，它就是我最好開口推薦的那台。Kobo Libra Colour 守在第二，依然是我推給看重每塊錢價值那群人的首選，因為它的格式彈性跟圖書館整合，讓你真正掌握自己的閱讀生活。這週我也要記一筆消息：Boox Palma 2 已經停產。靠現有庫存它還留在榜上，但供貨開始乾的現在，我不會去追加價的全新機。Kobo 也放話彩色才是它的未來，預期會有改版的 Clara Colour 跟 BW 世代，所以打算長期持有的人，或許可以等那幾台先落地。我今天整份排序維持不動。這週沒有任何機種在可靠度上贏 Paperwhite，也沒有在性價比上贏 Libra Colour，這兩個定錨依然界定了聰明的買點。

highlights.title: 2026 看軟體不看螢幕
highlights.body: 面板素質已經收斂，真正的選擇變成哲學之爭：Kindle 的書店優化 對上 Kobo 的格式自由跟圖書館借閱。我現在就用這個角度排名。

highlights.title: Paperwhite 2025 守住第一
highlights.body: 螢幕快又清晰、續航好幾週、書店到頁面最順，對只想好好看書的人來說，這是我最好開口的推薦。

highlights.title: Libra Colour 是性價比首選
highlights.body: 格式彈性加上順暢的圖書館整合，讓 Kobo Libra Colour 穩居第二，是想掌握自己閱讀生活那群人最划算的選擇。

highlights.title: Boox Palma 2 停產
highlights.body: 口袋型的 Palma 2 已經停產。靠現有庫存它還在榜上，但我不會為了追全新機去付加價的錢。

highlights.title: Kobo 全面押注彩色
highlights.body: Kobo 已經放話會有改版的 Clara Colour 跟 BW 世代。打算長期持有的買家，或許可以等那幾台落地再決定。

en.commentary:
The e-reader market in June 2026 rewards readers who care about the fundamentals, and the Kindle Paperwhite 2025 holds the top spot because it nails them all. Reading experience scores 9.5, battery life scores 9.5, and the Amazon ecosystem integration is the smoothest path from wanting a book to reading it that exists on any device. For most people, this is the e-reader to buy without overthinking it.

The Kobo Libra Colour at rank 2 is the device I recommend to anyone who wants more than Amazon's walled garden offers. It has a 7-inch E Ink Kaleido 3 color display, physical page-turn buttons, IPX8 waterproofing, Bluetooth for audiobooks, and optional stylus support. The June 2026 launch of native StoryGraph integration is a genuine win: the Libra Colour becomes the first e-reader to automatically sync your reads and progress from the independent book-tracking platform, which is a meaningful draw for serious readers who track their habits. Kobo's built-in OverDrive tab also lets you search and borrow library books directly on the device, something Kindle still cannot match.

The Kindle Colorsoft at rank 3 brings color to Amazon's ecosystem and suits readers with comic, manga, and illustrated book libraries. The Kobo Clara Colour at rank 4 puts the same Kaleido 3 color technology in a more pocketable 6-inch body for readers who prioritize portability.

The rankings stay stable this cycle. With summer reading season arriving and people loading up devices for vacation travel, an e-reader remains one of the smartest gadget purchases you can make, and the Paperwhite's weeks-long battery life is exactly what a beach trip demands.

highlights.title: Kindle Paperwhite 2025 Nails the Fundamentals
highlights.body: A 9.5 reading experience score, 9.5 battery life, and the smoothest ecosystem on any device make the Paperwhite the e-reader most people should buy without overthinking. Weeks-long battery life is exactly what summer vacation travel demands.

highlights.title: Kobo Libra Colour Adds Native StoryGraph Sync
highlights.body: Launching June 2026, the Libra Colour is the first e-reader to natively sync reads and progress from the independent StoryGraph tracking platform. Combined with its 7-inch Kaleido 3 color screen, page-turn buttons, and built-in OverDrive library borrowing, it is the top pick beyond Amazon's ecosystem.

highlights.title: Color E Ink Has Two Strong Paths
highlights.body: The Kindle Colorsoft brings color into Amazon's ecosystem for comic and manga libraries, while the Kobo Clara Colour packs the same Kaleido 3 technology into a pocketable 6-inch body. Both prove color E Ink has matured into a real option this year.

zh-tw.commentary:
2026 年六月的電子閱讀器市場，獎勵那些把基本功做好的產品，Kindle Paperwhite 2025 穩坐第一就是因為它樣樣到位。閱讀體驗 9.5 分、電池續航 9.5 分，加上 Amazon 生態系整合，從想看一本書到真的開始讀，這條路在任何裝置上都沒有比它更順的。對多數人來說，不用想太多，買它就對了。

第二名的 Kobo Libra Colour，是我推薦給想跳出 Amazon 高牆的人。7 吋 E Ink Kaleido 3 彩色螢幕、實體翻頁鍵、IPX8 防水、藍牙聽有聲書、還能選配觸控筆。2026 年六月新增的 StoryGraph 原生整合是真的有感的加分，Libra Colour 成為第一台能自動同步 StoryGraph 閱讀進度的閱讀器，對會記錄閱讀習慣的重度讀者很有吸引力。Kobo 內建的 OverDrive 分頁還能直接在機上搜尋、借閱圖書館的書，這點 Kindle 到現在還是做不到。

第三名 Kindle Colorsoft 把彩色帶進 Amazon 生態系，適合看漫畫、圖文書的人。第四名 Kobo Clara Colour 用同樣的 Kaleido 3 彩色技術，塞進更好攜帶的 6 吋機身，重視輕巧的人會喜歡。

這一輪榜單很穩。夏天閱讀季到了，大家都在幫裝置塞滿書準備出遊，電子閱讀器仍然是最聰明的 3C 投資之一，Paperwhite 撐好幾週的電池，正是去海邊度假最需要的。

highlights.title: Kindle Paperwhite 2025 基本功樣樣到位
highlights.body: 閱讀體驗 9.5 分、電池 9.5 分，加上任何裝置上最順的生態系整合，多數人不用想太多買它就對。撐好幾週的續航，正是夏天出遊最需要的特性。

highlights.title: Kobo Libra Colour 新增 StoryGraph 原生同步
highlights.body: 2026 年六月上線，Libra Colour 是第一台能原生同步 StoryGraph 閱讀進度的閱讀器。配上 7 吋 Kaleido 3 彩色螢幕、實體翻頁鍵、內建 OverDrive 圖書館借閱，是跳出 Amazon 生態系後的首選。

highlights.title: 彩色電子紙有兩條好路線
highlights.body: Kindle Colorsoft 把彩色帶進 Amazon 生態系，適合漫畫圖文書收藏；Kobo Clara Colour 用同樣的 Kaleido 3 技術做成好攜帶的 6 吋機身。兩台都證明彩色電子紙今年已經成熟到可以認真考慮。

references.title: Best ereaders in 2026: 9 top ebook readers tested
Best E-Readers 2026 - Kindle vs Kobo vs Color E-Ink

en.commentary: The Kindle Paperwhite 2025 stays my top pick and the latest roundups back the call, it now competes with the Kobo Clara BW for the sharpest e-paper display thanks to the newest generation E Ink. For most readers this is the one, a fast, crisp, glare free screen, weeks of battery, and the biggest e-book store on the planet plus Kindle Unlimited and Libby library borrowing. It just works. The Kobo Libra Colour holds second and many reviewers actually call it the best ereader overall for value, and I see why, the physical page turn buttons, color E Ink, and seamless Overdrive and Libby integration make it the pick for library lovers and anyone who wants color comics or note taking. If you live outside Amazon's walls, Kobo is the freer ecosystem, native EPUB support means no conversion dance. The Kindle Colorsoft sits third as Amazon's color answer, smooth within the Kindle world but less flexible than Kobo. The Kobo Clara BW deserves a shout for adding repairability through an iFixit partnership, spare parts and step by step guides extend its life in a way the category badly needed. Boox Palma 2 stays the cult favorite for pocket sized Android reading. Nothing this week reshuffles the order, the choice still comes down to which store you want to live in, Amazon for convenience and catalog, Kobo for openness and library borrowing.

highlights.title: Kindle Paperwhite 2025 is the safe top pick
highlights.body: The newest generation E Ink gives it one of the sharpest e-paper displays available, with a fast glare free screen and weeks of battery. Paired with the largest e-book store, Kindle Unlimited, and Libby library support, it is the reader that simply works for most people.

highlights.title: Kobo Libra Colour is the value and library champion
highlights.body: Physical page turn buttons, color E Ink, and seamless Overdrive and Libby integration make it the pick for library lovers and comic readers. Its native EPUB support and open ecosystem reward anyone who wants to read outside Amazon's walls without converting files.

highlights.title: Kobo Clara BW leads on repairability
highlights.body: Through an iFixit partnership it offers spare parts, repair kits, and step by step guides, so the device lasts instead of landing in a drawer when something breaks. It is a meaningful answer to e-reader longevity that the rest of the category should copy.

zh-tw.commentary: Kindle Paperwhite 2025 還是我的冠軍，最新評測也站我這邊，靠著最新一代 E Ink，它的螢幕銳利度已經跟 Kobo Clara BW 並駕齊驅。對大多數讀者來說這台就對了，快速、銳利、不反光的螢幕，續航好幾週，加上全球最大的電子書店、Kindle Unlimited，還能用 Libby 借圖書館的書。就是好用，沒煩惱。Kobo Libra Colour 守第二，很多評測甚至說它整體性價比最高，我懂為什麼，實體翻頁鍵、彩色 E Ink，加上跟 Overdrive、Libby 無縫整合，愛借圖書館書、想看彩色漫畫或做筆記的人選它。如果你不想被綁在 Amazon 裡，Kobo 的生態更自由，原生支援 EPUB，不用搞格式轉換那套。Kindle Colorsoft 排第三，是 Amazon 的彩色答案，在 Kindle 體系裡順，但彈性不如 Kobo。Kobo Clara BW 值得一提，跟 iFixit 合作加入可維修性，有零件、維修包、step by step 教學，延長壽命這點正是這個類別很缺的。Boox Palma 2 還是口袋 Android 閱讀的死忠最愛。這週排名不動，選擇還是看你想住在哪個書店，Amazon 圖方便跟書多，Kobo 圖自由跟借圖書館。

highlights.title: Kindle Paperwhite 2025 是安全冠軍
highlights.body: 最新一代 E Ink 給它數一數二銳利的電子紙螢幕，快速、不反光，續航好幾週。再配上最大的電子書店、Kindle Unlimited、Libby 借書，對大多數人就是好用不用煩。

highlights.title: Kobo Libra Colour 是性價比與圖書館冠軍
highlights.body: 實體翻頁鍵、彩色 E Ink，加上跟 Overdrive、Libby 無縫整合，愛借圖書館書跟看漫畫的人選它。原生支援 EPUB、生態開放，想在 Amazon 之外閱讀又不想轉檔的人最受用。

highlights.title: Kobo Clara BW 維修性領先
highlights.body: 跟 iFixit 合作提供零件、維修包跟 step by step 教學，東西壞了能修，不會壞掉就丟抽屜。這對電子書閱讀器的壽命是個實在的解法，其他品牌該學起來。

references.title: Best ereaders in 2026: 9 top ebook readers tested

Best E-Reader To Buy In 2026: Kindle Vs Kobo Vs Boox

en.commentary: As of early June 2026 the Kindle Paperwhite (2025) keeps my number one, and the latest TechRadar and Good e-Reader roundups land in the same place. It nails the blend most readers want: a crisp 7-inch display with adjustable warm light, fast page turns, a waterproof body, weeks of battery and Amazon's enormous store. For pure reading on Carta 1300, it is still the device I hand to anyone who just wants to read, and weeks between charges mean it disappears into the background the way a good e-reader should. The Kobo Libra Colour holds second as the best Kindle alternative and the color pick I recommend, because it adds color without giving up clarity and, crucially, supports EPUB and library lending natively where Kindle still needs conversion. Kindle's Colorsoft and the Kobo Clara Colour keep the color middle, the Boox Palma 2 stays the pocket-sized phone-shaped reader that power users love, and the Boox Page anchors the power-user end as an Android tablet in e-reader clothing. The brand split that reviewers keep drawing this season, Kindle for simplicity and store, Kobo for openness and comfort, Boox for power and customization, matches my order cleanly. No new launch this week shifts the board, so I am carrying it forward with confidence.

highlights.title: Kindle Paperwhite (2025) stays #1
highlights.body: Crisp warm-light 7-inch screen, waterproofing, weeks of battery and Amazon's store make it the default.

highlights.title: Kobo Libra Colour is the color and EPUB pick
highlights.body: Adds color without losing clarity and reads EPUB plus library books natively, holding second.

highlights.title: Carta 1300 still rules black-and-white
highlights.body: For pure reading the latest E Ink panel keeps Kindle and Kobo mono models unmatched.

highlights.title: Boox Palma 2 wins on pocketability
highlights.body: Phone-shaped Android reader power users keep reaching for, mid-board.

highlights.title: Boox Page for power users
highlights.body: An Android tablet in e-reader clothing anchors the customization-heavy end.

zh-tw.commentary: 到 2026 年 6 月初，Kindle Paperwhite（2025）還是我的第一名，最新的 TechRadar 跟 Good e-Reader 評選也都站在同一邊。它把多數讀者要的東西都做到位，7 吋螢幕清晰、暖光可調、翻頁快、機身防水、電池撐好幾週，再加上 Amazon 超大書庫。純粹用 Carta 1300 看書，它還是我會直接推給只想好好讀書的人的機型。Kobo Libra Colour 守第二，是我推薦的最佳 Kindle 替代品兼彩色首選，因為它加了彩色又沒犧牲清晰度，更重要的是原生支援 EPUB 跟圖書館借閱，而 Kindle 到現在還得轉檔。Kindle Colorsoft 跟 Kobo Clara Colour 顧住彩色中段，Boox Palma 2 是進階玩家最愛的手機造型口袋機，Boox Page 則壓在進階端，根本是披著電子書外衣的 Android 平板。這季評測一直畫出的品牌分工，Kindle 簡單又有書庫、Kobo 開放又好讀、Boox 強大又能客製，剛好跟我的排序對上。這週沒有新機改變局勢，所以我很有把握地把名次往前帶。

highlights.title: Kindle Paperwhite（2025）穩坐第一
highlights.body: 暖光 7 吋清晰螢幕、防水、電池撐好幾週加 Amazon 書庫，是預設首選。

highlights.title: Kobo Libra Colour 是彩色兼 EPUB 之選
highlights.body: 加彩色不犧牲清晰度，原生讀 EPUB 跟圖書館書，守住第二。

highlights.title: Carta 1300 黑白依舊無敵
highlights.body: 純看書，這代 E Ink 面板讓 Kindle 跟 Kobo 黑白機型沒對手。

highlights.title: Boox Palma 2 主打口袋好攜帶
highlights.body: 手機造型 Android 閱讀器，進階玩家愛不釋手，守在中段。

highlights.title: Boox Page 給進階玩家
highlights.body: 披著電子書外衣的 Android 平板，壓住高客製化那一端。

references.title: Best ereaders in 2026: 9 top ebook readers from Kindle, Kobo and more
We Tested the Best E-readers of 2026

en.commentary: My e-reader board in June keeps the Kindle Paperwhite (2025) at number one, and that is still the easy call for most readers. The 7-inch 300ppi screen is sharp and easy on the eyes, the auto-adjusting warm light gets the reading temperature right without fuss, wireless charging is there, and the battery genuinely runs for weeks. Pair that with Amazon's library, which remains the deepest and most frictionless ebook ecosystem going, and it is the reader I hand to anyone who just wants to read. The Kobo Libra Colour holds second and is the one I steer people to when they want more. Its color E Ink screen, physical page-turn buttons and built-in note-taking deliver the best feature-per-dollar value on the board, and Kobo's open library support and Overdrive integration win for anyone who borrows from a public library. The Kindle Colorsoft stays third as Amazon's color answer, the pick when you want color pages without leaving the Kindle ecosystem. The Kobo Clara Colour, Boox Palma 2 and the rest of the compact field carry forward unchanged. Nothing this week reshuffled the order, so I held ranks. Buy the Paperwhite for the best all-round read, the Libra Colour for color and notes, the Colorsoft to stay in Kindle.

highlights.title: Kindle Paperwhite is the best all-round reader
highlights.body: Its sharp 7-inch 300ppi screen, auto warm light, wireless charging and weeks of battery cover everything a reader needs. Paired with Amazon's deep library, it stays the easy number one for most people.

highlights.title: Kobo Libra Colour is the best value
highlights.body: Its color E Ink screen, physical page-turn buttons and built-in notes deliver the most feature-per-dollar on the board. With open library and Overdrive support, it is the pick for library borrowers and a clear second.

highlights.title: Kindle Colorsoft is Amazon's color answer
highlights.body: It brings color pages without leaving the Kindle ecosystem and its deep store integration. For readers who want color but stay loyal to Amazon, it holds a comfortable third.

highlights.title: Boox Palma 2 is the pocket specialist
highlights.body: Its phone-sized form factor makes it the most portable E Ink reader on the board, ideal for one-handed reading anywhere. That niche keeps it firmly in the compact tier of this ranking.

zh-tw.commentary: 6 月我的電子書閱讀器榜還是 Kindle Paperwhite（2025）排第一，對多數讀者這還是最好選的。7 吋 300ppi 螢幕銳利又護眼，自動調整的暖光不用你費心就把閱讀色溫弄對，有無線充電，電池真的能撐好幾週。再配上 Amazon 那個最深、最無痛的電子書生態，它就是我會丟給任何只想看書的人的那台。Kobo Libra Colour 守第二，是想要更多的人我會帶他去的選擇。彩色 E Ink 螢幕、實體翻頁鍵、內建手寫筆記，端出榜上最高的每塊錢功能價值，而且 Kobo 的開放書庫支援跟 Overdrive 整合，對會去公共圖書館借書的人是大贏。Kindle Colorsoft 守第三，是 Amazon 的彩色解答，想要彩色頁又不想離開 Kindle 生態時就選它。Kobo Clara Colour、Boox Palma 2 跟其他小尺寸機種全部照舊。這週沒事件洗牌，所以我守住排名。要最全面的閱讀體驗買 Paperwhite，要彩色跟筆記買 Libra Colour，想留在 Kindle 買 Colorsoft。

highlights.title: Kindle Paperwhite 是最全面的閱讀器
highlights.body: 銳利的 7 吋 300ppi 螢幕、自動暖光、無線充電、好幾週續航，讀者要的它都有。再配上 Amazon 深厚書庫，多數人第一名選它最輕鬆。

highlights.title: Kobo Libra Colour 是性價比王
highlights.body: 彩色 E Ink 螢幕、實體翻頁鍵、內建筆記，端出榜上最高的每塊錢功能價值。加上開放書庫跟 Overdrive 支援，是借書族的選擇，穩坐第二。

highlights.title: Kindle Colorsoft 是 Amazon 的彩色解答
highlights.body: 它帶來彩色頁又不用離開 Kindle 生態，書店整合又深。想要彩色又對 Amazon 死忠的讀者，它穩坐第三。

highlights.title: Boox Palma 2 是口袋專家
highlights.body: 手機大小的尺寸讓它成為榜上最好攜帶的 E Ink 閱讀器，到哪都能單手讀。這個利基讓它穩穩待在這份榜單的小尺寸段。

references.title: Best ereaders in 2026: top ebook readers tested
The Top 8 Best e-Readers to buy for 2026

en.commentary: The Kindle Paperwhite 2025 stays at number one because it is the e-reader that gets everything right for the price most people will pay. The 7-inch 300ppi screen is glare-free, page turns are about 25 percent faster than the last generation, it is waterproof to IPX8, and the battery runs up to twelve weeks. Pair that with the deepest store and Audible integration and it is the default I hand to anyone who just wants to read. The Kobo Libra Colour holds second and is the better buy for a specific reader: anyone who borrows from the library via Libby or OverDrive, or wants color and open file support. It is the best per-dollar feature set in the category and my pick for manga and comics. The Kindle Colorsoft stays third as Amazon's color answer for people locked into the Kindle store. The Kobo Clara BW holds fourth as the value library pick. Nothing this week reordered the field. The read: most readers should buy the Paperwhite, library borrowers should buy Kobo, and color is now genuinely worth it if you read comics.

highlights.title: Kindle Paperwhite gets everything right
highlights.body: A glare-free 7-inch 300ppi screen, 25 percent faster page turns, IPX8 waterproofing and up to twelve weeks of battery, plus the deepest store. For anyone who just wants to read, it holds number one.

highlights.title: Kobo Libra Colour is the library borrower's pick
highlights.body: Native Libby and OverDrive support plus color and open file handling make it the better buy for library users. The best per-dollar feature set in the category keeps it a firm second.

highlights.title: Color is finally worth it for comics
highlights.body: The Libra Colour and Kindle Colorsoft make manga and comics genuinely enjoyable on e-ink for the first time. If you read illustrated content, color is no longer a gimmick, it is a real upgrade.

highlights.title: Pick by where your books come from
highlights.body: Amazon store loyalty means Kindle; library borrowing means Kobo. The ecosystem you read inside matters more than the hardware, so let your book source decide the brand before you compare screens.

zh-tw.commentary: Kindle Paperwhite 2025 我還是放第一，因為它在多數人會付的價格上把每件事都做對。7 吋 300ppi 螢幕無眩光、翻頁比上一代快約 25 趴、IPX8 防水、電池撐到十二週。配上最深的書店跟 Audible 整合，它是我會直接遞給只想看書的人的預設。Kobo Libra Colour 守第二，對特定讀者是更好的買法：任何用 Libby 或 OverDrive 借圖書館書、或想要彩色跟開放格式支援的人。它是這類別每塊錢功能最強的，也是我漫畫的選擇。Kindle Colorsoft 守第三，是 Amazon 的彩色答案，給綁在 Kindle 書店的人。Kobo Clara BW 守第四，是性價比圖書館選擇。這週沒事件重排。判斷：多數讀者該買 Paperwhite、借圖書館的該買 Kobo，現在你讀漫畫的話彩色真的值得了。

highlights.title: Kindle Paperwhite 每件事都做對
highlights.body: 無眩光 7 吋 300ppi 螢幕、翻頁快 25 趴、IPX8 防水、電池撐十二週，加上最深的書店。對只想看書的人，守住第一。

highlights.title: Kobo Libra Colour 是借書讀者的選擇
highlights.body: 原生 Libby 跟 OverDrive 支援加彩色跟開放格式，讓它對圖書館用戶是更好的買法。每塊錢功能最強，穩在第二。

highlights.title: 彩色終於對漫畫值得了
highlights.body: Libra Colour 跟 Kindle Colorsoft 第一次讓漫畫在電子墨水上真的好看。讀圖文內容的話，彩色不再是噱頭，是真升級。

highlights.title: 照你書從哪來選
highlights.body: 忠於 Amazon 書店就 Kindle、借圖書館就 Kobo。你讀書的生態比硬體重要，比螢幕前先讓書源決定品牌。

references.title: Best ereaders in 2026: 9 top ebook readers from Kindle, Kobo and more tested
The Top 8 Best e-Readers to buy for Spring 2026

en.commentary:
The Kindle Paperwhite 2025 stays at number one because it is still the cleanest execution of what an e-reader needs to be. The current 7-inch panel turns pages roughly 25 percent faster than the prior generation, holds a 300 ppi glare-free surface, carries IPX8 waterproofing rated to two meters, and runs up to 12 weeks per charge. At $159.99 it is the rare flagship that is also the value pick, and TechRadar's refreshed 2026 list still puts it at the front for exactly these reasons.

The one judgment call worth flagging this week is the Kobo Libra Colour. TechRadar continues to call it the best e-reader overall on a pure per-dollar feature basis, and I understand the argument: physical page-turn buttons, a color E Ink Kaleido 3 panel, Overdrive library borrowing baked in, and stylus support the Paperwhite simply does not offer. It holds second here because the color layer softens text sharpness slightly and the $229.99 price asks more than most readers need to spend, but if you borrow heavily from a library or want buttons, it is the better buy and I would not argue with anyone who ranks it first.

The Kindle Colorsoft holds third as the color pick for buyers locked into Amazon, with the ecosystem advantage doing the heavy lifting against its weaker per-dollar value. The Kobo Clara Colour and the Boox Palma 2 round out the upper middle, the Palma 2 still the only credible phone-sized E Ink device for one-handed reading on the go. Down at the writing end, the Kindle Scribe 2025 and reMarkable 2 remain niche tools for note-takers rather than pure readers. Nothing in the spring review cycle reorders this field. Buy the Paperwhite unless you specifically need color or buttons, then buy the Libra Colour.

highlights.title: The Kindle Paperwhite is the rare flagship that is also the value pick
highlights.body: At $159.99 the Paperwhite 2025 gives you a 7-inch 300 ppi glare-free display, page turns about 25 percent faster than the last generation, IPX8 waterproofing to two meters, and up to 12 weeks of battery. Most categories force a tradeoff between best and cheapest. Here the best e-reader and the smartest spend are the same device, which is why it stays at number one.

highlights.title: The Kobo Libra Colour is the right buy for library borrowers and button lovers
highlights.body: TechRadar still calls the Libra Colour the best overall on per-dollar features, and the case is strong: physical page-turn buttons, a Kaleido 3 color panel, built-in Overdrive library borrowing, and stylus support. It sits second here because color slightly softens text and $229.99 is more than most readers need, but for heavy library users it is genuinely the better device.

highlights.title: Buy the Colorsoft only if you are committed to Amazon
highlights.body: The Kindle Colorsoft earns third almost entirely on ecosystem. If your library lives in Kindle Unlimited and Amazon purchases, its color panel and seamless sync make it the natural color pick. Stripped of that lock-in its per-dollar value trails the Kobo color readers, so the recommendation is conditional: great inside Amazon, harder to justify outside it.

highlights.title: The Boox Palma 2 is still the only true pocket E Ink reader
highlights.body: At phone size the Palma 2 remains the single credible option for one-handed E Ink reading on a commute or in line. It runs Android so it pulls in any reading app, and the form factor is genuinely unique. Battery life and raw reading polish keep it at fifth rather than higher, but for the specific job of pocketable distraction-free reading nothing else competes.

zh-tw.commentary:
Kindle Paperwhite 2025 守第一，因為它還是把電子書閱讀器該有的東西做得最乾淨的一台。現在這塊 7 吋面板翻頁比上一代快大概 25%，維持 300 ppi 無眩光表面，IPX8 防水可達兩公尺，一次充電撐到 12 週。NT$5,000 出頭就是旗艦兼 C/P 值首選，這種事很少見，TechRadar 更新的 2026 名單也是因為這些理由把它放在最前面。

這週唯一值得拿出來講的判斷是 Kobo Libra Colour。TechRadar 還是純就每塊錢功能把它叫做綜合最佳，我懂這個論點：實體翻頁鍵、Kaleido 3 彩色電子墨水面板、內建 Overdrive 圖書館借閱、還有 Paperwhite 根本沒有的觸控筆支援。它在這排第二是因為彩色層會讓文字銳利度稍微軟掉，而且 NT$7,000 出頭比大多數人需要花的多，但你如果常從圖書館借書、或想要實體按鍵，它就是更好的選擇，有人把它排第一我也不會反對。

Kindle Colorsoft 守第三，是綁在 Amazon 生態系裡的人的彩色之選，生態系優勢扛起它較弱的每塊錢價值。Kobo Clara Colour 跟 Boox Palma 2 收在中上段，Palma 2 還是唯一一台能單手在路上讀的手機尺寸電子墨水機。書寫端那頭，Kindle Scribe 2025 跟 reMarkable 2 還是做筆記的人的小眾工具，不是純閱讀首選。春季這輪評測沒有打亂這個排序。除非你特別需要彩色或按鍵，不然就買 Paperwhite，要的話就買 Libra Colour。

highlights.title: Kindle Paperwhite 是少見的旗艦兼 C/P 值首選
highlights.body: NT$5,000 出頭，Paperwhite 2025 給你 7 吋 300 ppi 無眩光螢幕、翻頁比上一代快約 25%、IPX8 防水到兩公尺、續航最高 12 週。多數分類都得在最好跟最便宜之間二選一，這裡最好的閱讀器跟最聰明的花費是同一台，所以它守第一。

highlights.title: Kobo Libra Colour 是圖書館族跟按鍵控的正解
highlights.body: TechRadar 還是把 Libra Colour 叫做每塊錢功能最佳，理由很硬：實體翻頁鍵、Kaleido 3 彩色面板、內建 Overdrive 圖書館借閱、觸控筆支援。它在這排第二是因為彩色讓文字稍軟、NT$7,000 出頭比多數人需要的多，但對重度圖書館使用者來說，它真的是更好的機器。

highlights.title: 認定 Amazon 才買 Colorsoft
highlights.body: Kindle Colorsoft 拿第三幾乎全靠生態系。你的書庫如果都在 Kindle Unlimited 跟 Amazon 購買裡，它的彩色面板跟無縫同步就是天然的彩色之選。抽掉這個綁定，它的每塊錢價值落後 Kobo 彩色機，所以這是有條件推薦：在 Amazon 裡很讚，跳出去就難講了。

highlights.title: Boox Palma 2 還是唯一真正的口袋電子墨水機
highlights.body: 手機尺寸的 Palma 2 還是唯一能在通勤或排隊時單手讀電子墨水的可行選擇。它跑 Android 所以任何閱讀 App 都進得來，這個外型真的獨一無二。續航跟純閱讀的細膩度讓它停在第五沒往上，但口袋型無干擾閱讀這個特定任務，沒別的能比。

references.title: Best ereaders in 2026: 9 top ebook readers tested
What new e-readers will Kobo release in 2026?

en.commentary: My e-reader list holds steady this week, and the latest reviews back it up. The Kindle Paperwhite 2025 stays at number one because it nails the balance that matters for most readers: a sharp, fast screen, comfortable warm-and-cool lighting, waterproofing, and a price that does not punish you for buying the best mainstream Kindle. If you mostly read novels, nonfiction, and library loans, this is still the easy default. Right behind it the Kobo Libra Colour remains my top pick for anyone who wants a color E Ink screen, physical page-turn buttons, a comfortable 7-inch body, and the broad file support and library borrowing tools that make Kobo so flexible. The interesting thread this week is forward-looking: Good e-Reader reports Kobo is leaning hard into color and is expected to follow up with a Libra Colour successor, a Clara Colour 2, and a new black-and-white model. That is a reason to watch, not a reason to wait, because nothing is shipping yet. The Kindle Colorsoft and Kobo Clara Colour keep the smaller color slots, and the Boox Palma 2 stays the cult pick for a phone-sized reader. I am holding all scores. This category rewards screen quality, comfort, and ecosystem, and none of those shifted this week.

highlights.title: Kindle Paperwhite 2025 is still the default
highlights.body: Sharp fast screen, warm-and-cool lighting, waterproofing, and a fair price. For readers who live in novels, nonfiction, and library loans, it is the no-regrets pick and stays at number one.

highlights.title: Kobo Libra Colour is the color pick to beat
highlights.body: A 7-inch color E Ink screen, real page-turn buttons, waterproofing, and Kobo's excellent library borrowing. If you want color and flexibility over Amazon's walled garden, this is it.

highlights.title: Kobo's color roadmap is worth watching
highlights.body: Reports point to a Libra Colour successor, a Clara Colour 2, and a new black-and-white model. Nothing has shipped, so I would still buy today, but color Kobo fans have reason to keep an eye out.

zh-tw.commentary: 這週我的電子閱讀器清單維持不動，最新評測也支持這個排法。Kindle Paperwhite 2025 守在第一，因為它把多數讀者最在意的事情都拿捏到位：螢幕清晰又跟手、冷暖光調節舒服、防水，價格也不會因為買到最主流的好 Kindle 就被狠宰。主要看小說、非虛構跟圖書館借書的人，它仍是最省心的預設選擇。緊跟在後的 Kobo Libra Colour 是我給想要彩色電子紙的人首推，七吋機身好握、有實體翻頁鍵、檔案支援廣，加上 Kobo 那套好用的圖書館借閱工具，彈性十足。這週比較有意思的是未來展望：Good e-Reader 報導 Kobo 正大力押注彩色，預計會推 Libra Colour 後繼機、Clara Colour 2，還有新的黑白款。這是值得關注的理由，但不是該等的理由，因為目前都還沒出貨。Kindle Colorsoft 跟 Kobo Clara Colour 守住小尺寸彩色的位置，Boox Palma 2 仍是手機尺寸閱讀器的死忠首選。我這次分數全部維持。這個類別看的是螢幕品質、舒適度跟生態系，這週這三項都沒變。

highlights.title: Kindle Paperwhite 2025 還是預設首選
highlights.body: 螢幕清晰跟手、冷暖光調節、防水、價格合理。對天天泡在小說、非虛構跟圖書館借書的人，這就是不會後悔的選擇，穩坐第一。

en.commentary: The Kindle Paperwhite 2025 stays my top recommendation for most readers, and TechRadar's latest round-up backs the call. The 7-inch glare-free display, IPX8 waterproofing, adjustable warm light, and weeks of battery at a fair price form the most complete package in the category, and for a buyer who simply wants to read, this is the obvious answer. The Kobo Libra Colour holds second and remains my pick for anyone who lives in their public library. Its physical page-turn buttons, native EPUB support, and built-in OverDrive integration make borrowing effortless, and its color screen, while not vibrant, adds real value for comics and highlighted study text. The choice between these two comes down to one question that matters more than specs: where do your books come from. Buy Kindle if you want the largest store and seamless Amazon sync, buy Kobo if you borrow heavily or want to escape the Amazon walled garden. Further down, the Boox Palma 2 keeps its niche as the pocketable phone-shaped reader for people who want a distraction-free Android device, and the Kindle Scribe stays the note-taking pick despite its size penalty. Nothing moved this week. The lineup is settled, the trade-offs are clear, and the best e-reader genuinely depends on your library more than your budget.

en.commentary: The Kindle Paperwhite 2025 stays my number one for the simplest reason there is, it does the core job better than anything else and asks very little of you. The display is crisp, the battery runs for weeks, the warm front light is easy on the eyes at night, and the Amazon store puts almost any book in your hands in seconds. For someone who just wants to read, this is the device I hand them. The Kobo Libra Colour holds second and remains my pick for library readers and anyone who values open formats. Native Libby integration plus physical page-turn buttons plus a color screen make it the most flexible mainstream reader, and the reviews keep calling it the best for most people for good reason. The Kindle Colorsoft stays third for readers who want color inside Amazon's ecosystem. Below that the board reflects a mature market, Boox covers the Android-tablet-meets-e-ink crowd, the Palma 2 is still the pocketable oddball I love, and the Clara line keeps serving people who want a small, focused reader. I made no rank or score changes this week. The category is in a refinement phase, Carta 1300 panels are the quiet upgrade story, but no device shipped that reorders real reading experience. These placements reflect consistent hands-on testing, and I would recommend any of the top four today depending on whether you live in Amazon's world or want to read library books.

highlights.body: Crisp display, weeks of battery, easy warm light, and instant access to almost any book. It does the core job better than anything and stays my default pick.

highlights.title: Kobo Libra Colour for open readers
highlights.body: Native Libby support, physical page buttons, and color make it the most flexible mainstream reader. Reviewers keep calling it best for most people, and I agree.

highlights.title: Boox Palma 2 is the pocketable joy
highlights.body: A phone-sized e-ink reader that goes everywhere. It stays my favorite oddball for anyone who wants distraction-free reading in one hand.

highlights.body: The category is refining with Carta 1300 panels, but nothing shipped that reorders real reading experience, so I kept the board steady.

zh-tw.commentary: Kindle Paperwhite 2025 還是我的第一名，理由很單純，它把最核心的事做得比誰都好，又幾乎不用你費心。螢幕清晰、電池撐好幾週、暖色前光晚上看不刺眼，Amazon 書店幾秒鐘就能把幾乎任何一本書送到你手上。只想好好看書的人，我就是把這台塞給他。Kobo Libra Colour 穩坐第二，是我推給愛借電子書、重視開放格式的人的選擇。內建 Libby、實體翻頁鍵、加上彩色螢幕，讓它成為主流機種裡最靈活的一台，評測一直說它是最多人適合的閱讀器，這話有道理。Kindle Colorsoft 守住第三，給想在 Amazon 生態圈裡看彩色的人。再往下榜單就是一個成熟市場的樣子，Boox 服務想要 Android 平板加電子紙的族群，Palma 2 還是我超愛的口袋怪咖，Clara 系列繼續服務想要小巧專注閱讀器的人。這週排名跟分數我都沒動。這個類別現在在打磨階段，Carta 1300 面板是低調的升級故事，但沒有哪台新機真的重排了實際閱讀體驗。這些位置反映的是持續的實機測試，前四名我今天都敢推，看你是活在 Amazon 世界裡，還是想借圖書館的書。

en.commentary: The Kindle Paperwhite 2025 keeps my top spot, and the 2026 reviews keep landing on the same conclusion. It hits the best balance of screen quality, speed, comfort, waterproofing, and price, which makes it the e-reader I recommend to almost anyone. Add weeks of battery and the deep Kindle and Audible ecosystem, and it remains the safe, satisfying default. The Kobo Libra Colour holds second as the most well-rounded reader for people who value openness. Its physical page-turn buttons, library borrowing support, and broad file format handling make it the pick for anyone who does not want to be locked into one store. The Kindle Colorsoft sits third as the color Kindle for readers who want comics and covers in tint while staying inside Amazon's polished ecosystem. The Kobo Clara Colour follows as the compact color option with excellent portability. The Boox Palma 2 keeps fifth as the pocket-sized Android reader that goes anywhere, ideal for one-handed reading on the move. Reviewers this week again highlighted how sharp the Kobo Clara BW display has become, competing directly with the Paperwhite, which keeps the value end of this list lively. Nothing shifted the order, so I am holding scores. My guidance stands: Paperwhite for the best all-around experience, Kobo Libra for open formats and library loans, Boox Palma for true pocket portability.

highlights.body: It balances screen, speed, comfort, waterproofing, and price better than the field, my pick for almost anyone.
