highlights.body: It brings comics and covers into tint while keeping the polished Kindle ecosystem, holding a solid third.

highlights.title: Boox Palma 2 goes anywhere
highlights.body: The pocket-sized Android reader is ideal for one-handed reading on the move, keeping fifth.

highlights.title: Kobo Clara BW sharpens the value end
highlights.body: Its display competes directly with the Paperwhite, keeping the budget tier of this list genuinely lively.

zh-tw.commentary: Kindle Paperwhite 2025 守住我的第一，2026 的評測也一直得出同樣結論。它把螢幕品質、速度、舒適度、防水跟價格平衡得最好，這讓它是我幾乎能推給任何人的電子書閱讀器。再加上好幾週的續航跟扎實的 Kindle 跟 Audible 生態系，它還是那個安心又滿意的預設選擇。Kobo Libra Colour 守住第二，是最全面、給重視開放性的人的閱讀器。實體翻頁鍵、支援圖書館借閱、廣泛的檔案格式支援，讓想避免被綁在單一書店的人都選它。Kindle Colorsoft 排第三，是給想看彩色漫畫跟封面、又想留在 Amazon 精緻生態系裡的人的彩色 Kindle。Kobo Clara Colour 緊追在後，是攜帶性極佳的小巧彩色選擇。Boox Palma 2 守住第五，是能塞口袋、走到哪帶到哪的 Android 閱讀器，單手在路上讀很適合。這週評測再次點出 Kobo Clara BW 的螢幕變得多銳利，直接跟 Paperwhite 拚，讓這份清單的平價端一直很熱鬧。沒有東西改變排序，所以我讓分數維持。我的建議不變：要全方位體驗選 Paperwhite，要開放格式跟圖書館借閱選 Kobo Libra，要真口袋攜帶選 Boox Palma。

It pairs a 7-inch glare-free display with IPX8 waterproofing, an adjustable warm light, and weeks of battery, all at a price that feels fair. Add the deepest store and Audible integration in the business, and for the vast majority of people this is the right answer the first time. The Kobo Libra Colour holds second, and reviewers keep calling it the best overall e-reader for a reason I respect. Page-turn buttons, broad file support, waterproofing, and the best library-borrowing tools anywhere make it the device I recommend to anyone who lives in their local OverDrive catalog. Kobo has quietly become the default for library and international readers, and that strength is real. The Kindle Colorsoft stays third as Amazon's color answer, smooth in the ecosystem if you can accept the premium. This week I nudged the Boox GoColor7 Gen2 up one spot above the Boox Page, because its color panel and Android flexibility give students and note-takers more for the money, and the latest roundups keep highlighting Android-based readers for exactly that crowd. For pure reading the Kindle and Kobo flagships still own the top, and I see no reason to move them.

highlights.title: Android readers keep gaining
highlights.body: The latest roundups highlight Boox and similar Android devices for students and professionals who want far more than just books, a trend worth watching.

zh-tw.commentary: Kindle Paperwhite 2025 維持我給多數讀者的首選，理由很單純。7 吋無眩光螢幕配 IPX8 防水、可調暖光、續航撐好幾週，價格又合理。再加上業界最深的書城跟 Audible 整合，對絕大多數人來說，這就是第一次買就買對的答案。Kobo Libra Colour 守住第二，各家一直把它叫最佳全能電子書，這點我認同。實體翻頁鍵、廣泛檔案支援、防水、加上全市場最強的圖書館借閱工具，讓它成為我推給天天泡在當地圖書館電子書目錄的人的機器。Kobo 已經悄悄變成圖書館族跟海外讀者的預設選擇，這個強項是真的。Kindle Colorsoft 維持第三，是 Amazon 的彩色解答，生態圈內順手，前提是你接受那個溢價。這週我把 Boox GoColor7 Gen2 往上挪一格、排到 Boox Page 前面，因為它的彩色面板加 Android 彈性，對學生跟做筆記的人來說同價位給得更多，最近的彙整也一直在點名 Android 機就是給這群人的。純論閱讀，Kindle 跟 Kobo 旗艦還是穩坐前段，我沒理由動它們。

highlights.title: Kindle Paperwhite 是最穩答案
highlights.body: 7 吋無眩光螢幕、IPX8 防水、暖光、續航好幾週、書城最深。多數讀者第一次買就買對。

highlights.title: Kobo Libra Colour 主宰圖書館借閱
highlights.body: 實體翻頁鍵、廣泛檔案支援、全市場最強借閱工具，主要讀借閱書的人我推這台。

highlights.title: Boox GoColor7 Gen2 往前擠
highlights.body: 彩色面板加 Android 彈性，對學生跟做筆記的人同價位給得更多，所以這週排到 Boox Page 前面。

highlights.title: Android 機持續吃下版圖
highlights.body: 最近彙整一直點名 Boox 這類 Android 機，給想要的遠不只是看書的學生跟專業族群，這趨勢值得盯。

references.title: Best ereaders in 2026: 9 top ebook readers from Kindle, Kobo and more
The Best E-Readers (2026): Kobo, Kindle

en.commentary: I am keeping the Kindle Paperwhite at the top this week, and I want to be clear about why, because the latest reviews are loudly crowning the Kobo Libra Colour as best overall. The Libra Colour deserves the praise. It has a comfortable seven inch body, physical page turn buttons, waterproofing, and the best library borrowing tools in the business through OverDrive. For readers who live in their local library, it is genuinely the smarter buy, and I bumped its value score to reflect how strong the case has become. So why is the Paperwhite still first on my list? Because for the average buyer, the combination of screen quality, page turn speed, comfort, and the depth of the Kindle store and Audible integration is still the most frictionless reading experience you can buy. It just works, and that matters more than spec sheets for most people. The Libra Colour sits at a close second, and honestly the gap between them is now a matter of which ecosystem you want to live in rather than which device is better. Further down, the Kobo Clara BW remains my pick for the borrower on a budget, and the Boox Palma 2 is still the quirky pocket pick for anyone who wants an Android reader that fits in a jeans pocket. No new hardware launched this week, so the order holds. My advice is simple. If you borrow heavily from libraries, lean Kobo. If you want the easiest path and the biggest store, the Paperwhite is still the one I hand to friends.

highlights.title: Paperwhite stays first for frictionless reading
highlights.body: Screen quality, page turn speed, comfort, and the depth of the Kindle store plus Audible add up to the easiest experience for the average reader. It just works.

highlights.title: Kobo Libra Colour is the borrower's champion
highlights.body: Seven inch comfort, page turn buttons, waterproofing, and the best OverDrive library tools available. I raised its value score because the case for it keeps getting stronger.

highlights.title: The choice is now about ecosystem
highlights.body: The top two are this close. Pick Kobo if you live in your library, pick Kindle for the biggest store and Audible. Both are excellent reading devices.

zh-tw.commentary: 這週我把 Kindle Paperwhite 留在第一，我想把理由講清楚，因為最新的評測幾乎都在大聲把 Kobo Libra Colour 捧成最佳整體機種。Libra Colour 值得這些讚美。它有舒服的七吋機身、實體翻頁鍵、防水，還透過 OverDrive 提供業界最好的圖書館借閱工具。對那種天天泡在地方圖書館的讀者來說，它確實是更聰明的選擇，我也把它的 CP 值分數調高，反映這個論點變得多有說服力。那為什麼 Paperwhite 還是我榜上第一？因為對一般買家來說，螢幕品質、翻頁速度、舒適度，加上 Kindle 書店的深度跟 Audible 整合，仍然是你買得到最無痛的閱讀體驗。它就是順，對多數人而言這比規格表更重要。Libra Colour 緊咬第二，老實說兩者的差距現在是你想活在哪個生態系的問題，跟誰比較好沒太大關係。再往下，Kobo Clara BW 還是我推薦給預算有限借閱族的選擇，Boox Palma 2 依舊是那台塞得進牛仔褲口袋、想要 Android 系統的怪咖口袋機。這週沒有新硬體上市，所以排序維持不變。我的建議很簡單，常跑圖書館借書就偏向 Kobo，想要最輕鬆的路跟最大的書店，Paperwhite 還是我會遞給朋友的那一台。

highlights.title: Paperwhite 以無痛閱讀守住第一
highlights.body: 螢幕品質、翻頁速度、舒適度，加上 Kindle 書店深度跟 Audible，對一般讀者來說加總起來就是最輕鬆的體驗。它就是順。

highlights.title: Kobo Libra Colour 是借閱族的冠軍
highlights.body: 七吋舒適機身、實體翻頁鍵、防水，還有最好的 OverDrive 圖書館工具。它的論點越來越強，我也把 CP 值分數調高了。

highlights.title: 現在是生態系之爭
highlights.body: 前兩名就差這麼一點。常跑圖書館選 Kobo，想要最大書店跟 Audible 選 Kindle。兩台都是很棒的閱讀器。

en.commentary: The Kindle Paperwhite 2025 keeps my top spot, and after another week of reviews I am comfortable holding it there. It pairs a 7-inch glare-free display, IPX8 waterproofing, adjustable warm light, and weeks of battery into a package that simply works for the way most people read. That is why it sits on a 9.5 reading experience and a 9.5 battery score. The Kobo Libra Colour stays second, and some 2026 roundups now call it the best overall for buyers who want color E Ink, physical page-turn buttons, and the cleanest library-borrowing tools through OverDrive. I rate it just behind the Paperwhite because Amazon's ecosystem and value still edge it on pure convenience, but the gap is narrow and I respect anyone who flips them. Color remains the story lower down: the Kindle Colorsoft holds third and the Kobo Clara Colour holds fourth, both giving you tinted covers and highlights without wrecking text sharpness. The Boox Palma 2 keeps fifth as the phone-sized oddball I still love for one-handed reading on the go. Nothing shipped this week. Good e-Reader notes Kobo has not refreshed hardware since 2025 and is overdue, with a color Elipsa rumored, but a rumor does not move a ranking. So I copied every rank and score forward unchanged. When the next Kobo or a Scribe refresh actually lands, I will revisit, and not a moment before.

highlights.title: Paperwhite 2025 is still the default answer
highlights.body: A 7-inch glare-free screen, IPX8 waterproofing, warm light, and weeks of battery keep it on a 9.5 reading experience. For most readers this is the one I hand them without a second thought.

highlights.title: Kobo Libra Colour is the enthusiast's pick
highlights.body: Color E Ink, real page-turn buttons, and excellent OverDrive borrowing keep it at second. Several 2026 roundups now crown it overall, and I understand why even as I hold it just behind.

highlights.title: Color E Ink is now mainstream
highlights.body: The Kindle Colorsoft and Kobo Clara Colour hold third and fourth, proving tinted covers and highlights no longer come at the cost of sharp text.

highlights.title: A rumored Kobo refresh, but nothing shipped
highlights.body: Good e-Reader flags Kobo as overdue with a color Elipsa rumored. Until hardware actually arrives, I kept every rank and score identical.

zh-tw.commentary: Kindle Paperwhite 2025 繼續守住我的第一名，又看了一週的評測，我放它在這裡很安心。7 吋抗眩光螢幕、IPX8 防水、可調暖光、加上續航好幾週，整個組合就是貼合多數人讀書的方式。這就是它閱讀體驗 9.5、續航 9.5 的原因。第二名 Kobo Libra Colour 沒動，現在有些 2026 評測甚至把它選為整體首選，因為它有彩色電子墨水、實體翻頁按鍵，加上透過 OverDrive 借書的流程最乾淨。我把它放在 Paperwhite 後面，是因為 Amazon 的生態系跟價值在純便利度上還是略勝，但差距很小，有人把這兩台對調我完全尊重。彩色是中後段的主軸，Kindle Colorsoft 第三、Kobo Clara Colour 第四，兩台都能給你帶色的封面跟螢光標記，文字銳利度又不會崩掉。Boox Palma 2 守住第五，這台手機尺寸的怪咖我還是很愛，通勤單手讀超順。這週沒有新機。Good e-Reader 提到 Kobo 從 2025 就沒更新硬體，早該出新機了，傳聞會有彩色 Elipsa，但傳聞動不了榜。所以我把每個名次分數原封不動往前複製。等下一台 Kobo 或 Scribe 真的上市，我再來重看，不會提早。

highlights.title: Paperwhite 2025 還是預設答案
highlights.body: 7 吋抗眩光、IPX8 防水、暖光、續航好幾週，撐起閱讀體驗 9.5。多數讀者我都直接遞這台，不用想第二次。

highlights.title: Kobo Libra Colour 是玩家首選
highlights.body: 彩色電子墨水、實體翻頁鍵、加上超好用的 OverDrive 借書，穩坐第二。好幾份 2026 評測現在把它選為整體首選，我把它放後面一名，但完全懂這個道理。

highlights.title: 彩色電子墨水已經是主流
highlights.body: Kindle Colorsoft 跟 Kobo Clara Colour 拿下三四名，證明帶色封面跟螢光標記不用再犧牲文字銳利度。

highlights.title: Kobo 傳聞要更新，但沒新機
highlights.body: Good e-Reader 點名 Kobo 早該出新機，傳聞有彩色 Elipsa。硬體真的到手之前，我把每個名次分數都保持一樣。

Best Monochrome E-Readers (2026): Kindle, Kobo or Boox?

en.commentary: The Kindle Paperwhite stays my default recommendation, and the latest 2026 roundups keep landing on the same conclusion. TechRadar still rates it the strongest all-around monochrome reader for its fast page turns, even front light, and a battery that genuinely stretches to ten weeks of moderate reading. When someone asks me which e-reader to buy and gives me no other details, this is the answer every time. It does the core job better than anything else and the Amazon store access makes getting books effortless. The one move I made this week is lifting the Boox Poke 5 above the Palma 2 by a hair. Fresh comparisons single out the Poke 5 for split-screen reading, stylus support, and app multitasking that punch well above its size, and at roughly 200 dollars it delivers that flexibility without a painful premium. The Palma 2 is still the pocket champion for pure portability, but the Poke 5 is the better all-rounder for readers who want a little Android freedom, so it edges ahead. Kobo continues to own the open-ecosystem crowd. The Libra Colour holds my number two because it pairs comfortable physical page-turn buttons with native library borrowing and an ad-free experience straight out of the box, which is exactly what readers who dislike Amazon's walled garden are after. For color on a budget the Kobo Clara Colour is still the value sweet spot. The rest of the lineup holds firm because nothing this week shifted the picture in a way the data supports.

highlights.title: Kindle Paperwhite is still the safe pick
highlights.body: TechRadar's 2026 testing keeps it on top for fast page turns, even lighting, and a true ten-week battery. Ask me for one e-reader with no caveats and this is always my answer.

highlights.title: Boox Poke 5 edges ahead
highlights.body: Latest comparisons praise its split-screen reading, stylus support, and Android multitasking at around 200 dollars. That flexibility makes it the better all-rounder, so I nudged it past the Palma 2.

highlights.title: Kobo Libra Colour owns the open camp
highlights.body: Physical page buttons, native library borrowing, and zero ads out of the box keep it at number two. It is the reader I point Amazon-skeptics toward every time.

highlights.title: Kobo Clara Colour is the color value pick
highlights.body: If you want a color screen without spending Kindle Colorsoft money, the Clara Colour remains the smart buy, and it holds its spot comfortably.

zh-tw.commentary: Kindle Paperwhite 這台我繼續當作預設首選，2026 最新的幾篇橫評也都得出一樣的結論。TechRadar 還是把它評為最強的全能黑白閱讀器，翻頁快、前光均勻，電池中度使用真的能撐到十週。每次有人問我電子書閱讀器要買哪台又沒給其他條件，我每次都回這台。核心體驗它做得最好，加上 Amazon 書城想買書超方便。這週我唯一動的是把 Boox Poke 5 稍微提到 Palma 2 之上。最新的比較文特別點名 Poke 5 的分割畫面閱讀、觸控筆支援，還有以這個尺寸來說相當厲害的多工，而且大約六千多塊台幣就能拿到這種彈性，不用多花冤枉錢。Palma 2 純論口袋攜帶還是最強，但想要一點 Android 自由度的人，Poke 5 整體更全能，所以我讓它小幅領先。Kobo 依舊牢牢抓住喜歡開放生態的族群。Libra Colour 守住第二名，它有好按的實體翻頁鍵，原生就能借圖書館的電子書，開箱即用又沒有廣告，正好打中不喜歡 Amazon 封閉花園的讀者。想要彩色又想省一點，Kobo Clara Colour 還是 CP 值甜蜜點。其餘名次維持不變，因為這週沒有任何足以用數據支撐調整的變化。

highlights.title: Kindle Paperwhite 還是最穩的選擇
highlights.body: TechRadar 2026 評測持續把它放第一，翻頁快、打光均勻、電池真的撐十週。要我無條件推一台，每次都是它。

highlights.title: Boox Poke 5 小幅領先
highlights.body: 最新比較文誇它分割畫面閱讀、觸控筆、Android 多工，大約六千多台幣就有這種彈性。整體更全能，所以我把它提到 Palma 2 前面。

highlights.title: Kobo Libra Colour 抓住開放派
highlights.body: 實體翻頁鍵、原生借書、開箱無廣告，守住第二名。不喜歡 Amazon 封閉生態的朋友，我每次都推這台。

highlights.title: Kobo Clara Colour 是彩色 CP 值首選
highlights.body: 想要彩色螢幕又不想花到 Colorsoft 的價錢，Clara Colour 還是聰明選擇，名次穩穩守住。

Best e-book readers in 2026: Kindle, Kobo, Boox, and more

en.commentary: No new hardware dropped this week, so the table holds, and I am happy to defend every position. The Kindle Paperwhite 2025 stays at one because it nails the boring stuff that actually matters every night, the fastest crisp monochrome page turns at this price, weeks of battery, and the smoothest buying and syncing experience anywhere. For most people who just want to read, this is the answer and it is not close. The Kobo Libra Colour holds second and frankly it is the one I would buy for myself. A 7 inch color E Ink panel that handles novels, manga, and comics, physical page buttons, and the open format support plus library integration that Amazon will never give you. It is the pick for readers who borrow from the library or live outside one store. The color Kindles sit third and fourth, the Colorsoft and the Kobo Clara Colour, good screens that still ask a premium for color that looks muted next to a tablet, which is why value drags them. Boox keeps the Android flexibility crowd happy in the middle of the table. At the bottom, the Scribe and reMarkable 2 are note takers first and readers second, so they rank low here on purpose. If you are shopping a Prime Day deal, the Paperwhite is the safe money and the Libra Colour is the one to splurge on.

highlights.title: The Kindle Paperwhite 2025 is still the default for most readers
highlights.body: Fast crisp page turns, weeks of battery, and the smoothest store and sync experience anywhere. If you just want to read and not think about it, this is the answer and the margin is not close.

highlights.title: The Kobo Libra Colour is the one I would buy for myself
highlights.body: A 7 inch color panel that handles novels, manga, and comics, real page buttons, and open format plus library support Amazon refuses to offer. For anyone who borrows from the library, this is the pick.

highlights.title: Color Kindles still ask a premium for muted color
highlights.body: The Colorsoft and Clara Colour have good screens, but color E Ink looks subdued next to any tablet and the price does not reflect that. That value gap is exactly why they sit third and fourth rather than higher.

zh-tw.commentary: 這週沒有新機上市，所以表格維持，而且每個名次我都樂意捍衛。Kindle Paperwhite 2025 守第一，因為它把每天晚上真正重要的無聊基本功都做到位，同價位最快的清晰黑白翻頁、撐好幾週的電力，還有全世界最順的購書跟同步體驗。對大多數只想好好看書的人，這就是答案，而且差距不小。Kobo Libra Colour 守第二，老實說這台是我自己會買的。7 吋彩色 E Ink 面板，小說、漫畫、條漫都吃得下，實體翻頁鍵，加上開放格式支援跟圖書館借閱整合，這些 Amazon 永遠不會給你。會去圖書館借書、或不想被綁在單一書店的讀者就選它。彩色 Kindle 排三四名，Colorsoft 跟 Kobo Clara Colour，螢幕不錯，但彩色比起平板還是偏淡，價格卻要溢價，性價比因此被拖住。Boox 在表格中段繼續服務喜歡 Android 彈性的族群。後段的 Scribe 跟 reMarkable 2 本質是筆記器，看書是其次，所以這裡名次低是刻意的。如果你在看 Prime Day 折扣，Paperwhite 是穩當的錢，Libra Colour 則是值得多花的那台。

highlights.title: Kindle Paperwhite 2025 仍是大多數讀者的預設選擇
highlights.body: 清晰快速的翻頁、撐好幾週的電力，加上全世界最順的書店跟同步體驗。只想好好看書、不想多煩惱的話這就是答案，而且差距不小。

highlights.title: Kobo Libra Colour 是我自己會買的那台
highlights.body: 7 吋彩色面板，小說、漫畫、條漫都吃得下，實體翻頁鍵，還有 Amazon 不肯給的開放格式跟圖書館借閱支援。會去圖書館借書的人就選它。

highlights.title: 彩色 Kindle 用偏淡的彩色卻要你多付錢
highlights.body: Colorsoft 跟 Clara Colour 螢幕不錯，但彩色 E Ink 比起任何平板都偏淡，價格卻沒反映這點。這個性價比落差就是它們排三四名而非更前面的原因。

Best E-Reader To Buy In 2026: Kindle Vs Kobo Vs Boox
Best e-book readers in 2026: Kindle, Kobo, Boox, and more

en.commentary: The e-reader order is stable this week and I am happy to leave it that way. The 2025 Kindle Paperwhite stays at number one because it is still the device I hand to almost everyone who asks. It pairs a superb 7-inch display with warm light, a genuinely waterproof build, fast page turns, and Amazon's deep library, and at its price the value is hard to argue with. For most readers this is the right answer and reviews this cycle keep landing on the same verdict. The Kobo Libra Colour holds second as the best pick for anyone who wants color or who wants out of Amazon's walled garden. Physical page buttons, library lending through Overdrive, and open format support make it the freedom choice, and it reads beautifully. The Kindle Colorsoft keeps third as the color Kindle for readers committed to Amazon, though its price keeps its value below the Kobo. The one ranking nudge I made is small and earned: I lifted the Boox Page above the Kobo Clara BW by a tenth, moving it from ninth to a tighter ninth-tenth contest, because reviews this cycle keep emphasizing how much its Android openness and Play Store access matter to power users who want Kindle, Libby, and comics apps on one device. Its ecosystem score rose accordingly. Everything else carries forward from June 24. No new flagship shipped, so the conservative call is to keep this list intact and watch the next Kindle and Kobo refresh cycle.

highlights.title: Kindle Paperwhite 2025 stays first
highlights.body: Superb 7-inch warm-light display, waterproof, fast, with Amazon's deep library. The device I recommend to almost everyone.

highlights.title: Kobo Libra Colour is the freedom pick
highlights.body: Color screen, physical buttons, Overdrive library lending, and open formats make it the best way out of Amazon's ecosystem.

highlights.title: Boox Page ecosystem score up
highlights.body: Reviews keep stressing its Android and Play Store openness for power users running Kindle, Libby, and comics on one device.

highlights.title: No new flagship this week
highlights.body: Nothing shipped to force a reshuffle, so the list carries forward with only a minor Boox Page adjustment.

zh-tw.commentary: 這週電子書閱讀器排名很穩，我樂得讓它維持。2025 Kindle Paperwhite 守第一，因為它還是我會推給幾乎所有人問我的那一台。7 吋的優秀螢幕加暖光、真防水、翻頁快，又有 Amazon 那個深不見底的書庫，以它的價位，CP 值真的很難挑剔。對大多數讀者來說這就是正解，這輪評測的結論也都一樣。Kobo Libra Colour 守第二，想要彩色螢幕、或想跳出 Amazon 圍牆的人就選它。實體翻頁鍵、透過 Overdrive 借圖書館的書、又支援開放格式，它就是那個自由派的選擇，而且閱讀體驗很漂亮。Kindle Colorsoft 守第三，是死忠 Amazon 用戶的彩色 Kindle，不過價格把它的 CP 值壓在 Kobo 之下。這週我唯一動的排名很小也站得住腳：我把 Boox Page 的生態系分數往上抬，讓它跟 Kobo Clara BW 的第九第十之爭更貼近，因為這輪評測一直在強調它的 Android 開放性跟 Play Store，對想在一台機器上同時跑 Kindle、Libby 跟漫畫 App 的進階玩家來說很關鍵。其他維持6月24號。沒有新旗艦上市，保守的做法就是讓這份榜單維持原樣，盯著 Kindle 跟 Kobo 下一波改款。

en.commentary: The e-reader field stays settled this week, and my ranking carries forward unchanged because nothing shipped that shifts the order. The Kindle Paperwhite 2025 remains the reader I hand to almost everyone. Its 7 inch glare-free display, weeks of battery, IPX8 waterproofing, and the deepest content ecosystem make it the easy default, and every July buying guide I read this week reaches the same conclusion. The Kobo Libra Colour holds second as the best color pick that still reads like a proper e-reader rather than a tablet pretending to be one. Its 7 inch color E Ink panel handles novels, comics, and manga, and the physical page buttons plus native Libby borrowing keep library readers loyal. The Kindle Colorsoft sits third for readers who want color inside Amazon's ecosystem and accept the price premium. Down the list, the Boox devices earn their placement on Android flexibility. If you want one device that runs Kindle, Kobo, and Libby side by side, the Boox Page and Palma 2 remain the way to get there, and the Palma 2 stays my pocket pick for its phone-sized frame. The Kindle Scribe 2025 continues to lead on writing feel for note-takers who can accept its bulk and price. I kept every score identical this cycle because the reviews I found simply reaffirm the current picture. Color E Ink keeps improving, Kindle keeps leading on ecosystem and value, and Boox keeps owning the power-user niche. Buy on how you actually read, whether that is library borrowing, color content, or Amazon convenience.

en.commentary: The Kindle Paperwhite 2025 stays my number one, and this week's July roundups line up with that call. A 7 inch glare-free display, IPX8 waterproofing, adjustable warm light, and weeks of battery at a fair price make it the reader I hand to almost anyone who asks. It does the one job an e-reader exists for, reading long stretches of text comfortably, better than the rest. The Kobo Libra Colour keeps second because it nails the physical page-turn buttons and one-handed asymmetric grip that Kindle still refuses to offer, and its color panel handles manga and illustrated books with real charm. That ergonomic edge is why I reach for it on a long evening. Kindle Colorsoft holds third for readers locked into Amazon's library who want color, though its value score reflects the premium you pay. Further down, the Boox lineup earns its spots on flexibility: the Palma 2 remains the pocketable phone-sized reader that runs Libby, Kindle, and Audible side by side, and the Go Color 7 Gen 2 continues to serve readers who want Android freedom on E Ink. The Kindle Scribe stays the note-taking pick despite the portability hit that comes with a large slate. Nothing shipped this week to shake the order, so I am holding the list. The lineup splits cleanly by what you actually want, comfort, color, or Android flexibility, and each tier has a clear winner.

highlights.title: Paperwhite Is Still The Default
highlights.body: The Kindle Paperwhite 2025 does the core job, long comfortable reading, better than anything else at its price, which keeps it my number one.

highlights.title: Kobo Libra Colour For Ergonomics
highlights.body: Physical page buttons and a one-handed asymmetric body give the Libra Colour a grip advantage Kindle still lacks, plus a color panel that suits manga.

highlights.title: Boox For Android Freedom
highlights.body: The Palma 2 and Go Color 7 Gen 2 run Libby, Kindle, and Audible on E Ink, which is why they hold their mid-pack spots for flexibility seekers.

highlights.title: Scribe Owns Note-Taking
highlights.body: The Kindle Scribe stays the large-screen writing pick, accepting a portability trade for a proper pen-on-paper feel.

zh-tw.commentary: Kindle Paperwhite 2025 這週我還是放第一，七月各家的評測名單也剛好跟我同一國。七吋抗眩光螢幕、IPX8 防水、可調暖光，還有能撐好幾週的電量，價格又合理，基本上誰來問我都直接推這台。它把電子閱讀器唯一該做好的事，也就是舒服地長時間看字，做得比別人都好。Kobo Libra Colour 守住第二，因為它把實體翻頁鍵跟單手好握的不對稱機身做到位，這兩點 Kindle 到現在還是不給，彩色螢幕看漫畫跟繪本也真的有味道。講真的，晚上想耍廢看很久，我都會拿它。Kindle Colorsoft 排第三，適合被 Amazon 書庫綁住、又想要彩色的人，價值分數就反映了那個要多花的錢。往下看，Boox 這幾台靠的是彈性：Palma 2 依然是那台口袋大小、能同時跑 Libby、Kindle、Audible 的機子，Go Color 7 Gen 2 也繼續服務想在 E Ink 上玩 Android 的人。Kindle Scribe 守住手寫筆記那格，雖然大板子難免犧牲一點攜帶性。這週沒有新機來攪局，所以我維持原榜。這份名單其實照需求切得很乾淨，看你要的是舒適、彩色，還是 Android 彈性，每一層都有明確的王者。

highlights.title: Paperwhite 仍是首選
highlights.body: Kindle Paperwhite 2025 把長時間舒適閱讀這個核心做得比同價位任何一台都好，這就是它續坐第一的理由。

highlights.title: 手感選 Kobo Libra Colour

en.commentary: The Kindle Paperwhite 2025 holds first place, and it stays there because it does the fundamentals better than anything else at the price, a crisp glare-free display, weeks of battery, and the deepest content ecosystem in the category. For most readers who just want to buy a book and start reading in seconds, this is still the one I hand them. The Kobo Libra Colour keeps second, and TechRadar continues to call it the best e-reader for most people, which I understand completely, its 7-inch color E Ink screen handles novels, manga, and illustrated books alike, and the physical page-turn buttons plus the asymmetric grip make one-handed reading genuinely comfortable. It is the pick for anyone who borrows library books through OverDrive or keeps a personal EPUB collection, since Kobo's open file support beats the walled Kindle garden. The Kindle Colorsoft holds third as the color option for readers who are locked into Amazon's ecosystem. Reviewers note the E Ink Carta 1300 panel debuting on the Clara BW nudges display sharpness forward, though it does not change my order this week. Prices held steady, so the board is unchanged. Buy the Paperwhite for the simplest great experience, the Libra Colour for flexibility and color, and the Clara BW if library borrowing is your priority.

zh-tw.commentary: Kindle Paperwhite 2025 守住第一，它能坐穩這個位子，是因為基本功在同價位無人能敵，清晰不反光的螢幕、能撐好幾週的電力，還有全類別最深的內容生態系。對只想買本書、幾秒後就開始讀的多數人來說，我還是遞這台給他們。Kobo Libra Colour 守住第二，TechRadar 繼續說它是最適合多數人的電子閱讀器，我完全理解，7 吋彩色 E Ink 螢幕小說、漫畫、圖文書都能應付，實體翻頁鍵加上不對稱握把讓單手閱讀真的很舒服。如果你常透過 OverDrive 借圖書館的書，或自己養一批 EPUB 收藏，就選它，Kobo 的開放檔案支援勝過 Kindle 的封閉花園。Kindle Colorsoft 守住第三，是被綁在亞馬遜生態系裡的讀者要彩色時的選擇。評測提到首發於 Clara BW 的 E Ink Carta 1300 面板把顯示銳利度往前推了一點，不過這週還不改變我的排序。價格持平，名次不動。想要最單純的好體驗選 Paperwhite，想要彈性跟彩色選 Libra Colour，最重視借書就選 Clara BW。

highlights.body: 清晰不反光的螢幕、能撐好幾週的電力、全類別最深的內容生態系，讓它這週守住第一，是我推薦給多數人的閱讀器。

highlights.title: Kobo Libra Colour 最有彈性
highlights.body: TechRadar 仍稱它最適合多數人，7 吋彩色螢幕、翻頁鍵、開放檔案支援讓它成為借書跟 EPUB 讀者的首選，守住第二。

highlights.body: Kindle Colorsoft 守住第三，是亞馬遜死忠要彩色時的選擇，Libra Colour 則服務所有看重 Kobo 開放性的人。

en.commentary: The Kindle Paperwhite 2025 keeps first place, and the reasoning has not changed. It nails the balance most readers actually want: a fast, crisp screen, real waterproofing, comfortable one handed use and Amazon's enormous store. When I hand this to someone who just wants to read novels without fuss, they never come back with complaints. The Kobo Libra Colour stays a close second, and this month reviewers keep crowning it the best pick for most people thanks to its 7 inch color panel and physical page turn buttons. If you borrow heavily from public libraries, Kobo's OverDrive integration is still the reason to switch, and the Clara BW earns respect for debuting E Ink Carta 1300 ahead of Amazon's base Kindle. Color remains the interesting battleground. Kindle Colorsoft holds third for readers deep in the Amazon ecosystem who want tinted covers and highlights, while the Kobo Clara Colour offers the same idea in a lighter, cheaper body. The pocketable crowd, Boox Palma 2 and Poke5, keeps its niche for people who want an E Ink phone sized reader. Looking ahead, there is real chatter about a color Kobo Elipsa and a Kindle Scribe Colorsoft arriving to challenge the Remarkable Paper Pro. That note taking segment is where the next shakeup happens, and the Kindle Scribe 2025 and Remarkable 2 both sit lower here because their portability and value scores lag the reading focused pack. For pure reading today, the top two remain the safe, satisfying buys.

highlights.title: Paperwhite still the safe default
highlights.body: Screen speed, waterproofing and the Amazon store keep it first. It is the reader I recommend when someone just wants to read without thinking about it.

highlights.title: Libra Colour for most people
highlights.body: Reviewers keep naming it the best pick overall. The 7 inch color panel and page turn buttons make it easy to hold and pleasant with comics and manga.

highlights.title: Clara BW punches above its price
highlights.body: Debuting E Ink Carta 1300 ahead of the base Kindle gives it sharper, faster text, and OverDrive support makes it a library lover's favorite.

highlights.title: Color is where the fight is
highlights.body: Kindle Colorsoft and Kobo Clara Colour bring tinted covers and highlights. Choose by ecosystem: Amazon store versus library flexibility.

highlights.title: Note takers face a shakeup
highlights.body: Talk of a color Kobo Elipsa and a Kindle Scribe Colorsoft points at the next battle. Today the Scribe and Remarkable sit lower on portability and value.

zh-tw.commentary: Kindle Paperwhite 2025 這個月繼續坐第一，理由沒變。它把大多數人真正要的東西都做到位了，螢幕快、字清楚、防水到位、單手好拿，還有 Amazon 那個大到誇張的書城。老實說，我把這台交給只想安靜看小說的人，從來沒有人回頭抱怨。Kobo Libra Colour 緊跟在後排第二，這個月一堆評測還是把它捧成最適合大多數人的選擇，靠的就是 7 吋彩色螢幕跟實體翻頁鍵。你如果常從圖書館借書，Kobo 的 OverDrive 整合就是換過去的理由；Clara BW 更厲害，搶在基本款 Kindle 前面首發 E Ink Carta 1300 面板，這點我給它拍拍手。彩色還是最有看頭的戰場。Kindle Colorsoft 排第三，適合深陷 Amazon 生態、想要彩色封面跟畫線的人；Kobo Clara Colour 做一樣的事，機身更輕、價格更甜。口袋機那群，Boox Palma 2 跟 Poke5，守住手機大小電子紙閱讀器的小眾市場。往前看，市場一直在傳彩色版 Kobo Elipsa 跟 Kindle Scribe Colorsoft 要來挑戰 Remarkable Paper Pro。手寫筆記這塊才是下一波洗牌的地方，而 Kindle Scribe 2025 跟 Remarkable 2 在這裡排得比較後面，就是因為攜帶性跟性價比追不上專攻閱讀那群。單論今天純看書，前兩名還是最穩、最讓人滿意的買法。

highlights.title: Paperwhite 還是最保險
highlights.body: 螢幕速度、防水、Amazon 書城撐住第一。有人只想拿起來就看書，我就推它。

highlights.title: Libra Colour 適合大多數人

highlights.body: 搶在基本款 Kindle 前面首發 Carta 1300，字更銳利更快，加上 OverDrive，是圖書館重度用戶的心頭好。

en.commentary: The Kindle Paperwhite 2025 keeps my top spot because it remains the safest e-reader you can buy. The 7-inch screen, fast page turns, waterproofing, weeks of battery, and Amazon's deep store all land in one polished package at a price that undercuts most rivals. When someone asks me for one recommendation and does not want to think about it, this is still the answer. That said, I bumped the Kobo Libra Colour up a notch this week. TechRadar's refreshed 2026 roundup now calls it the best e-reader for most people, and I get why: the 7-inch Kaleido 3 color screen handles novels, manga, and comics comfortably, and the asymmetrical body with real page-turn buttons makes one-handed reading genuinely easy. For anyone who leans on library borrowing, Kobo's open format support and OverDrive integration are a real edge over Amazon's walled garden, so the Libra Colour earns its climb toward the leader. Good e-Reader is also flagging likely 2026 successors, a Clara Colour 2 and a refreshed BW, with brighter color filters, bigger batteries, and faster chips. Those are not here yet, so I am not pricing in rumors, but it does mean the color midrange is about to get more interesting. For now the standings are stable, the Paperwhite stays the default pick, and the Libra Colour is the one I would grab if color and physical buttons matter to me.

highlights.title: Paperwhite is still the default
highlights.body: Fast, waterproof, weeks of battery, and Amazon's store all in one affordable package. When someone wants a single no-fuss pick, this is the one I hand them.

highlights.title: Libra Colour climbs on fresh praise
highlights.body: TechRadar's 2026 roundup now names it best for most people, and its color Kaleido 3 screen plus real page-turn buttons back that up. I nudged its reading score to match.

highlights.title: Library readers should look at Kobo
highlights.body: Open format support and OverDrive integration make Kobo the smarter choice if you borrow heavily, which is a genuine edge over Amazon's closed ecosystem.

highlights.title: Color midrange refresh is coming
highlights.body: Good e-Reader expects a Clara Colour 2 and refreshed BW in 2026 with brighter filters and faster chips. Nothing shipped yet, so I am not pricing in rumors.

zh-tw.commentary: Kindle Paperwhite 2025 我還是放第一，因為它就是你買了最不會後悔的那台。7 吋螢幕、翻頁快、防水、續航好幾週，加上 Amazon 的書城超深，全部包在一個做工精緻又比大部分對手便宜的機身裡。有人叫我推一台不想動腦的，我到現在還是回答這台。話說回來，這週我把 Kobo Libra Colour 往上調了一名。TechRadar 2026 更新的評測現在直接說它是最多人適合的電子閱讀器，我完全懂，7 吋 Kaleido 3 彩色螢幕看小說、漫畫都很舒服，加上不對稱機身跟實體翻頁鍵，單手拿著看真的很順。尤其你如果常常從圖書館借電子書，Kobo 支援開放格式又整合 OverDrive，這點比 Amazon 那套封閉系統好用太多，所以 Libra Colour 往前爬是應該的。Good e-Reader 也在講 2026 可能出的接班機，Clara Colour 2 跟改版 BW，彩色濾光更亮、電池更大、晶片更快。但那些還沒上市，我不會把傳聞先算進來。目前榜單穩定，Paperwhite 還是預設首選，想要彩色跟實體按鍵的話我就會拿 Libra Colour。

highlights.title: Paperwhite 還是預設首選
highlights.body: 翻頁快、防水、續航好幾週，加上 Amazon 書城全包在一個親民價格裡。有人要一台不囉唆的，我就給這台。

highlights.title: Libra Colour 因好評往上爬

highlights.title: 常借圖書館電子書就選 Kobo

highlights.title: 彩色中階要改版了
highlights.body: Good e-Reader 預期 2026 會出 Clara Colour 2 跟改版 BW，濾光更亮、晶片更快。但都還沒上市，我不會先把傳聞算進來。

en.commentary: The Kindle Paperwhite 2025 keeps my number one this week, and the 2026 roundups from TechRadar and Tom's Guide back that call. When someone asks me for a first e-reader, this is still the one I hand over without a caveat. The Carta 1300 panel is now the monochrome gold standard, with higher contrast, faster refresh and cleaner text edges, and its battery genuinely lasts weeks. At 9.2 it earns the spot on reading comfort and ecosystem depth. The Kobo Libra Colour holds second and remains my top pick for anyone who wants color plus physical page buttons. Reviewers this week keep calling it the best all-rounder for library users and international readers, and its 7-inch Kaleido 3 screen handles novels, comics and manga in one device. If you live inside Libby and OverDrive, this is your reader. Kindle Colorsoft stays third as the color choice for people already invested in Amazon, and Kobo Clara Colour holds fourth as the pocketable color option. The interesting movement is Android-based readers. Boox and its Palma-style pocket devices keep winning over students and professionals who want more than books, and that is why the Boox Poke5 sits fifth on portability and value. Nothing shipped this week that justifies a rank change, so I held the board. This is a mature category right now, and the sensible move is to buy on screen size and ecosystem rather than wait for a phantom upgrade.

highlights.title: Paperwhite 2025 is still the default recommendation
highlights.body: Carta 1300 contrast, weeks of battery and Amazon's library depth keep it at 9.2 and number one for first-time buyers.

highlights.title: Kobo Libra Colour owns the color all-rounder slot

highlights.title: Android readers keep gaining ground
highlights.body: Boox pocket devices win over students and pros who want more than books, which lands the Poke5 at fifth on value.

highlights.title: A mature category rewards buying now
highlights.body: No new hardware this week, so choose on screen size and ecosystem rather than waiting for an upgrade that is not coming.

zh-tw.commentary: 這週 Kindle Paperwhite 2025 還是我的第一名，TechRadar 跟 Tom's Guide 的 2026 評測也一樣這樣選。有人問我第一台電子書要買什麼，我還是二話不說推它。Carta 1300 面板現在是黑白的黃金標準，對比更高、翻頁更快、字邊更乾淨，電池是真的能撐好幾週。9.2 這個分數，靠的是閱讀舒適度跟生態系深度。Kobo Libra Colour 守住第二，也是我推薦給想要彩色加實體翻頁鍵的人的首選。這週評測還是一直把它叫做圖書館族跟海外讀者的最佳全能機，7 吋的 Kaleido 3 螢幕，小說、漫畫、manga 一台搞定。你要是天天泡在借書 App 裡，這台就是你的。Kindle Colorsoft 第三，是已經買了一堆 Amazon 電子書的人的彩色選擇，Kobo Clara Colour 第四，是好塞進口袋的彩色機。真正有意思的是 Android 陣營。Boox 跟它那種 Palma 口袋機，一直圈住想要不只讀書的學生跟上班族，這也是 Boox Poke5 靠便攜跟性價比排第五的原因。這週沒有新機值得動名次，我就守住整張榜。這個品類現在很成熟，聰明的做法是照螢幕尺寸跟生態系直接買，不用等一台不會來的升級。

highlights.title: Paperwhite 2025 還是預設推薦
highlights.body: Carta 1300 的對比、能撐好幾週的電池加上 Amazon 的書庫深度，讓它守住 9.2，新手第一名。

highlights.title: Kobo Libra Colour 拿下彩色全能機這格

highlights.body: Boox 口袋機圈住想要不只讀書的學生跟上班族，讓 Poke5 靠性價比排第五。

en.commentary: The Kindle Paperwhite 2025 stays my top pick, and summer only sharpens the case. Its glare-free screen stays readable in bright poolside sun, the waterproofing lets you read at the beach without worry, and battery life still runs for weeks. Add the deepest content ecosystem in the category and it remains the easiest e-reader to recommend to almost anyone. The Kobo Libra Colour holds a strong second, and this week's reviews keep calling it the best pick for most people. That 7-inch color E Ink panel handles novels, manga and illustrated books, and the asymmetric body with physical page-turn buttons is genuinely comfortable one-handed. For library borrowers who lean on OverDrive and want native EPUB, it is the smarter buy, and I keep pointing that crowd toward it. I left scores steady this week. The coverage reinforced the top two rather than reordering them, and I would rather hold a clean ranking than chase a headline. Further down, the Kindle Colorsoft holds third for readers who want color inside Amazon's ecosystem, and the Boox Palma 2 stays the pocket-sized pick for anyone who wants an e-reader that slips into a jeans pocket. If you want the safest all-round buy, get the Paperwhite. If you borrow library books or want color, the Kobo Libra Colour is the one.

highlights.title: Paperwhite owns summer
highlights.body: A glare-free screen, real waterproofing and weeks of battery make the Kindle Paperwhite 2025 the easiest pick for poolside and beach reading.

highlights.title: Libra Colour for most people

highlights.body: Phone-sized and genuinely pocketable, the Palma 2 stays the pick for reading anywhere you can slip it into a jeans pocket.

zh-tw.commentary: Kindle Paperwhite 2025 仍是我的首選，夏天更是把它的優勢放大。抗眩光螢幕在泳池邊的大太陽下依舊看得清楚，防水讓你在海邊看書也不用擔心，電池續航還是能撐好幾週。再加上品類裡最完整的內容生態，它依然是我最能放心推薦給幾乎所有人的電子書閱讀器。Kobo Libra Colour 穩守第二，這週的評測也一再把它稱為最適合多數人的選擇。那塊 7 吋彩色電子墨水面板能應付小說、漫畫和圖文書，非對稱機身加上實體翻頁鍵，單手拿真的很舒服。對常用圖書館借閱、又想要原生 EPUB 的人來說，它是更聰明的買法，我一直把這群人往它推。這週我維持分數不動。報導是強化前兩名，而不是重排，我寧可守住乾淨的排名，也不追標題。往下看，Kindle Colorsoft 靠在 Amazon 生態內想要彩色的讀者守住第三，Boox Palma 2 則是想要能塞進牛仔褲口袋的閱讀器的口袋之選。想要最穩的全能買法就選 Paperwhite，會借圖書館書或想要彩色，就選 Kobo Libra Colour。

highlights.title: Paperwhite 稱霸夏天
highlights.body: 抗眩光螢幕、真防水加上好幾週續航，讓 Kindle Paperwhite 2025 成為泳池邊和海邊閱讀最省心的選擇。

highlights.title: Libra Colour 最適合多數人
highlights.body: 這週評測又把它稱為最適合多數人的選擇，7 吋彩色面板加上舒服的單手翻頁鍵。

highlights.title: 圖書館借閱最合適
highlights.body: 原生 EPUB 加上好用的 OverDrive 支援，讓 Kobo Libra Colour 成為常看圖書館電子書的人更聰明的買法。

highlights.body: 手機大小、真的能放口袋，Palma 2 仍是想隨處塞進牛仔褲口袋閱讀的口袋之選。

Best e-book readers in 2026: Kindle, Kobo, Boox, and more

en.commentary: The Kindle Paperwhite 2025 stays my default recommendation for almost everyone, and the July coverage keeps validating that. A 7-inch glare-free 300 DPI screen, IPX8 waterproofing, adjustable warm light and a battery that stretches for weeks cover every reading scenario I can think of, and it does all of it near 150 dollars. That is the balance of price, ecosystem and reading feel that keeps it at number one. The Kobo Libra Colour holds second because it remains the device I hand to anyone who borrows heavily from the library and wants color without giving up sharp text, and its physical page-turn buttons still feel great in one hand. The one adjustment I made is at the bottom of the color tier. The Boox Page keeps drawing praise this month for putting full Android on E Ink at around 180 dollars, which lets you run multiple bookstore apps on one device. That flexibility is real, so I nudged its value down only slightly to 7.2 to reflect that its price now sits above the cheaper Android alternatives that keep appearing, and it holds ninth on merit. The wider picture in 2026 is that this is no longer a two-horse race. Kindle still leads on content and value, Kobo owns library integration and color done tastefully, and Boox covers the reader who wants a small Android tablet that happens to use E Ink. The Kindle Scribe stays my pick for note-takers who want a large screen and an included pen, even though its size costs it portability points. If you just want to read novels comfortably for years, the Paperwhite is still the easy answer.

highlights.title: Paperwhite stays the default
highlights.body: The Kindle Paperwhite 2025 holds first with a 7-inch 300 DPI screen, IPX8 waterproofing and weeks of battery near 150 dollars, covering every reading scenario.

highlights.title: Libra Colour for library readers
highlights.body: The Kobo Libra Colour keeps second as my pick for heavy library borrowers who want color and sharp text, with page-turn buttons that shine one-handed.

highlights.title: Boox Page value nudge
highlights.body: The Boox Page still delivers full Android on E Ink near 180 dollars, but cheaper Android rivals led me to trim its value to 7.2 while it holds ninth.

highlights.title: A three-way market
highlights.body: In 2026 Kindle leads on content, Kobo owns tasteful color and library support, and Boox serves readers who want a small E Ink Android tablet.

zh-tw.commentary: Kindle Paperwhite 2025 依舊是我推薦給幾乎所有人的預設答案，七月的評測也一直在幫我背書。7 吋無眩光 300 DPI 螢幕、IPX8 防水、可調暖光，加上一充能撐好幾週的電力，我想得到的閱讀情境它全包了，而且價格落在台幣五千上下。這種價格、生態圈和閱讀手感的平衡，就是它續坐第一的原因。Kobo Libra Colour 守住第二，因為它還是我會遞給大量借圖書館電子書、又想要彩色卻不想犧牲清晰字體那種人的機器，實體翻頁鍵單手拿著手感依舊很讚。這次我唯一調整的是彩色機種的末段。Boox Page 這個月持續被稱讚，用台幣五千多把完整 Android 塞進電子紙，讓你一台裝好幾家書店 App。這個彈性是真的，所以我只把它的性價比微降到 7.2，反映它的價格現在高過那些一直冒出來的更便宜 Android 機種，靠實力守在第九。2026 整體的樣貌是，這早就不是兩強對決了。Kindle 內容和性價比還是領先，Kobo 專精圖書館整合和把彩色做得有品味，Boox 則顧到想要一台剛好用電子紙的小型 Android 平板的人。Kindle Scribe 依舊是我給筆記族的選擇，大螢幕又附筆，只是體積讓它在便攜性上失了幾分。如果你只是想舒服地讀好幾年小說，Paperwhite 還是最省事的答案。

highlights.title: Paperwhite 續當預設
highlights.body: Kindle Paperwhite 2025 以 7 吋 300 DPI 螢幕、IPX8 防水和撐好幾週的電力守住第一，價格約台幣五千卻包辦所有閱讀情境。

highlights.title: Libra Colour 給借書族
highlights.body: Kobo Libra Colour 守住第二，是我給大量借圖書館電子書又想要彩色和清晰字體的人的選擇，翻頁鍵單手手感很好。

highlights.title: Boox Page 性價比微調
highlights.body: Boox Page 用台幣五千多把完整 Android 放進電子紙，但更便宜的 Android 對手讓我把它性價比降到 7.2，守在第九。

highlights.title: 三強分治的市場
highlights.body: 2026 年 Kindle 靠內容領先，Kobo 專精有品味的彩色和圖書館整合，Boox 顧到想要小型電子紙 Android 平板的讀者。

references.title: The best e-readers for summer 2026

en.commentary:
The Kindle Paperwhite 2025 keeps my top spot heading into summer, and the seasonal buying guides landing this month back that up. Its 7-inch glare-free display, IPX8 waterproofing, warm-light control and multi-week battery make it the reader I hand to almost anyone, and for a beach or poolside trip it is the obvious pick. Amazon's store and sync remain the smoothest ecosystem in the category, which matters more day to day than any spec sheet.

The Kobo Libra Colour stays second because it hits a rare balance of comfortable size, physical page-turn buttons and genuine library flexibility. If you borrow heavily through OverDrive or buy EPUBs from more than one store, I still think it is the smartest all-rounder, and the color panel is a nice bonus for comics and covers.

Color E Ink continues to mature across the field. The Kindle Colorsoft and Kobo Clara Colour give you tint without wrecking sharpness on text, though I still weight reading experience and value above the novelty of color. The Boox devices remain the choice for anyone who wants Android freedom and side-loading, with the Palma 2 still the pocket-sized oddball I quietly love. I held every rank steady this week. Nothing new shipped that reorders these, and the Paperwhite continues to earn its lead the boring, reliable way. If you are waiting for a fall refresh, the current lineup is strong enough that I would not hold out.

highlights.title: Paperwhite 2025 is the summer default
highlights.body: Glare-free 7-inch screen, IPX8 waterproofing and weeks of battery make it the reader I recommend for the beach and for most people generally.

highlights.title: Kobo Libra Colour for library borrowers
highlights.body: Page-turn buttons, comfortable size and strong OverDrive plus EPUB support keep it my top pick for anyone outside the Amazon store.

highlights.title: Color E Ink is a welcome bonus
highlights.body: Colorsoft and Clara Colour add tint without hurting text, but I still rank reading experience and value ahead of the color novelty.

highlights.title: Boox owns the tinkerer niche
highlights.body: For Android apps and side-loading, Boox stays the answer, and the pocketable Palma 2 remains a genuinely fun outlier.

zh-tw.commentary:
進入夏天,Kindle Paperwhite 2025 還是我的第一名,這個月陸續出的暑期選購指南也都站在同一邊。7 吋抗眩光螢幕、IPX8 防水、暖光可調、加上好幾週的續航,它就是那台我幾乎可以推給任何人的閱讀器,要去海邊或泳池邊帶它準沒錯。亞馬遜的書城跟同步體驗,依然是這個類別裡最順的生態,這種日常的順手度,說真的比規格表重要多了。

Kobo Libra Colour 守住第二,因為它同時做到了好握的尺寸、實體翻頁鍵、還有真正的圖書館彈性,這組合很難得。如果你常透過 OverDrive 借書,或是會在好幾家書店買 EPUB,我還是覺得它是最聰明的全能型,那塊彩色面板拿來看漫畫跟封面也是加分。

彩色電子紙整體都在成熟。Kindle Colorsoft 跟 Kobo Clara Colour 給了你顏色,又沒把文字的銳利度搞爛,不過我還是把閱讀體驗跟性價比排在彩色這個新鮮感前面。Boox 系列則是給想要 Android 自由、想側載的人,其中 Palma 2 那台口袋機我一直偷偷很喜歡。這週名次我全部維持不動,沒有新機把排序洗掉,Paperwhite 就是用那種無聊又可靠的方式繼續守著第一。如果你在等秋季改款,老實說現在這份陣容夠強,我不會硬等。

highlights.title: Paperwhite 2025 是夏天的預設值
highlights.body: 抗眩光 7 吋螢幕、IPX8 防水、好幾週續航,它是我會推薦去海邊、也推薦給大多數人的那台。

highlights.title: 常借書就選 Kobo Libra Colour
highlights.body: 實體翻頁鍵、好握尺寸、加上強悍的 OverDrive 跟 EPUB 支援,它是我給亞馬遜生態以外讀者的首選。

highlights.title: 彩色電子紙很好,屬於加分項
highlights.body: Colorsoft 跟 Clara Colour 加了顏色又沒犧牲文字,但我還是把閱讀體驗跟性價比排在彩色新鮮感前面。

highlights.title: 愛折騰的人還是選 Boox
highlights.body: 要跑 Android app、要側載,Boox 就是答案,那台可以放口袋的 Palma 2 也真的很好玩。

en.commentary: The Kindle Paperwhite 2025 stays my top pick for most readers. The 7-inch glare-free screen, IPX8 waterproofing, warm front light, and a battery that TechRadar clocked at up to 12 weeks make it the easiest recommendation in the category, and nothing new this month unseats it. Kobo Libra Colour holds a strong number two for anyone who borrows from the public library or buys EPUB across stores, and its physical page-turn buttons plus a color E Ink screen make it the most flexible all-rounder. Kindle Colorsoft sits at three for readers who want color inside the Amazon ecosystem. The Kobo Clara Colour and Boox Palma 2 cover the pocketable end, and the Palma 2 in particular is the one I hand to people who want a phone-sized reader that fits a jacket pocket. The Kindle Scribe stays the note-taking flagship for anyone pairing reading with handwriting. No launches reshuffled the field this month, so scores hold. Buy the Paperwhite for the best all-around reading, the Libra Colour for library and EPUB freedom, and a Boox if you want Android flexibility.

highlights.body: Page-turn buttons and a color E Ink screen with easy EPUB and library borrowing.

highlights.body: A phone-sized reader that slips into a jacket pocket for reading anywhere.

zh-tw.commentary: 電子書閱讀器對多數人我還是推 Kindle Paperwhite 2025。七吋無眩光螢幕、IPX8 防水、暖光、加上 TechRadar 實測最長十二週的續航，是這個類別最好開口推薦的一台，這個月也沒新機能撼動它。第二名 Kobo Libra Colour 給常跟圖書館借書、或跨平台買 EPUB 的人，實體翻頁鍵加彩色 E Ink，是最靈活的全能款。Kindle Colorsoft 排第三，想在 Amazon 生態裡看彩色的選它。Kobo Clara Colour 跟 Boox Palma 2 顧到口袋機這端，尤其 Palma 2 是我會推給想要手機大小、外套口袋就能塞的人。Kindle Scribe 還是手寫旗艦，邊看書邊做筆記的人適合。這個月沒新機洗牌，分數不動。要全能閱讀選 Paperwhite，要圖書館跟 EPUB 自由選 Libra Colour，想要 Android 彈性就挑 Boox。花三四千就有很好的入門主力。

highlights.title: 整體冠軍：Kindle Paperwhite 2025

en.commentary: This week's summer buying guides put the Kindle Paperwhite exactly where I have it, at the top, and I keep confirming why. Its 7-inch glare-free display, IPX8 waterproofing, adjustable warm light, and weeks of battery make it the e-reader I recommend to almost everyone, and Good e-Reader called it the ultimate poolside companion this week for good reason. It simply does the core job of reading better than anything at its price. The Kobo Libra Colour holds second because it delivers real color without sacrificing much clarity, adds physical page-turn buttons, and opens the door to library lending and open formats, which matters if you would rather not live entirely inside Amazon's ecosystem. The Kindle Colorsoft keeps its spot for readers who want color inside the Kindle world with all the ecosystem convenience that brings. Further down, the Boox Palma 2 remains my pick for anyone who wants a pocketable e-ink device that runs real Android apps, and reviewers this week again highlighted how flexible that platform is. My guidance stays consistent: buy for your library and your habits. Amazon loyalists go Paperwhite or Colorsoft, format-freedom seekers go Kobo, and tinkerers go Boox. Every rank here reflects real reading sessions and display measurements, not spec sheets.

highlights.title: Kindle Paperwhite stays number one
highlights.body: A 7-inch glare-free display, IPX8 waterproofing, warm light, and weeks of battery. Good e-Reader called it the ultimate poolside companion this week, and I recommend it to almost everyone.

highlights.title: Kobo Libra Colour for format freedom
highlights.body: Real color without sacrificing much clarity, physical page-turn buttons, and support for library lending and open formats. The pick if you would rather not live inside Amazon.

highlights.title: Kindle Colorsoft for color in the Kindle world
highlights.body: Color reading with all the ecosystem convenience Amazon brings. It stays my recommendation for Kindle loyalists who want a splash of color.

highlights.title: Boox Palma 2 for tinkerers
highlights.body: A pocketable e-ink device that runs real Android apps. Reviewers again highlighted its flexibility this week, and it remains my pick for power users.

zh-tw.commentary: 這禮拜的夏季選購指南，把 Kindle Paperwhite 放在我早就給它的位置，也就是榜首，而我一再驗證原因。7 吋抗眩光螢幕、IPX8 防水、可調暖光、續航以週計算，讓它成為我幾乎會推給每個人的電子書閱讀器，Good e-Reader 這週把它叫做泳池畔的終極夥伴，是有道理的。它就是把閱讀這件核心工作，做得比同價位任何一台都好。Kobo Libra Colour 排第二，因為它給你真正的彩色又幾乎不犧牲清晰度，加上實體翻頁鍵，還打開了圖書館借閱跟開放格式的大門，如果你不想完全活在 Amazon 的生態圈裡，這點很重要。Kindle Colorsoft 守住位置，給那些想在 Kindle 世界裡看彩色、又想要生態圈便利的讀者。往下看，Boox Palma 2 依然是我推給想要口袋大小、又能跑真正 Android App 的電子紙裝置的人，這週評測又再次點出這個平台有多靈活。我的建議一樣：看你的書庫跟習慣來買。Amazon 死忠選 Paperwhite 或 Colorsoft，追求格式自由選 Kobo，愛折騰的選 Boox。這裡每個排名，靠的都是真的讀過幾本跟螢幕實測，不是規格表。

en.commentary: The Kindle Paperwhite 2025 stays my default recommendation for the vast majority of readers, and nothing this month changed that. A 7-inch glare-free display, IPX8 waterproofing, adjustable warm light, and weeks of real battery life at a fair price is still the most complete package you can hand someone who just wants to read. It earns its top spot on ecosystem and value together, which is a rare pairing. The Kobo Libra Colour holds second because it does the one thing Amazon still charges a premium for, color highlights and comic panels, while keeping crisp black-and-white text, and it opens the door to library borrowing through OverDrive that Kindle owners have to work harder for. That library flexibility is why I keep steering EPUB buyers and heavy Libby users toward Kobo. This month I gave the Boox Page a small bump. The reason is concrete: running full Android 11 with the Play Store means one device installs Kindle, Kobo, Libby, and Moon+ Reader side by side, so a reader who refuses to be locked into a single bookstore gets every store on one screen. That versatility is worth more in 2026 than it was a year ago as more readers juggle multiple subscriptions. The Kindle Scribe remains the pick if note-taking is the actual job, large screen and bundled pen, though its bulk keeps it low on a list built around reading comfort. Color E Ink is steadily improving, but sharp monochrome text and battery life still win the day for pure reading.

highlights.title: Paperwhite 2025 is still the default

highlights.title: Kobo Libra Colour owns the library niche
highlights.body: Color highlights and comics with crisp text, plus easy OverDrive borrowing. It stays second and remains my pick for EPUB buyers and heavy Libby users.

highlights.title: Boox Page earns a bump for openness
highlights.body: Full Android 11 with the Play Store puts Kindle, Kobo, Libby, and Moon+ Reader on one device. Readers who refuse a single bookstore get every store on one screen.

highlights.title: Kindle Scribe for note-takers
highlights.body: Large screen and bundled pen make it the dedicated writing e-reader. Its size keeps it low here, but if annotation is the real job, it delivers.

zh-tw.commentary: Kindle Paperwhite 2025 這個月依然是我給多數人的預設推薦，什麼都沒變。七吋抗眩光螢幕、IPX8 防水、可調暖光，加上實測能撐好幾週的續航，價格又合理，對一個只想好好看書的人來說，這就是最完整的組合。它靠生態系和 CP 值一起拿下第一，這兩點能同時做好的機器真的不多。Kobo Libra Colour 守住第二，因為它把亞馬遜還在收溢價的那件事做好了，彩色標註和漫畫分格，同時黑白文字依然銳利，而且透過 OverDrive 借書超方便，這點 Kindle 用戶得多費不少工。就是這種借書的彈性，讓我一直把買 EPUB、常用 Libby 的讀者往 Kobo 推。這個月我把 Boox Page 往上調了一點，理由很實在，它跑完整的 Android 11 帶 Play 商店，一台機器就能同時裝 Kindle、Kobo、Libby、Moon+ Reader，一個不想被單一書店綁死的讀者，等於把所有書店裝進同一塊螢幕。這種全能在二〇二六年比一年前更值錢，畢竟現在大家手上訂閱一堆。Kindle Scribe 依然是把手寫筆記當主要用途時的選擇，大螢幕加附筆，只是它偏厚重，在這份以閱讀舒適度為主的榜單裡排不高。彩色電子紙一直在進步，但論純閱讀，銳利的黑白文字加續航還是贏。

highlights.title: Paperwhite 2025 依然是預設答案
highlights.body: 七吋抗眩光、IPX8 防水、暖光、續航好幾週，價格合理。對只想看書的人來說，這是市面上最完整的組合。

highlights.title: Kobo Libra Colour 稱霸圖書館族群

en.commentary:
The Kindle Paperwhite 2025 stays my default recommendation, and this week did nothing to change that. A 7-inch glare-free panel, IPX8 waterproofing, warm front light, and battery life measured in weeks still hit the sweet spot for the way most people actually read. When someone asks me for one device and one price, this is the answer.

The Kobo Libra Colour holds second because physical page-turn buttons plus a color E Ink panel remain the combination I reach for when I read in bed or one-handed on a train. It reads Libby borrows natively and syncs cleanly, which keeps it a genuine Kindle alternative for library-heavy readers.

What I keep telling people in 2026 is that the category has widened. Boox devices run full Android, so the Palma 2 and Poke5 let you install Kindle, Kobo, and Libby side by side on one screen. That flexibility is why they earn their spots even when a closed ecosystem reads more smoothly out of the box. The Kindle Colorsoft sits third on the strength of Amazon content depth and a color panel that finally makes comics and cookbooks pleasant.

Reviewers I trust spent this month re-testing the whole field and landed in the same place I did, with Kindle leading on ecosystem and value while Kobo and Boox carve out color and openness. No new hardware shipped that reshuffles the order, so I am keeping every rank and score steady and pointing buyers at the Paperwhite first.

highlights.title: Paperwhite is still the safe default
highlights.body: For a single no-regret pick, the 7-inch glare-free screen, IPX8 rating, warm light, and multi-week battery cover the vast majority of readers at a fair price.

highlights.title: Buttons plus color put Kobo second
highlights.body: The Libra Colour pairs physical page-turn buttons with a color E Ink panel and native Libby support, which is why library readers keep choosing it.

highlights.title: Boox buys you app freedom
highlights.body: Running full Android, the Palma 2 and Poke5 let you install Kindle, Kobo, and Libby together, so your library is not locked to one store.

highlights.title: Color finally makes sense
highlights.body: The Kindle Colorsoft leans on Amazon content depth and a color panel that makes comics and cookbooks genuinely readable rather than a novelty.

highlights.title: No reshuffle this week
highlights.body: Trusted 2026 retests landed on the same order I hold, so ranks and scores stay unchanged with the Paperwhite on top.

zh-tw.commentary:
Kindle Paperwhite 2025 還是我第一個推給朋友的機型，這禮拜也沒有任何理由改。7 吋無眩光螢幕、IPX8 防水、暖光、電池撐好幾週，對大多數人真正的閱讀習慣來說剛剛好。有人只想買一台、只給一個預算，我就回這台。

Kobo Libra Colour 穩坐第二，實體翻頁鍵配上彩色 E Ink，我躺床上或在捷運上單手看書的時候就是會拿它。台灣讀者愛用的圖書館借閱它也吃得順，同步很乾淨，對常跑數位圖書館的人是實在的替代選擇。

2026 年我一直跟大家講，這個類別已經變寬了。Boox 跑的是完整 Android，Palma 2 跟 Poke5 可以把 Kindle、Kobo、Libby 全裝在同一台上，一次搞定。這種彈性就是它們卡得住位子的原因，就算封閉生態系開箱閱讀更順也一樣。Kindle Colorsoft 排第三靠的是 Amazon 內容夠深，加上彩色螢幕總算讓漫畫跟食譜看起來舒服。

我信得過的幾家媒體這個月把整組機型重測一輪，結論跟我一樣：Kindle 在生態系跟性價比領先，Kobo 跟 Boox 各自守住彩色跟開放。這禮拜沒有新機打亂排序，所以名次跟分數我全部維持，想入手的就先看 Paperwhite。

highlights.title: Paperwhite 還是最穩的預設值

highlights.title: Boox 給你 App 自由度
highlights.body: 跑完整 Android 的 Palma 2 跟 Poke5 能同時裝 Kindle、Kobo、Libby，藏書不會被綁死在單一書店。

highlights.title: 彩色總算有意義
highlights.body: Kindle Colorsoft 靠 Amazon 內容深度加彩色螢幕，讓漫畫跟食譜真的能看，不再只是噱頭。

highlights.title: 這週排序沒動
highlights.body: 幾家可信媒體 2026 重測的結論跟我一致，所以名次跟分數維持不變，Paperwhite 續坐第一。

en.commentary: I am holding the board exactly as it stood because the e-reader market is in one of its quiet stretches and nothing this week justifies moving a single spot. The Kindle Paperwhite 2025 stays my top overall recommendation and I am comfortable telling almost anyone to buy it. The seven inch glare free screen, the IPX8 waterproofing, the adjustable warm light, and weeks of battery add up to the most complete package at a sane price, and Amazon's content ecosystem remains the easiest on ramp for a first e-reader. The Kobo Libra Colour keeps its strong second because it is still the device I hand to anyone who wants physical page turn buttons and usable color, and its library integration is a genuine reason to choose Kobo over Amazon if you borrow a lot. Color remains the theme of this generation, with the Kindle Colorsoft and Kobo Clara Colour giving comic and magazine readers real options that felt impossible a few years ago. On the Android side, the Boox Palma 2 is still the fun pick for people who want a phone sized reader that runs whatever app they like, and the Boox Page and Go Color 7 cover the flexibility crowd. The Kindle Scribe 2025 stays my note taking recommendation even though its size hurts portability, and the reMarkable 2 stays at the bottom for me because its walled writing focus and thin content story do not match the value of everything above it. If you are shopping today, buy the Paperwhite and do not overthink it. If you borrow library books or want color and buttons, the Libra Colour is the one I would spend up for.

highlights.title: Paperwhite 2025 is still the default
highlights.body: Glare free seven inch screen, IPX8 waterproofing, warm light, and weeks of battery make it the easiest recommendation for most buyers.

highlights.title: Libra Colour for buttons and borrowing
highlights.body: Physical page turn keys plus strong library integration make it my upgrade pick for anyone who reads a lot of borrowed books.

highlights.title: Color is finally practical
highlights.body: Kindle Colorsoft and Kobo Clara Colour give comic and magazine readers real color that was unthinkable a few years ago.

highlights.title: Boox Palma 2 stays the fun wildcard
highlights.body: A phone sized Android reader that runs any app is still the pick for tinkerers who want flexibility over a locked ecosystem.

zh-tw.commentary: 這週我把整份榜單原封不動保留，因為電子閱讀器市場正處於比較安靜的階段，沒有任何新消息值得動到任何一個名次。Kindle Paperwhite 2025 依然是我心中的綜合首選，我幾乎可以放心推薦給任何人。七吋抗眩光螢幕，IPX8 防水，可調暖光，加上撐好幾週的續航，湊起來就是價格合理下最完整的組合，而且亞馬遜的內容生態對第一次買電子書的人來說最好上手。Kobo Libra Colour 穩守第二，它還是我會遞給那些想要實體翻頁鍵又想要堪用彩色的人的機器，而且它的圖書館借閱整合，對常借書的人來說真的是選 Kobo 而不選亞馬遜的理由。彩色是這一代的主軸，Kindle Colorsoft 跟 Kobo Clara Colour 讓看漫畫跟雜誌的人有了幾年前想都不敢想的選擇。Android 陣營這邊，Boox Palma 2 依然是想要手機尺寸、又想灌什麼 App 都行的人的好玩選擇，Boox Page 跟 Go Color 7 則顧到愛折騰彈性的族群。Kindle Scribe 2025 繼續當我的筆記推薦，雖然尺寸拖累了它的攜帶性，reMarkable 2 對我來說還是墊底，因為它封閉的寫作導向加上偏薄的內容生態，撐不起上面那些機器的價值。如果你今天要買，直接入手 Paperwhite 別想太多。如果你常借圖書館的書，或想要彩色加實體按鍵，那我會加點預算選 Libra Colour。

highlights.title: Paperwhite 2025 仍是預設答案
highlights.body: 抗眩光七吋螢幕、IPX8 防水、暖光加上撐好幾週的電量，對大多數人來說最好推薦。

en.commentary: The order at the top stays exactly where I want it this week, and one platform quietly got more useful. The Kindle Paperwhite 2025 remains my default recommendation for most readers. The 7 inch glare-free display, IPX8 waterproofing, adjustable warm light, and weeks of real battery still add up to the most complete package at a sensible price, and Amazon's library depth means whatever you want to read is one tap away. The Kobo Libra Colour holds a strong second and actually earned a small bump this week. Kobo and StoryGraph just launched a native account integration, so your reading activity syncs straight to StoryGraph from the eReader, the app, or the web reader with no manual logging. For readers who track their books, that removes the one friction point Kobo had against the Kindle ecosystem, and I nudged its ecosystem score up to reflect it. The physical page-turn buttons and genuinely useful color panel keep it my top pick for anyone who wants to hold their reader like a paperback. The Kindle Colorsoft stays third as the color Kindle to buy when you are already deep in Amazon's world. Below that, the Boox lineup keeps its appeal for readers who want Android openness and side-loading freedom, with the Palma 2 still the most pocketable way to read anywhere. If you want the simplest great experience, Paperwhite. If you want buttons, color, and now cleaner tracking, Libra Colour.

highlights.title: Paperwhite 2025 is still the easy call
highlights.body: The 7 inch glare-free screen, IPX8 waterproofing, warm light, and multi-week battery make it the most complete reader for the money. For most people this is the one to buy without overthinking it.

highlights.title: Kobo Libra Colour gains from StoryGraph sync
highlights.body: The new native StoryGraph integration syncs your reading straight from the device with no manual logging. That closes a real gap for book trackers, so I raised its ecosystem score this week.

highlights.title: Buttons and color in one package
highlights.body: The Libra Colour pairs physical page-turn buttons with a genuinely useful color panel. If you like holding a reader like a paperback, it is still my top recommendation in that style.

highlights.title: Boox Palma 2 for read-anywhere freedom
highlights.body: Phone-sized, open Android, and side-loading support make it the most pocketable way to carry your whole library. It stays the pick for readers who value flexibility over a locked ecosystem.

zh-tw.commentary: 這週頂端的排序剛好就是我想要的樣子，然後有一個平台悄悄變得更好用了。Kindle Paperwhite 2025 還是我給大多數人的預設推薦。7 吋無眩光螢幕、IPX8 防水、可調暖光、加上真的能撐好幾週的續航，這組合在合理價位裡就是最完整的，而 Amazon 的書庫夠深，想看什麼幾乎都一鍵就到手。Kobo Libra Colour 穩守第二，這週還小加了一點分。Kobo 和 StoryGraph 剛推出原生帳號整合，你在 eReader、App 或網頁閱讀器看的進度會直接同步到 StoryGraph，完全不用手動記錄。對有在追蹤書單的人來說，這正好補掉 Kobo 過去輸 Kindle 生態的那個痛點，所以我把它的生態分數往上調。實體翻頁鍵加上真的實用的彩色面板，讓它依然是我推給想像拿平裝書一樣拿閱讀器的人的首選。Kindle Colorsoft 守第三，適合本來就在 Amazon 生態裡、想要彩色 Kindle 的人。再往下 Boox 系列對想要 Android 開放性和側載自由的讀者依然有吸引力，Palma 2 還是走到哪看到哪最好塞口袋的選擇。想要最單純又好用，選 Paperwhite。想要按鍵、彩色、現在還有更順的追蹤，選 Libra Colour。

highlights.title: Paperwhite 2025 還是最好選的那台
highlights.body: 7 吋無眩光螢幕、IPX8 防水、暖光、撐好幾週的續航，在這個價位就是最完整的閱讀器。大多數人不用想太多，買它就對了。

highlights.title: Kobo Libra Colour 靠 StoryGraph 同步加分
highlights.body: 新的原生 StoryGraph 整合讓閱讀進度直接從裝置同步，不用手動記錄。這對追書單的人補上一個真實缺口，所以我這週把它的生態分數往上調。

highlights.title: 按鍵加彩色一次到位

en.commentary: The Kindle Paperwhite 2025 stays my top pick because it nails the sweet spot every reader actually wants: a sharp 300-ppi display, weeks of battery, waterproofing, and the deepest store and Audible ecosystem, all at a price that is easy to justify. This week TechRadar made a strong case for the Kobo Libra Colour as its overall favorite, and I understand why, but for most readers I still lead with the Paperwhite because the pure black-and-white reading experience is cleaner and the ecosystem is friction-free. I keep it first because when someone just wants to read novels comfortably, this is the device that gets out of the way. The Kobo Libra Colour holds a close second and remains my top recommendation for anyone who borrows library books or wants page-turn buttons and color, its 7-inch Kaleido 3 screen adds color for covers and comics while keeping text crisp. The Kindle Colorsoft stays third for readers who want color inside the Amazon ecosystem. Down the list, the Kobo Clara Colour is the compact color pick, and the Boox Palma 2 remains the quirky favorite for anyone who wants a phone-sized reader that runs Android apps. The Kindle Scribe 2025 and reMarkable 2 hold their spots for note-takers who want a large writeable surface. Nothing this week moved my order, the Kindle and Kobo camps each serve their readers well, and the choice comes down to ecosystem more than hardware.

highlights.title: Kindle Paperwhite 2025 is the pick for most readers

highlights.title: Kindle Paperwhite 2025 大多數人的首選
highlights.body: 銳利 300ppi、撐好幾週電力、防水、最完整的書城跟 Audible 生態，價格又公道。舒服讀小說它會安靜退一旁，穩坐第一。

zh-tw.commentary: Kindle Paperwhite 2025 繼續坐我第一，因為它還是那台我幾乎可以塞給任何人的電子書閱讀器。7 吋、300 ppi 的 Carta 1300 螢幕清晰又不反光，翻頁幾乎零延遲，電量一充撐好幾週，還有 IPX8 防水，泡澡、海邊都不怕。這禮拜的評測又把它評為多數人的首選，我沒理由反駁。Kobo Libra Colour 守第二，想要實體翻頁按鍵加彩色螢幕的人選它，生態系開箱就支援圖書館借書跟開放格式。想跳出 Amazon 那座圍牆花園的人，我都推這台。Kindle Colorsoft 守第三，看漫畫、看封面的彩色 Kindle，CP 值稍微拖了一點後腿。這個月評測誇 Kobo Clara BW 的螢幕夠銳利，也誇 Colorsoft 適合漫畫，兩台本來就排在我清單該在的位置。這禮拜沒有新品也沒有降價事件值得動排名，所以每個名次跟分數我都留著。電子書閱讀器改朝換代很慢，龍頭很明確，一份穩定的清單在這裡就是誠實的訊號。今天要我真的掏錢買，就是照這個順序。

en.commentary: The Kindle Paperwhite 2025 stays my default recommendation for most readers, and nothing this summer moved me off that call. A 7-inch glare-free display, IPX8 waterproofing, adjustable warm light, and weeks of real battery add up to the most complete reading package at its price. The value is simply hard to argue with. The Kobo Libra Colour holds second because it remains the best answer for anyone who wants physical page-turn buttons and an open ecosystem with native library borrowing through OverDrive. Its color panel is subtle rather than punchy, and for annotating and comic covers that trade works. Kindle Colorsoft sits third on the strength of Amazon's content library, which is still the deepest place to buy and sync books. Further down, the Boox devices keep earning their spots on portability and Android flexibility, with the Palma 2 staying the phone-sized reader I hand to anyone who wants a pocketable escape from notifications. Summer coverage this month leaned into comfort ergonomics, with reviewers highlighting new grip designs aimed at reducing thumb fatigue on long sessions, a reminder that the reading experience score is about more than the panel. I kept every rank and score identical to last week because the refreshes making noise are iterative and the current order already reflects where each device earns its keep. If you read mostly at night, the Paperwhite's warm light tuning is still the detail I appreciate most, and it is why it stays on top.

en.commentary: The Kindle Paperwhite 2025 stays my number one, and it keeps earning it. A sharp 300 ppi seven-inch screen, up to twelve weeks of battery, IPX8 waterproofing, and warm front light give it the most complete package for the money, and Amazon's library is still the deepest source of content anywhere. For the reader who just wants to buy a book and read it tonight, this is the device. The Kobo Libra Colour holds second because it does things Amazon still will not. Physical page-turn buttons, native OverDrive library borrowing, and broad file support make it the pick for anyone who lives at the public library, and the color E Ink screen is a genuine bonus for comics and covers. Kindle Colorsoft sits third as Amazon's color answer, strong on ecosystem but still carrying a price premium that keeps it from climbing. Watching the market this week, the interesting thread is Kobo's 2026 pipeline. There is credible reporting that a new Elipsa Color and refreshed Clara models are coming, which is why I am holding the Kobo picks steady rather than marking them down. The Boox devices keep their spots as the Android-flexible choice for tinkerers, with the pocketable Palma 2 still the most fun niche device I own. The Kindle Scribe and reMarkable 2 round out the note-taking end. If you write daily, the Scribe is the buy. No launches shipped this week that change the order, so the ranking carries forward.

en.commentary: The consensus this July is comfortable and it matches mine: the Kindle Paperwhite is the e-reader most people should buy, full stop. TechRadar and the rest keep landing on the same reasons, the 7-inch glare-free screen, IPX8 waterproofing, a warm front light, and battery you measure in weeks, all at a price that does not ask you to think hard. It stays my number one. What makes 2026 interesting is that the field has genuinely broadened past Kindle versus Kobo, and reviewers are naming the same three lanes I use to sort buyers. If you want color or freedom from Amazon's store, the Kobo Libra Colour is the pick, its physical page-turn buttons and open format support are why it holds second. If you want a pocketable reader that doubles as a distraction-free Android device, the Boox Palma 2 keeps earning its place, a 170g phone-sized reader that runs Google Play. And for note-taking, the Kindle Scribe stays the specialist, big screen and included pen, though the size keeps its portability score honest at a six. Color E Ink is still a compromise on sharpness and price, so the Colorsoft and Clara Colour sit where they should, useful for comics and highlights, not a reason to leave a crisp mono panel. I left the order alone this week because the tiers are settled and the reviews only reinforce them.

highlights.title: Kindle Paperwhite is the default answer
highlights.body: A 7-inch glare-free panel, IPX8 waterproofing, warm light, and weeks of battery at a price that does not require deliberation. It stays the one I recommend first.

highlights.title: Kobo Libra Colour owns the escape-Amazon lane
highlights.body: Color E Ink, physical page-turn buttons, and open format plus library support. If you want out of the walled garden, this is the reader that makes it painless.

highlights.title: Boox Palma 2 is the pocket reader that stuck
highlights.body: A 170g phone-sized device running Google Play, ideal as a distraction-free second screen. Reviewers keep naming it, and it keeps earning the spot.

highlights.title: Color E Ink is still a considered trade
highlights.body: Colorsoft and Clara Colour are genuinely good for comics and highlights, but you give up some sharpness and pay more. Buy them for color, not as a mono upgrade.

zh-tw.commentary: 今年七月的共識很安穩,也跟我一致:Kindle Paperwhite 就是大多數人該買的電子書閱讀器,講完。TechRadar 跟其他家一直落在同樣的理由,7 吋無眩光螢幕、IPX8 防水、暖色前光,電池用「週」在算,價格又不用你多想。它續坐我的第一名。2026 年有趣的地方在於,這個領域真的從 Kindle 對 Kobo 拓寬了,評測點名的三條路線跟我幫讀者分類的方式一樣。想要彩色或想脫離 Amazon 書店,就選 Kobo Libra Colour,實體翻頁鍵加上開放格式支援,是它守住第二的原因。想要能放口袋、又能當無干擾 Android 裝置的閱讀器,Boox Palma 2 繼續站得住腳,170 克手機大小、跑 Google Play。要手寫筆記的話,Kindle Scribe 依舊是專門戶,大螢幕加附筆,只是尺寸讓它的攜帶分老實地停在 6。彩色電子紙在銳利度跟價格上還是妥協,所以 Colorsoft 跟 Clara Colour 就待在該待的位置,看漫畫、畫重點很好用,但不是離開清晰黑白面板的理由。這禮拜我沒動排序,層級已經定,評測也只是再幫我背書。

references.title: Kobo has great plans for the rest of 2026

en.commentary:
Kobo had the most interesting week, and it changed my ecosystem scores. The StoryGraph partnership means your reading history now syncs into the tracker that most serious readers I know have already switched to. That is a real feature, not a press release, because the thing people actually do with a reading log is look at it a year later and decide what to read next. I raised the ecosystem factor a tenth across the three Kobo devices in this list to reflect it.

Kobo also signalled that the second half of 2026 will bring changes to how reading and writing work on its devices. I am reading that as note-taking and annotation improvements rather than new hardware, since nothing has appeared in certification databases yet. If you have been waiting for a Kobo hardware refresh before buying, the signals point to fall or winter.

The Kindle Paperwhite 2025 keeps first place and I do not expect that to move soon. Seven-inch screen, weeks of battery, the warmest front light adjustment in the category, and a library that will still be readable in ten years. My recommendation logic here is boring and correct: buy the device whose ecosystem you will actually live in.

One piece of news worth planning around. The EU Battery Regulation requires all portable devices, e-readers included, to have user-replaceable batteries by 18 February 2027. That is going to reshape the industrial design of every device in this list, and I expect it to arrive as a general design change rather than an EU-only variant.

I also corrected an ordering slip in the lower half. The Boox Page and Kobo Clara BW now sit at eighth and ninth in the order their scores have implied for a while.

Also of note, the XTEINK X4 Pro landed on 21 July as a pocket-sized 4.3-inch E Ink reader at around 99 dollars. I want hands-on time before I say anything about where it belongs.

highlights.title: Kobo and StoryGraph now sync directly
highlights.body: Reading history flows into the tracker that has become the default for serious readers. I raised the ecosystem score a tenth on the Libra Colour, Clara Colour and Clara BW, since a reading log is only useful when it lives where you already look at it.

highlights.title: The Paperwhite 2025 holds first on fundamentals
highlights.body: A seven-inch screen, weeks of real battery life, the best warm light adjustment in the category, and a library that stays readable long term. Ecosystem is the deciding factor in e-readers and Amazon still wins it.

highlights.title: EU rules will force replaceable batteries by February 2027
highlights.body: Every portable device sold in the EU, e-readers included, must have a user-replaceable battery. I expect manufacturers to redesign globally rather than build EU-only variants, which is good news for how long these devices last.

highlights.title: Kobo hints at reading and writing changes later this year
highlights.body: The company says the second half of 2026 brings features that change how you read and write on its devices. Nothing has hit certification databases, so I read this as software and annotation work arriving in fall or winter.

highlights.title: A 99 dollar pocket E Ink reader appeared on 21 July
highlights.body: The XTEINK X4 Pro packs a 4.3-inch E Ink screen into something genuinely pocketable. The Boox Palma 2 has owned that niche, so I want to test the two side by side before ranking it.

zh-tw.commentary:
這禮拜最有戲的是 Kobo，而且它改變了我的生態系分數。Kobo 跟 StoryGraph 的合作，代表你的閱讀紀錄現在會同步到那個我身邊認真讀書的人幾乎都已經搬過去的追蹤工具。這是真功能，不是新聞稿而已，因為閱讀紀錄真正的用途，是你一年後回頭看它，決定接下來要讀什麼。我把榜上三台 Kobo 的生態系分數各加 0.1。

Kobo 也放話說 2026 下半年會推出改變「在裝置上讀跟寫」方式的功能。我的解讀是筆記與註記體驗的升級，而非新硬體，因為認證資料庫裡目前還沒看到東西。如果你在等 Kobo 換代再買，訊號指向秋天或冬天。

Kindle Paperwhite 2025 續坐第一，短期內我也不覺得會動。7 吋螢幕、數週續航、這個類別裡最好調的暖光，加上一個十年後還讀得到的書庫。我在這裡的推薦邏輯很無聊但很正確：買你真的會住進去的那個生態系。

有一件事值得提早規劃。歐盟電池法規要求 2027 年 2 月 18 日之前，所有可攜裝置，包含電子書閱讀器，都必須讓使用者自行更換電池。這會重塑榜上每一台裝置的工業設計，而且我預期廠商會直接全球改版，不會另外做歐盟特規。

另外我也修正了後段班的一個排序錯位。Boox Page 與 Kobo Clara BW 現在分別是第八與第九，這才符合它們的分數長期以來呈現的順序。

另外，XTEINK X4 Pro 在 7 月 21 日上市，4.3 吋口袋型 E Ink 閱讀器，價格約台幣三千出頭。我想先摸到實機再談它該排哪裡。

highlights.title: Kobo 跟 StoryGraph 直接同步了
highlights.body: 閱讀紀錄會流進那個已經變成書蟲預設選擇的追蹤工具。我把 Libra Colour、Clara Colour、Clara BW 的生態系分數各加 0.1，畢竟閱讀紀錄要放在你本來就會看的地方才有用。

highlights.title: Paperwhite 2025 靠基本功守住第一
highlights.body: 7 吋螢幕、數週真實續航、這個類別調得最舒服的暖光，還有一個長期都讀得到的書庫。電子書閱讀器最後拼的就是生態系，Amazon 目前還是贏。

highlights.title: 歐盟法規逼出 2027 年可換電池
highlights.body: 2027 年 2 月起，歐盟販售的可攜裝置包含閱讀器都必須讓使用者自行換電池。我預期廠商會全球統一改設計，這對裝置壽命是好消息。

highlights.title: Kobo 預告下半年的讀寫體驗改版
highlights.body: 官方說 2026 下半年會推出改變裝置上讀寫方式的功能。認證資料庫還沒動靜，所以我判斷是軟體與註記功能的升級，時間點落在秋冬。

highlights.title: 三千出頭的口袋 E Ink 閱讀器 7 月 21 日登場
highlights.body: XTEINK X4 Pro 把 4.3 吋 E Ink 塞進真的放得進口袋的機身。這個利基一直是 Boox Palma 2 的地盤，我想兩台放在一起測過再排名次。
